Name: Blue Star Limited
Description: Blue Star Limited is India’s leading air conditioning and commercial refrigeration company with over eight decades of experience in providing expert cooling solutions. It fulfills the cooling requirements of a large number of corporate, commercial as well as residential customers, as well as offers products such as water purifiers, air purifiers and air coolers. It also provides expertise in allied contracting activities such as electrical, plumbing and fire-fighting services, in order to provide turnkey solutions, apart from execution of specialised industrial projects. Blue Star has joint ventures in Qatar, Malaysia and Oman which undertake MEP (mechanical, electrical and plumbing) projects for residential, commercial and infrastructure buildings, and exports a range of products to the Middle East, Africa, SAARC and ASEAN regions. Blue Star’s other businesses include marketing and maintenance of imported professional electronic equipment and services, as well as industrial products and systems, which is handled by Blue Star Engineering & Electronics, a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company.

Name: RIELLO
Description:
For Riello, Energy For Life has been at the core of its industrial policy for over 100 years, which translates daily into the search for new solutions aimed at providing comfort, with maximum efficiency, in full respect of the environment that surrounds us.

Founded in 1922, Riello is a world-wide leader in the Burners Business and a reference player in heating and energy efficiency products and service. 
Headquartered in Legnago (VR), Italy, Riello operates in over 120 Countries and is a part of Carrier, global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions.
The leading position of Riello is linked to: 
1)	a  worldwide and reliable Sales and Assistance network;
2)	high energy efficiency, tailor-made, integrated solutions.

Riello is committed to the development of innovative products with ever increasing environmental sustainability and energy efficiency.

Name: TROX DO BRASIL
Description:
TROX Technik é líder no desenvolvimento, fabricação e venda de componentes, dispositivos e sistemas de ventilação e ar condicionado. Com subsidiárias em 28 países nos cinco continentes, 14 instalações de produção, e os importadores e representantes, a TROX está presente em mais de 70 países. Fundada em 1951 e com uma equipe de 3.700 colaboradores.

A TROX do Brasil teve início de suas atividades em 1976. Conta hoje com mais de 400 colaboradores e possui sua fábrica instalada na Cidade Industrial de Curitiba, área construída de 15.500 metros quadrados. O rigor técnico, a qualidade e a experiência internacional, vêm permitindo a TROX do Brasil a ocupar um lugar de liderança também no Brasil. Uma das nossas maiores preocupações são nossos clientes, por isso estamos constantemente em inovação, com permanentes pesquisas e desenvolvimento de novos conceitos e aplicações, permitindo fornecer ao mercado produtos e soluções técnicas de alto nível atendendo as necessidades de mercado.

Name: AHI Carrier
Description:
AHI Carrier stands as one of the largest Carrier joint venture firms operating outside the United States, boasting a global presence spanning over 100 countries. AHI Carrier is unwavering in its commitment to surpass customer expectations through the provision of energy-efficient products incorporating cutting-edge technology, unparalleled quality, and comprehensive after-sales services and support.

AHI Carrier offers a range of contemporary and innovative solutions, including Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning, Building Controls, Automation, Fire & Security Solutions, sourced from reputable brands such as Carrier, Toshiba, CIAT, and Riello. Our sustainability-driven offerings encompass energy-efficient products, building controls, and energy services tailored to meet the needs of various sectors, including Commercial, Hospitality, Healthcare, Industrial, and Residential applications.

Moreover, AHI Carrier maintains a specialized Renewables Energy division, equipped with design engineering and project delivery capabilities to deliver customized solutions specifically designed for various industries.

Name: Atlantic France
Description:
La marque Atlantic est née il y a plus de 50 ans à La Roche-sur-Yon, en Vendée. Véritable expert du confort thermique, Atlantic propose un large choix de solutions multi-énergies respectueuses de l’environnement.

La marque Atlantic c’est la fiabilité du Made in France, réunissant près de 4 000 collaborateurs. Au total, ce sont 13 sites industriels en France qui conçoivent et réalisent les produits d’aujourd’hui et de demain. C’est aussi l’innovation portée par plus de 250 personnes en recherche & développement répondant à toutes les attentes de ses clients.

Numéro 1 du confort thermique en France pour l’habitat individuel et collectif, les bureaux et les bâtiments publics, Atlantic vous apporte une réponse globale et éco-performante pour gagner en sérénité.

Atlantic est une marque 100% dédiée aux professionnels, avec des services sur-mesure en avant-projet, en après-vente, et aussi des formations qualifiantes : autant de services conçus pour apporter de la sérénité au quotidien.
Location: La Roche-sur-Yon, Pays de la Loire

Name: Hisense International HVAC
Description:
Hisense International HVAC belongs to Hisense group, which has 54 years’ history. Engaged in air conditioning development for 35 years, took the lead in launching inverter air conditioner products in Chinese market in 1996, Hisense continued to accumulate technology to become the leader of inverter technology. Hisense has multi-product line layout which covers multimedia, home appliances, IT intelligent information and modern service industries; strong brand equity strength which products are exported to more than 160 countries and regions, found 66 overseas branches, covering Europe, America, Africa, Middle East, Australia and Southeast Asia and other global markets.

Hisense has a full range of air conditioning products, including residential air conditioners:  split AC, window AC, portable AC, dehumidifiers, as well as light commercial air conditioners: multi split, duct, cassette, ceiling floor, console, floor standing, roof top and heat pump. With 4 factories and 46 production lines, the annual production capacity reaches 180,000 sets. We also provide professional technical resources, after-sales service, and a global customer service system to support our customers' needs.

Aspiring to become the most trustworthy brand in the world with more than a century of brand heritage. We aim to continually pursue scientific and technological innovation, strive to take the lead in advanced manufacturing with intelligence as the core, bring happiness to millions of families with high-quality products and services.

Name: Airedale by Modine
Description:
Airedale by Modine is the critical cooling specialist, with the technology and expertise to meet the specific operational demands of data centers worldwide. We take a partnership approach, delivering customised solutions at scale to colocation and hyperscale data center clients whose network of global facilities demand a more bespoke solution. Our hybrid cooling solutions encompass high efficiency air and liquid cooling systems, intelligent controls software and comprehensive aftersales support. 
Renowned for the expertise of our people, with world class products and plants, Airedale by Modine is proud of its R&D ethos being firmly rooted in sustainability and quality.  We are committed to deliver best-in-class technical design, energy performance, project delivery and ongoing lifecycle optimisation; all of which comes together to support our clients in meeting their performance, efficiency and sustainability goals. 
With a global network of facilities, encompassing R&D laboratories, test chambers, production, training and sales offices, Airedale by Modine has sites across 3 continents: North America, Europe and Asia. 
Airedale by Modine is part of Modine (NYSE:MOD), a diversified global leader in thermal management technology and solutions.

Name: Titus HVAC
Description: Titus is a recognized leader in the air distribution segment of the commercial HVAC industry. We continue to advance every aspect of our business to meet the changing needs of our customers and HVAC professionals world wide.  Titus products can be found in numerous prestigious projects worldwide, including the Guggenheim Museum in Spain, the Bank of China in Beijing and the International Space Station.

Name: Voltas Commercial Air-conditioning Business
Description: Voltas is the leading company in the HVAC products segment. The company’s commercial air conditioning business provides smart and efficient air conditioning not only for human comfort but also for industrial applications. We manufacture best in class Commercial Air-conditioning Products ranging from 1TR to 4000TR with products like the VRF, Ducted Systems, Cassette ACs, Tower ACs, Chillers, LTR & VAM. We have state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Waghodia, Gujarat, focused towards developing a local ecosystem and driving the philosophy of “Make in India” and thereby moving towards making India- “Self-Reliant”. Our customer care function provides life cycle solutions and after-sales service for these products. The customer care function also undertakes retrofit products sales, AMC operations & maintenance, spare parts sales, and energy audit services.

Name: Thermomatic Group
Description:
Thermomatic is pioneer in the manufacture of air dehumidifiers in Brazil. With 36 years of tradition on the market, provides solutions in dehumidifying for more than 70 industrial segments, with customized projects developed by qualified engineers to meet every need, helping to comply the legislation and specific standards of relative humidity control established by inspecting authorities.

Today there are more than 75,000 customers in Latin America that count with industrial, commercial and home equipments of the most complete line in the country, promoting air quality, help the production process, preservation of goods and health.

Thermomatic also offers other products that make everyday life easier, as hospital-grade air purifiers and ice machines that cater to several commercial establishments.

To know more about how Thermomatic transforms industries, trades and homes, visit our website: https://thermomaticgroup.com/

Name: Western Refrigeration Pvt Ltd
Description:
Western Refrigeration, the largest manufacturer of commercial refrigeration equipment in India, has been at the forefront of India’s commercial refrigeration industry for over 50 years—trusted by businesses across retail, hospitality, food service, and healthcare.

With four advanced manufacturing facilities located in Maharashtra and Gujarat, we offer a comprehensive range of products including Visi Coolers, Deep Freezers, Dishwashers, Stainless Steel Refrigerators, Ice Machines, Medical Refrigeration, Storage Water Cooler and more—designed to deliver consistent performance, durability, and energy efficiency.

Our extensive pan-India network of 27+ Sales & Service Branches supports over 250 districts, ensuring prompt service and reliable after-sales support wherever your business is. Beyond India, our footprint extends to 45+ countries, with a growing global presence built on quality, trust, and innovation.

At Western, we don’t just manufacture cooling solutions—we power possibilities for businesses worldwide.

Name: Thermor France
Description:
Thermor est une marque française, qui commercialise des solutions de confort thermique pour la rénovation de l’habitat et du petit tertiaire.

Créée à Orléans en 1931 par les frères Maure, Thermor est une marque authentique, reconnue pour la qualité et la durabilité de ses produits. Une marque qui équipe des millions de foyers et qui accompagne le quotidien des Français depuis plus de 90 ans. Elle a su au fil des années se positionner à la pointe de l’innovation en proposant des produits qui apportent à la fois confort, économies d’énergie, design avec, en plus, un fonctionnement 100% bas carbone grâce aux énergies électriques et renouvelables.

De la conception de nos produits jusqu’à notre service clients, la satisfaction du consommateur est au cœur de nos préoccupations.

Les produits Thermor sont vendus et posés par des professionnels.

Name: MCI SAS
Description:
Spécialiste du froid et la climatisation depuis 60 ans, MCI s'engage à vous offrir un grand choix de solutions et de services parfaitement adaptés à vos exigences. Notre savoir-faire dans les domaines de : la réfrigération commerciale, la réfrigération industrielle, du génie climatique, nous permet de vous accompagner et de vous conseiller avec compétence et professionnalisme. 

Que ce soit au niveau de la conception, de la réalisation, de la mise en service ou de la maintenance, nos équipes sont à vos côtés pour optimiser vos installations.

MCI vous accompagne également dans la maîtrise de votre performance énergétique de vos installations grâce à ses 46 agences et antennes réparties sur l'ensemble du territoire national.

MCI intervient et à une très forte expérience dans les secteurs d’activités suivants : distribution alimentaire comme non alimentaire, logistique, restauration, hôtellerie, agro-alimentaire, plasturgie, santé, bureaux, data-center et collectivités.

Name: TICA Group
Description:
TICA is a global leader in clean air and green energy solutions, dedicated to fostering a more sustainable, healthier, and efficient future. For over 35 years, our innovation has been driven by 7,000+ global employees, including 1,500+ R&D engineers, supported by 200+ laboratories and 40 manufacturing facilities—delivering advanced solutions to more than 120 countries.

Our integrated HVAC and energy systems are trusted across critical sectors - healthcare, pharmaceuticals, semiconductors, and new energy - with proven performance in 1,000+ new energy companies;3,000+ semiconductor facilities;5,000+ GMP-certified biopharmaceutical factories;7,000+ hospitals;And more...

What We Offer
We deliver a full spectrum of solutions that improve indoor air quality, optimize energy use, and support sustainable development goals.
Cooling & Heating Solutions – Chillers, VRF, DX AHUs, heat pumps, and more—engineered for precise and efficient climate control.
Clean Air Solutions – Advanced AHUs, FCUs, and ventilation systems designed to improve indoor air quality and comfort.
Green Energy Solutions – High-performance technologies such as oil-free magnetic bearing centrifugal chillers and Organic Rankine Cycle (ORC) power systems.
ORC Solutions – Transforming industrial waste heat into clean electricity using next-generation thermal energy recovery.
Retrofit Solutions – Customized energy-saving upgrades for existing buildings to reduce emissions and boost efficiency.

Our Vision & Values
At TICA, our mission is to empower businesses and enhance quality of life by redefining how the world connects through clean air and sustainable energy. Guided by our Sustainability Strategic Framework, we are boldly committed to fostering a better life and limiting global temperature rise to 1.5℃

Business Contact: global@tica.com
Service Support: overseas.aftersales@tica.com

Name: ThermalWorks
Description: ThermalWorks waterless cooling is transforming the data center landscape with modular systems built to handle high-density loads and high ambient temperatures while dramatically reducing energy usage and eliminating water consumption in any climate. ThermalWorks consistently outperforms competing air- and water-cooled solutions and is future proof, with mix and match modularity and plug and play integration of emerging liquid cooling technologies. The innovative design is enabling a new generation of on-demand, sustainable infrastructure to meet the growing needs of the world’s digital economy.

Name: Duracool Airconditioning
Description:
Duracool Airconditioning intends to serve and achieve goals with technological superiority and provide top performance, application versatility and reliability. Our corporate values are the foundation upon which our company is built.  These values are timeless and transcend all service lines, business and household environments. Name: Smardt Chiller Group
Description:
Smardt is both the pioneer and world leader in manufacturing high efficiency, oil-free chillers.  Smardt has the largest installed base of oil-free chillers in the world, with more than 10000 chillers installed globally.  These high-efficiency chillers typically can save building owners 50% of their annual operating costs compared with standard lubricated screw machines through the reduction in power consumption and maintenance.

Smardt manufactures its innovative and highly efficient range of chillers in Montreal Canada, Plattsburgh USA, Melbourne Australia, Stuttgart Germany, and Guangzhou China. Smardt was the first manufacturer to commercially produce high-efficiency oil-free chillers utilising magnetic bearing centrifugal compressors and today has the largest range of such chillers with water-cooled chillers from 60 TR through 3200 TR, air-cooled chillers 60 TR through 450 TR, and evaporatively cooled chillers from 60 TR through 400 TR.

Smardt's goal is to provide energy efficient cooling solutions for the built environment, reducing the energy consumption of HVAC globally and helping to preserve the world for future generations.

Name: Rime Group
Description: Rime is a dynamic and innovative company that specializes in providing cutting-edge refrigeration solutions for commercial and industrial applications. With a relentless commitment to excellence and a passion for innovation, we have emerged as a leading player in the industry. Our expertise spans over two decades, and our unwavering focus on quality and customer satisfaction has earned us a strong reputation in the market.

Name: Rhoss
Description:
Rhoss is a company specialized in the design and production of air conditioning and air handling products and systems. For more than 50 years, Rhoss has been a guarantee for innovation, quality and top level service. This is what makes us an ideal partner for HVAC systems specialists. 
RHOSS’s growth and development is an evolution that combines investments and projects in order to make the company a point of reference also in international markets. 
Our renewal has followed market developments and customer needs, in particular offering highly efficient products and systems that are in line with the requirements of the most modern Green Buildings.

Name: Oxygen8
Description:
Ox·y·gen·ate your space.

We help create healthy spaces for people to live, work, and play in an energy-efficient way.

Oxygen8 is a clean energy technology company based in Vancouver, BC who is working to transform the way buildings breathe. Our ventilation solutions deliver healthy, fresh, and comfortable air to offices, schools, and commercial spaces — all while maximizing energy efficiency.

Name: SYCLEF
Description:
Welcome to the official page of Groupe SYCLEF!

Groupe SYCLEF specializes in medium to large-scale refrigeration systems for commercial refrigeration (supermarkets, convenience stores), industrial refrigeration (logistics platforms, storage warehouses, agri-food), and air conditioning solutions.

 Present in France and internationally, SYCLEF includes:
 59 operational companies
 118 locations
 Over 2,650 committed employees

Our areas of expertise:
 Industrial refrigeration
 Commercial refrigeration
 HVAC (Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning)

We support our clients with their energy and environmental challenges by offering innovative, sustainable, and tailored solutions:
• Reducing energy consumption
• Using eco-friendly technologies
• Complying with regulatory changes (refrigerants)

 Our values: Service culture, Proximity, Technical excellence, Innovation, and Environmental responsibility

 Interested in joining a growing group and a future-oriented industry?
Discover all our job opportunities on our careers website:
 https://carrieres.syclef.fr/

Name: ADEY
Description:
ADEY is working towards a future where every heating and cooling system is protected from corrosion; saving money, energy and time across the globe. 

We’ve made it our mission to eliminate the headache of system breakdowns for everyone and our approach is being adopted by installers and heating engineers around the world. 

At the forefront of pioneering technology to protect and maintain systems of all shapes and sizes, we provide innovative products and solutions for all types of commercial and domestic buildings in the UK, France, the DACH region, Norway, North America, Canada and China – and we are still growing. 

ADEY’s industry leading approach to system maintenance best practice is supported by a comprehensive range of magnetic filters and water treatment chemicals, UKAS accredited laboratory and water testing services. Our best-selling range of MagnaClean filters have been installed in more than four million UK homes alone. 

We are multi-award winning, including three prestigious Queen’s Awards for Enterprise in Innovation and numerous industry accolades. 

To find out more visit www.adey.com or follow us on Instagram, YouTube and LinkedIn.

Name: Zehnder Group International AG
Description:
In over 70 countries we provide tailored services from planning to installation of excellent solutions for the best indoor climate since 1895.

Our mission is to provide a healthy indoor climate with top quality solutions. 
Living spaces are kept at a comfortable temperature by our radiators and heating & cooling ceilings whereas our ventilation solutions make sure that you can breathe fresh clean air 24/7.

Name: Al Qoze Electromechanical
Description: Al Qoze Electromechanical, AQE, was established in 2003 with 40 years of experience in the United Arab Emirates. AQE is now a leading HVAC turnkey contractor for residential and commercial developments such all over the United Arab Emirates.

Name: Madison Air
Description: As one of the world’s largest privately held companies, Madison Air exists to help our customers realize the often invisible, but very real return better air has for us all.  We believe better air is a transformational force for good and we are on a mission to unleash it.  Our unique business model leverages the air expertise of our 8,500 passionate entrepreneurs who do air better than anyone; an ingenious collection of entrepreneurial businesses with iconic brands; winning innovation and superior customer experience that make businesses, communities, and the world safer, healthier and more productive.

Name: Smardt Chiller Group
Description:
Smardt is both the pioneer and world leader in manufacturing high efficiency, oil-free chillers.  Smardt has the largest installed base of oil-free chillers in the world, with more than 10000 chillers installed globally.  These high-efficiency chillers typically can save building owners 50% of their annual operating costs compared with standard lubricated screw machines through the reduction in power consumption and maintenance.

Smardt manufactures its innovative and highly efficient range of chillers in Montreal Canada, Plattsburgh USA, Melbourne Australia, Stuttgart Germany, and Guangzhou China. Smardt was the first manufacturer to commercially produce high-efficiency oil-free chillers utilising magnetic bearing centrifugal compressors and today has the largest range of such chillers with water-cooled chillers from 60 TR through 3200 TR, air-cooled chillers 60 TR through 450 TR, and evaporatively cooled chillers from 60 TR through 400 TR.

Smardt's goal is to provide energy efficient cooling solutions for the built environment, reducing the energy consumption of HVAC globally and helping to preserve the world for future generations.

Name: CoolAutomation
Description:
CoolAutomation is a global leader in smart solutions for HVAC systems, specializing in VRF, split systems, and heat pumps. With over 10,000 customers in more than 100 countries, our innovative products enable seamless HVAC integration as well as remote management, service, diagnostics, and universal system control.

Founded in 2009, CoolAutomation has become the go-to choice for HVAC service companies, home and building automation integrators, building management experts, and facility managers looking to save energy, enhance service, and reduce costs for both residential and commercial sites.

Name: Space Engineering Services Ltd
Description:
Space Engineering Services is the UK’s leading provider of refrigeration, heating, ventilation and air conditioning services.

We are an established name with a trusted reputation for delivering outstanding service and support amongst many of the country’s largest organisations across the retail, commercial, industrial, food service, and public sectors. 

We’re proud to offer customers a complete refrigeration and building services package, from design and manufacturing, to project management and installation, and fully comprehensive service and maintenance. 

We have unrivalled technical expertise and extensive capability of delivering cutting-edge, advanced technology, and energy-efficient solutions. Our knowledge and commitment extends to Europe where our local delivery teams specialise in turnkey retail refrigeration packages.

Our customers are our top priority, and it’s our core values to understand, innovate, and deliver that really gives us the drive and ambition to succeed. We’re passionate about providing the very best customer experience, whilst consistently driving innovation with our fresh approach to refrigeration.  

Find out more at www.space-engineering.co.uk

Name: Safario Group
Description:
Safario Group of Companies LLC, your premier partner for HVAC solutions in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. With a legacy of excellence spanning years, we specialize in providing top-of-the-line heating, ventilation and air conditioning services to residential, commercial, and industrial clients. 
Whether you require installation, maintenance, repair or upgrade services, Safario Group has you covered. 

Your Satisfaction is our top priority 

Our Group Companies :

Safario Trading Co. LLC
Safario A/C Maintenance LLC.
Safario Cooling Factory LLC.
Safario Industries LLC.

Trading division, handles distribution of Sapphire brand Air conditioners,Water chillers, Water coolers, Swimming Pools Heat pumps and all other HVAC products. The group offers market expertise, solution and services in HVAC field. Leading international air conditioner brands such as Carrier, Midea, O General, York, Sapphire are the Other Brands dealt with . The group is led by a visionary management team and competent industry professionals.

Group’s manufacturing division, Safario Cooling Factory LLC, is a leading manufacturer of Condenser and Evaporator coils, Heat exchangers,Dry Coolers, Industrial chillers and Cooling towers.We follow some of the Best Manufacturing Practices to ensure that our Products meets International standards.
Safario A/C Maintenance LLC, provides  after sales services to most of the major leading organizations in the UAE. This division  also provides  Annual maintenance contract for maintenance of Centrifugal Chillers, Chilled water FCUs, FAHUs,AHUs, Split and window air conditioners. This division  also specializing in compressor overhauling.

Sheet metal Fabrication Division ,  The One stop destination for all your custom Built CNC Precision sheet metal Fabrication and Product Integration facility for Low and High Volume Production. Industry Catered  Furnishing & Interior, Oil & Gas  , Marine & Construction,Storage/Display  , Electrical & Electronics .

Name: Quilt
Description:
Quilt creates home climate systems designed to move humanity off fossil fuels. As the smartest way to heat and cool your home, Quilt blends seamlessly into any home environment, offering intuitive room-by-room control, occupancy awareness for unmatched energy efficiency, and predictive technology. 

Learn more and reserve yours at Quilt.com

Name: BINDER GmbH
Description:
BINDER - Best conditions for your success 

At BINDER, we create best conditions for your success with climate chambers and incubators engineered and manufactured in Germany and trusted by scientific and industrial laboratories around the world.

Our mission is to make a meaningful technical contribution to human health and safety while protecting the environment. That’s why sustainability, accuracy and long-term value are central to every product we create - so you can focus fully on what drives you: research and development that shapes our future.

Every BINDER climate chamber is equipped with top-of-the-range technology made in Germany and makes it possible to precisely simulate biological, chemical, and physical environmental conditions. The wide range of products from the leading specialist addresses the various requirements in science and industry. It comprises temperature and climate chamber models, material testing and drying chambers, as well as environmental simulation chambers.

Name: ifi S.p.A.
Description:
ifi is reference brand in the design of technology and furniture for public premises. 

A story of innovation, born in the Sixties from the intuition of translating the world of bar furnishings into industrial terms. Since then, ifi develops and invests its experience in refrigeration by introducing innovative solutions for the coffee, confectionery and gelato sectors.

In 2014, ifi has been awarded the Compasso d’Oro Award with the gelato display case Bellevue with Panorama technology (design Marc Sadler), the ideal synthesis between the best gelato preservation –in pozzetti counters- and the emotion of seeing gelato in traditional display cases. 

Today, ifi is an Italian company where technological innovation, design, research, food science and industrial culture merge and grow along with an entrepreneurial spirit: all ingredients for the translation into projects of values like the improvement of preservation, visibility of the displayed products, functionality, and hygiene, with a specific attention to the professionals and resources wellbeing.

Name: Insight Partners
Description:
Insight Partners: Revolutionizing the HVAC Industry with World-Class Solutions

At Insight Partners, we are innovators, pioneers, and problem-solvers in the commercial HVAC industry. Our passion for excellence drives us to offer a comprehensive range of top-notch products, including new equipment, parts, controls, and services that cater to your needs.

Let's Bring Your Vision to Life: Your next commercial HVAC project deserves nothing but the best, and that's precisely what we offer. With an unwavering commitment to excellence, Insight Partners is here to support and turn your vision into reality. Visit us at www.InsightUSA.com, and let's embark on this remarkable journey together!

Where We Serve: With multiple offices throughout North Carolina, South Carolina, and Georgia, Insight Partners is your local partner, with national resources ready to deliver outstanding solutions to your project.

Discover Our Recon Group: Our Recon group is on a mission to breathe new life into aging cooling towers in the beautiful Carolinas. With unparalleled expertise and state-of-the-art techniques, they work tirelessly to rebuild and revitalize these towers, ensuring they perform at their peak again.

Uniting for Success: Our core value, "Working Together, We're Stronger," defines who we are. Collaboration fuels growth, so we invest heavily in educating the HVAC community. Our innovative Insight Service Academy was born from a need for intensive in-person HVAC training in the service community. 

Embracing the Digital Age: We leverage online social media platforms to provide innovative, industry-leading learning experiences. Explore the HVAC world on our YouTube channel, “HVAC-TV.”

Tune into The Engineers' HVAC Podcast: Join us on a journey of knowledge and insights as we host the country's only HVAC podcast designed exclusively for HVAC Engineers. "The Engineers HVAC Podcast" is available on all major podcast platforms.

Name: BOHN : REFRIGERACION
Description: Fabricante de equipos de Refrigeración Comercial e Industrial, líder en México.El conocimiento del mercado de Frigus, aunado a línea de Bohn y su tecnología de punta (Heatcraft), convierte a Frigus Bohn en la compañía de refrigeración mas importante e innovadora de México. Desde su nacimiento, ha sido la compañía con la línea de refrigeración y serpentines mas completa de México.

Name: BVN - Electrical Motors & Ventilation Fans
Description:
Established in 1990, BVN has carved out a formidable presence in the European HVAC market as a premier manufacturer of a wide range of high-quality products. These include external rotor motors, a diverse variety of ventilation fans, smoke exhaust fans, jet fans, and cooling fans, among others.

BVN's sterling reputation is not confined to the domestic market alone but has permeated 92 countries across the globe. This acclaim has been largely attributed to the superior quality of BVN's product line and their unwavering commitment to offering excellent customer service.

With millions of fans of varying scales produced since its inception, BVN has built robust partnerships with thousands of institutions from over 87 countries in an array of application domains. Furthermore, BVN prides itself on its self-sufficient and integrated approach. All design, production, and research & development activities are performed in-house, underlining BVN's commitment to quality and innovation.

In conclusion, BVN is not only a dominant player in the European HVAC industry but also a trusted name in global markets, vouched for its top-tier products and services. Their success story is the result of an unwavering focus on quality, customer satisfaction, and continuous innovation, demonstrated through their comprehensive product range and global outreach.

Name: Zero Zone
Description:
Established in 1961, Zero Zone is a leading manufacturer of refrigerated display cases and commercial refrigeration systems for supermarkets, drug, dollar, and convenience stores. With display case plants in North Prairie and Waukesha, WI and refrigeration systems plants in Ramsey, MN, and Dyersville, IA, Zero Zone also manufactures industrial refrigeration systems for cold storage, food processing, and ice arenas.

Check out Zero Zone career opportunities at: http://www.zero-zone.com/careers/

Name: Exentec Hargreaves
Description: Exyte Hargreaves is an industry leader in designing and installing full turnkey Mechanical & Electrical systems across growing markets with a focus on high integrity projects in highly regulated sectors. Our self-manufacturing capabilities are enhanced with sophisticated Offsite Assembly, Offsite Manufacturing and Digital Engineering Expertise which provide significant competitive advantage in driving client value. We operate a lean business model, focused on driving client value through a combination of direct & industrialised delivery underpinned by our aligned global partners.

Name: Systemair Middle East
Description:
Systemair is a leading ventilation company operating in 51 countries in Europe, North America, the Middle East, Asia, Australia and Africa. The Company had sales of SEK 12.3 billion in the 2023/24 financial year and employs approximately 6,700 people today. Systemair has reported an operating profit every year since 1974, when the Company was founded. Over the past 10 years, growth has averaged 9.0 per cent. Systemair helps to improve the indoor climate via energy-efficient and sustainable products that reduce carbon dioxide emissions.

Systemair has well-established operations in growth markets. The Group's products are marketed under the Systemair, Frico, Fantech and Menerga brands. Systemair shares have been quotedon the Nasdaq OMX Nordic Exchange in Stockholm since October 2007 and are tradedon the Large Cap List today. The Group comprises about 90 companies.

Our motto “The straight way”, has now extendedfrom a product concept to a business philosophy.

Our range has grown substantially to span a wide range of energy-efficient fans, air handling units,air distribution products, air conditioning, air curtains and heating products. Our products are robust and easy to choose, install and use. Operating from the values of simplicity and reliability, our business concept is to develop, manufacture and market high-quality ventilation products. Based on our business concept and with our customers in focus, we aim to be your most efficient and helpful partner in mastering your indoor air quality challenges.

Name: Qualityair Engenharia
Description:
A Qualityair Engenharia teve sua origem na década de 90, tendo como atividade principal o desenvolvimento e execução de projetos HVAC, bem como a manutenção preventiva e corretiva em sistemas de ar-condicionado nos segmentos comercial e industrial.

Devido ao grande número de solicitações, por parte de seus clientes, a partir de janeiro de 2000, a Qualityair Engenharia passou a oferecer  o  serviço de manutenção em instalações prediais, abrangendo as áreas de Ar-condicionado, Elétrica, Hidráulica e Civil.

Hoje conta com 180 colaboradores devidamente capacitados, em diversas especialidades técnicas e administrativas, para oferecer aos clientes as melhores soluções em engenharia e serviços. Conta ainda com modernos ferramentais e equipamentos de ponta para atender a todas as normas técnicas da ABNT e de segurança.

Graças à qualidade empregada na execução destes serviços e notório diferencial no atendimento aos seus clientes, a Qualityair Engenharia conquistou uma consolidada carteira predial, hoje administrada por um setor específico de seu organograma denominada Gerência de Contratos.

Name: KNS Air Systems Private Limited
Description: At KNS Air Systems, we understand it to a T, while envisioning new-age HVAC solutions for every business need, KNS Air systems has been progressively working towards creating solutions for enabling a rejuvenated lifestyle. We constantly update and upgrade and upgrade our knowledge, facilities, and services and keep with our mission.

Name: Area Cooling Solutions

We are ready for the next challenge!

With offices in Barcelona and Warsaw, our team provides agile service and expert guidance across Europe. Flexibility, fast delivery, and deep technical knowledge continue to be the pillars of our growth and customer satisfaction.

Follow us on @AreaCoolingS

Name: AirZone ApS
Description:
KVALITETEN FØRST OG FREMMEST – vores motto udledes af passion og forståelse af menneskelige behov.

OM AIRZONE:
AirZone er en dansk virksomhed, stiftet i 2018 i Ikast, der leverer ventilations-, klima- og kølesystemer af høj kvalitet til ventilationsentreprenører, VVS-, el- og installationsfirmaer.
Produktionen foregår i Gdynia, Polen – et område med stolte traditioner inden for HVACR-produktion (opvarmning, ventilation, aircondition og køling). Her udvikles og produceres løsninger i topklasse med fokus på innovation og præcision.

VORES TILGANG:
AirZone sætter kvalitet og kundetilfredshed i centrum. Vi tilbyder fleksible og skræddersyede løsninger baseret på moderne designværktøjer (Air Designer KAD) og solid ingeniørfaglighed. Hver løsning tilpasses kundens behov og udføres med sans for detaljer og funktionalitet.

VORES SORTIMENT:
Vi tilbyder et bredt udvalg af anlæg og systemer til både små og store projekter – fra kontorer og hoteller til offentlige og industrielle bygninger.

Sortimentet omfatter:
• Ventilations- og klimaanlæg
• Kompakte enheder
• Varme- og kølesystemer
• Varmepumper

Name: Smart Effects Ltd Malta
Description:
Welcome to Smart Effects … one of the most affordable and best in quality Mechanical and Electrical Services Company.

Our main aim is to supply our customers with the best possible service, and products, ensuring that your experience with us is easy and hassle free from start to finish. As Smart Effects, to succeed, we have to give our customers exceptional service with unbelievable prices to be better than our competitors.

Name: Indoor Air Quality Mechanical Services Bahamas Ltd
Description: HVAC and Mechanical firm based in The Bahamas

Name: FLUID CONTROL TECHNOLOGIES (PTY) LTD
Description:
At Fluid Control Technologies (Pty) Ltd, we’re driven by a belief in quality materials and genuine passion for every project we undertake. That’s why we’ve cultivated long-standing relationships with key international players in the industry—partners who share our commitment to excellence.

As the old South African saying goes, “goedkoop is duurkoop”—you get what you pay for. With that in mind, we’ve focused on sourcing only the highest quality products, made accessible at competitive prices thanks to the trusted partnerships we've built over the years.

With more than 28 years of experience in centrifugal and positive displacement pump technology—gained through leading roles in major corporate pump companies—it was a natural step for us to align with global manufacturers offering exceptional products that were not yet available in South Africa or the broader African market.

Today, we proudly represent select premium international brands across a wide range of pump technologies, from industrial HVAC solutions to certified sanitary food-grade systems. Through our partnerships with top-tier European manufacturers, Fluid Control Technologies brings world-class craftsmanship to our clients—without compromising on value.

Name: CRC
Description:
CRC is the leading innovator of safe energy efficient critical environment solutions. With intuitive user interface devices, open logic controllers, and closed loop technology we verify that every CRC system is actually delivering what it supposed to.

Critical Room Control's products are designed to deliver a safe, efficient and better user experience than traditional systems. We offer products ranging from standalone user interfaces to complete turnkey system wide solutions. We have organized our products into user interface devices, system controllers, air delivery and peripheral sensors/devices.

Our mission is to develop new products, incorporating the latest technologies to create a safe and efficient working environment. Our products improve the health, safety and efficiency of facilities worldwide.

The company's core services include supplying HVAC accessories and delivering products to meet customer needs efficiently.

Name: ClimaCom
Description:
Climacom е официален представител за България на Mitsubishi Electric Living Environment Systems.

Вече повече от 20 години фирма Climacom предлага на пазара най-високите технологии в областта на климатичната, отоплителната и вентилационната техника с марка Mitsubishi Electric както за дома, така и за мащабни обекти.

Продуктите на Mitsubishi Electric са резултат от продължителни изследвания и разработки, така че да предлагат гъвкавост при дизайна и перфектен климат в сгради с различни приложения.

Продуктовото портфолио включва климатици за дома, професионална климатизация Mr. Slim, климатични системи City Multi за мащабни проекти, термопомпени системи ECODAN.

Mitsubishi Electric LES означава обединени експертни познания за съвместен успех: Ние изслушваме и разбираме. Разработваме интелигентни продукти. Представяме компетентни консултантски услуги. Разпознаваме тенденциите. Оформяме бъдещето. Превръщаме знанията в решения.



**********************************************************

Climacom is the official representative for Bulgaria of Mitsubishi Electric Living Environment Systems.

For more than 20 years, Climacom has marketed the highest technology in the field of air conditioning, heating and ventilation equipment with the Mitsubishi Electric brand for both home and large-scale projects.

Mitsubishi Electric products are the result of continuous research and development to offer design flexibility and a perfect climate in buildings with different applications.

The product portfolio includes home air conditioners, professional air conditioning Mr. Slim, City Multi air-conditioning systems for large-scale projects, ECODAN heat pump systems.

Name: Ecotip d.o.o. - Air & Liquid filtration
Description:
Ecotip d.o.o. is a Slovene company based in Slovenske Konjice, founded in 1993. Throughout the years, we had a steady growth in the number of employees, the number of customers and suppliers. Now we have more than 90 employees. Our products are sold in 24 countries of the world, while in Slovenia we have the largest market share.

Our main activity is the production of ECOFIL filters. Filters are manufactured in accordance with EN779: 2012 standard and ISO 16890: 2016 and are used in a variety of conditions for various uses, namely:
- Heating Ventilation and Air Conditioning (HVAC)
- Industrial Filtration
- Filtration of liquids

Ecotip d.o.o.’s main objective is to achieve a top position and remain a top domestic and international filter producer through quality, performance and client loyalty, efficiency and profitability. Our mission is a clean environment for healthier life of all people and our descendants.

This policy is based on the continuous implementation, maintenance and development of the integrated quality, environment, occupational health and safety management system, according to the requirements of ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and OHSAS 18001:2007, which will help us achieve our goals.

Name: ZULuft Austria - Zukunft Luft Austria
Description:
ZULuft Austria versteht sich als Forum für die österreichische Lüftungsbranche, um auf wissenschaftlicher, politischer und wirtschaftlicher Ebene für ein höheres Bewusstsein für die Zukunft der Raumluft im öffentlichen Diskurs zu sorgen.

Ziele sind unter anderem die Bewusstseinsbildung sowie eine gesetzliche Grundlage für gesunde Raumluft im Innenraum zu schaffen. Energieeffizienz und Gesundheitsförderung und -erhaltung stehen dabei im Mittelpunkt.

 Comfort at sea

Name: Camflo Heating & Cooling, LLC

Since our founding in 2009, Camflo Heating & Cooling has worked hard to help local homeowners and businesses find the best solutions for their heating, cooling, and indoor air quality needs.

Each member of our Camflo Heating & Cooling team strives to extend comfort and peace of mind through every interaction with you, our customer. Your satisfaction and comfort continually remain at the top of our customer priorities.

Name: AirWise Engineering
Description:
Our vision is to ensure energy saving designs and consult our clients with sustainable ways in which we can reduce the carbon footprint and help our planet fight with climate change crisis.

Our vast product line includes: residential evaporator coils (both copper & aluminum), hydronic coils, air handlers, our designed and patented all in one plenum coil, commercial coils (6 to 20 tons), mobile home coils & down flow electric furnace for mobile homes, multi-family HVAC products (fan coils & furred down air handlers).  We also manufacture Condensing units (13 & 14 SEER) and gas furnaces (up to 95% AFUE) under our sister company, Texas Furnace Company, also located in  Houston, TX.

Name: Portable AC & Spot Cooler Sales | Portable Climate Equipment
Description:
Who is Climate Control Solutions? 
Climate Control Solutions is a family owned and operated business that specializes in the sale of portable air conditioners, spot coolers, portable combination heat/cooling units known as heat pumps, dehumidifiers, HEPA Carts, indirect/direct fired heaters and HEPA air filtration units.  Climate Control Solutions can also supply mobile cooling units, portable electric heaters, and portable dehumidifiers.  These portable products are mostly used in areas including permanent or temporary climate solutions in offices, hospitals, server rooms, schools, warehouses and entertainment venues. Equipment can be shipped throughout North America. 

Our Story:
CCS Equipment Sales, Inc. (Climate Control Solutions) was established in 2023 by Austin McCourt and Aidan McCourt after they saw a need in the marketplace for a high-quality online climate control and HVAC portable products and accessory provider.  Austin McCourt has over 30 years in the climate control and HVAC portable equipment industry.  Austin was the founder of Portable Rentals Solutions, Inc. and Airrex USA.  Aidan McCourt is a recent graduate of Texas A&M University with a BBS degree in Communications and Business.  Aidan has been instrumental in helping the company to better utilize today’s technology to grow sales, create solutions, develop product innovation and manage inventory.

Our Vision:
We are assembling a team of young entrepreneurs that bring a unique set of talents and skills to work every day to support our customers with a customer centric approach before, during and after the sale.  We will continue to develop skills in the industry and within the company.  We are Innovative. We are proactive. We are hard working. We are Climate Control Solutions.

Climate Control Solutions is available 24 hours a day/7 days a week/ 365 days a year.  Toll Free 800-633-8711

Climate Control Solutions is your one source solution for portable climate equipment and accessories!

Name: Blender Products, Inc.
Description:
Blender Products, Inc. | Optimizing Airflow for Efficient HVAC Performance
At Blender Products, Inc., we engineer high-performance airflow mixing solutions designed to improve HVAC system efficiency, indoor air quality, and energy savings in commercial and institutional facilities. For over [X] years, we have been a trusted partner for MEP engineers, facility owners, and operators across critical industries, including healthcare, hospitals, universities, sports arenas, schools, airports, government buildings, and data centers.

Innovative Solutions for Precise Airflow Mixing
Our flagship Channel Blender technology enhances air handling unit performance, ensuring consistent temperature distribution and uniform mixing of outside air and return air. This results in:
•	Elimination of stratification for improved occupant comfort
•	Energy savings by reducing reheat and overcooling
•	Compliance with ASHRAE standards for ventilation and air quality
•	Enhanced HVAC efficiency in mission-critical environments

Your Partner in HVAC System Optimization
We collaborate closely with mechanical engineers, facility managers, and MEP design teams to provide custom airflow solutions that meet the specific needs of each project. Our solutions are trusted in new construction, retrofit applications, and energy efficiency upgrades across a wide range of industries.
Connect With Us
Join the conversation! Follow us for insights on HVAC best practices, case studies, energy efficiency strategies, and expert guidance on airflow mixing and distribution. Let’s work together to optimize your facility’s HVAC performance.

Name: Misa Cold Rooms
Description:
MISA è sinonimo di eccellenza e punto di riferimento nella progettazione e produzione di celle frigorifere modulari, concepite per garantire la perfetta conservazione e sicurezza degli alimenti, all’insegna della sostenibilità. La Società risponde alle esigenze di hotel, ristoranti, catering e del settore Retail con soluzioni custom, mentre per il settore industriale, in particolare del Food Processing e Cold Storage, propone da oltre 40 anni, progetti chiavi in mano, combinando flessibilità, efficienza, qualità e innovazione. Punto di forza di MISA è l’integrazione tra tecnologia e un know-how senza eguali: con sede a Pomezia, opera con un organico di 130 dipendenti, producendo annualmente oltre 70.000 pannelli isotermici, ad alto risparmio energetico per circa 3.500 celle frigorifere componibili facili da montare. Dal 2024, MISA è parte di un grande Gruppo internazionale, Purever Industries, leader europeo in soluzioni innovative di isolamento. Una sinergia che favorisce un accesso a competenze ed expertise uniche, al servizio dello sviluppo prodotti e dell’espansione verso nuovi mercati. 

MISA is synonymous with excellence and a benchmark in the design and production of modular cold rooms, ensuring perfect food preservation and safety with a focus on sustainability. The company meets the needs of hotels, restaurants, catering services, and Retail sector with customized solutions.  For the industrial sector, particularly Food Processing and Cold Storage, it has been offering turnkey projects for over 40 years, combining flexibility, efficiency, quality, and innovation. Misa's strength lies in the integration of advanced technology with unmatched expertise. Based in Pomezia, the company operates with a team of 130 employees, producing over 70,000 energy-efficient isothermal panels annually for approximately 3,500 easy to assemble modular cold rooms. Since 2024, MISA is part of Purever Industries, a leading European group in innovative insulation solutions.

Name: C.I. Group Public Company Limited (CIG)
Description:
Welcome to CIG

C.I. Group PCL is a world-class manufacturer of coils to international standards and a major supplier of coils to leading air conditioner and refrigeration companies in the United States. Founded in Thailand in 1983, CIG is a publicly traded company that employs more than 1,000 staff in three factories in Thailand. 

We received accreditations from ISO 9001:2008, Underwriters Laboratories (UL) and Air-Conditioning Heating and Refrigeration Institute ("AHRI"). In addition we have been awarded numerous quality awards.

CIG adopted a high level of factory automation when we began and we continuously import more advanced automated machinery to support our production. We make virtually every type of tube and fin coil and heat exchanger,  from water coils, condenser coils and evaporator coils, for both air conditioning and refrigeration, whether for residential OEM air conditioners or one-off made-to-fit and custom coils. We make truck and bus air conditioning coils and industrial coils. 

CIG makes coils. Any kind, any size, we can do it.

Mission

Our mission is to be the leading producer of international-standard coils in Asia and to be the preferred supplier of HVAC/R engineers around the world.

Name: TROX Auranor AS
Description:
TROX Auranor AS er lokalisert på Jaren i Gran kommune i Innlandet, og er en førende produsent og leverandør av luftfordelingsutstyr.

Virksomheten ble etablert og startet med produksjon av brannspjeld i 1974, I 2021 flyttet virksomheten inn i ny og moderne 13 200 m² fabrikk i Mohagen på Jaren. I disse lokalene utføres både forskning, utvikling, produksjon og salg under ett og samme tak.

Selskapet har siden starten utviklet seg fra å være en nisjeleverandør av enkeltprodukter, til å bli markedsleder i Norden på luftfordelingsutstyr og styresystemer.

I dag dekker produktspekteret området for komfortventilasjon for det profesjonelle markedet innen næringsbygg, undervisningsbygg, hoteller, industribygg og leilighetsbygg. TROX Auranor er i tillegg en svært viktig leverandør av diverse renromsprodukter til helsevesenet, hvor kravene til kvalitet, support og service er skjerpet.

Auranor ble kjøpt opp av TROX konsernet i 2005 og fremstår i dag som en moderne og avansert bedrift. Produksjonen er basert på en sterkt utviklet LEAN-filosofi, og de fremste konkurransefortrinnene er produksjonsflyt, gjennomløpstid, leveringseffektivitet og kvalitet. Bedriften er fortsatt i sterk utvikling.

Bedriften har 190 ansatte og omsatte for ca. 495 mill. i 2024. Fabrikk og hovedkontor er på Jaren, med salgskontorer i Trondheim, Stavanger, Bergen, Larvik, Västerås, Malmø og Borås.

Description:

What was required was an indigenous product that could overcome these challenges- one that could fit in seamlessly with the incoming EV wave. That’s when Vaara was conceptualized— a sustainable refrigeration system that restores reliance in quality and provides an energy efficient solution. We have designed solutions for the 2 wheeler and 3 wheeler for delivering everything that needs temperature control to retain its quality. 
Cakes, dairy, meat, fruits, vegetables, beverages can now be delivered to your doorstep with the freshness that its makers produced it, using Vaara solutions. Consumers can track how their orders were transported under optimum conditions with our IOT technology. Vaara is changing the future of deliveries.

Description:
The Thermozoff story is a tale woven within the fabric of the Esre Group's legacy, proudly affiliating with the premier stove manufacturer in Turkey and Europe. Our headquarters in Bursa, Turkey, spanning a vast 20,000 square meters, serves as the epicenter of our operations, where we ardently champion the pursuit of excellence.

Quality is the cornerstone of our ethos, permeating every facet of our work. With a dedicated workforce exceeding 300 skilled professionals, we infuse our products with meticulous craftsmanship. The inception of each creation occurs within our in-house foundry, leveraging cutting-edge technology like laser cutting and robot welding for unparalleled precision.

Our relentless quest for innovation is fortified by substantial investments in Research and Development, enriched by advanced design and testing facilities. We're not just crafting heating solutions; we're shaping the future. This dedication has culminated in a powerful partnership between Thermozoff and renowned entities, propelling us into new dimensions of global outreach and export prowess.

Mirroring this journey is the narrative of Hoşseven, a name synonymous with excellence since 1962. 

The parallel narratives of Thermozoff and Hoşseven epitomize meticulous craftsmanship, innovative technology, and a global vision. Across over 20 countries in Asia and Europe, our products resonate. Shared dedication to quality, timely delivery, competitive pricing, and post-sales service underscores our journey to prominence.

Together, Thermozoff and the timeless spirit of Hoşseven spearhead a journey marked by warmth, innovation, and shared values. As torchbearers in the heating sector, we stand united in shaping a greener, more sustainable world, where comfort and innovation coalesce to define a brighter tomorrow.

Name: TECHNIREF - TECHNIQUES DE REFRIGERATION
Description:
TECHNIREF – Le froid, c’est chaud.

Pas de blabla corporate, ici on parle vrai.

TECHNIREF, c’est une boîte qui fait du froid commercial et industriel. Mais pas juste pour faire joli. On conseille, on dimensionne, on installe, on dépanne. Et on le fait bien. Parce qu’on sait ce qu’on fait, tout simplement.

 Des techniciens qui savent bosser, un encadrement qui a de la bouteille, et surtout une équipe qui ne se cache pas derrière des process absurdes. Chez nous, on parle direct, on agit vite, et on ne laisse pas tomber un client.

 On est indépendants, mais pas en mode cow-boy solitaire. On fait partie d’un réseau d’environ 50 entreprises qui partagent leur savoir, anticipent les normes, et négocient intelligemment. Oui, on a compris que l’union fait la force.

 On rayonne sur la Vendée et les départements voisins (nord 17, 79, 49, sud 44), avec une réactivité qui cloue le bec aux standards téléphoniques. Et si le projet est cool, on n’a pas peur de prendre l’avion ou le bateau : Antilles, Afrique, on y est déjà allés avec de belles références 

 Besoin d’aide à 3h du matin ? Pas de panique. On assure du 24/7, parce que quand une chambre froide lâche, ça n’attend pas lundi matin.

Name: Conry Tech
Description:
Conry Tech is reinventing air conditioning to make comfort sustainable.
Conry Tech is a climate tech hardware manufacturer which has invented a revolutionary system that enables buildings to electrify, decarbonise, slash emissions, improve the comfort and health of its occupants, and which enables the clean energy transition.

Conry Tech believe that energy conservation and energy efficiency need to be the top priorities in making built environment more sustainable.
Air conditioning takes 60% of a buildings power, and yet AC systems are still basically the same as they’ve been for 100 years, and this must change if comfort is to become sustainable. 

This company is founded by Ron Conry, the award-winning inventor of the Turbocor compressor (the most significant technological breakthrough in the HVAC industry in over 40 years), and by Sam Ringwaldt, who has been at the forefront of sustainability and efficiency in the HVAC industry globally for over 20 years. The technologies invented and brought to market by Ron and Sam previously are now dominant globally, and have reduced HVAC systems power consumption by over 50%, radically changing the HVAC industry worldwide. However despite these achievements, they were previously constrained by how HVAC has been done for 100 years, and so this time they took a blank page and invented and patented an entirely new approach, and are bringing to this new technology to the market as Conry Tech.
 
Conry Tech is Headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.

Name: Enersion Inc.
Description:
Introducing Energy Cubed: a refrigerant-free reversible heat pump that produces green cooling and heating with 10X less electricity consumption in comparison to traditional heat pump. Backed by 15 global patents, Enersion's nano-technology based heat pump eliminates the refrigerants from the atmosphere, reduce reliance on the world's energy grids, and improve the efficiency of today's HVAC systems. 
 
 +  =  +  

What do we do? Our solution provides refrigerant-free heating & cooling to commercial & industrial sites using a fraction of the energy of traditional HVAC systems.  

How does it work? The expensive & energy-intensive part of HVAC systems is the compressor + refrigerants. We have developed and patented a heat pump that utilises nano-porous material to convert waste heat directly into cooling and heating, without the need for electrically-driven compressors or synthetic refrigerants-- regulating building temperature at a fraction of cost effective without harming the environment. 

We wanted to make this tech as easy to adopt as possible, so we've also figured out how to integrate our heat pump with on-site power generation systems, photovoltaic-thermal panels and natural gas/biogas cogeneration units to capture the wasted heat during power generation. When paired with hybrid solar panels or steam condensate, we can help our customers reduce their reliance on grid energy and build resiliency in their energy systems. And for facilities leaders, we hope this makes the implementation process a lot less complicated. 

What about results? Our integrated tri-generation system provides electricity, green cooling in the summer, and domestic heating in the winter. Want to try it for yourself? Get in touch at info@enersion.com!

Name: Jaga UK
Description:
Ensuring a better indoor climate without damaging the outdoor climate. That’s our main goal as Jaga Climate Designers.

We are pioneers in designing innovative, ecologically sustainable heating, cooling and ventilation systems using less energy and fewer raw materials.

Our award-winning, energy efficient products are developed by Jaga NV in Belgium, where, since 1962, the company has been surprising the heating market with new aesthetic and technical concepts.

OUR PRODUCTS

The Jaga “convector” has never been an ordinary radiator. The ultra-light heat exchangers of our first products have evolved to become lightweight, responsive and high-performance complete climate systems for heating, cooling and ventilation.

Our products consume less energy to produce higher outputs and are designed for the most environmentally friendly technologies, such as heat pumps and solar energy. They are also lighter and smaller than other emitters or floor heating systems, using less raw materials in manufacture.

Furthermore, Jaga products last longer, have a 30-year guarantee, and are fully recyclable at the end of their life. Compared to other systems, Jaga radiators score remarkably better in life cycle analysis (LCA) which measures the environmental impact of products.

OUR PROJECTS

In the UK, Jaga works alongside some of the country’s best architects, specifiers and designers. Our products can be found everywhere from ground-breaking commercial buildings such as the PWC headquarters in London, to schools, universities, public buildings, retirement villages, and healthcare premises, as well as eco-minded, high-end, residential developments. 

OUR CULTURE

Our culture is built around five core values, grown from a major concern about sustainability, creativity and social responsibility: Respect Nature, Awake The Artist, Dream A Future, Create Emotion, Build Bridges. These values guide us on our sustainable path to the future.

Unsere Lösungen finden Anwendung in Rechenzentren, industriellen Prozessen und anspruchsvollen Arbeitsumgebungen weltweit.
Mit rund 856 Mitarbeitenden im Bereich Klimatechnik in Deutschland sowie 3.500 Mitarbeitenden weltweit gehört STULZ zu den führenden Unternehmen der Branche. Unser weltweites Umsatzvolumen von 850 Millionen Euro unterstreicht die Stärke und Innovationskraft unseres Unternehmens.
Unser Erfolg beruht auf einer Mischung aus jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung, technischem Know-how und der Leidenschaft für Fortschritt. Bei STULZ arbeiten wir kontinuierlich daran, neue Wege zu gehen, um die Effizienz zu steigern und die Umweltbelastung zu reduzieren. Dabei legen wir großen Wert auf maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, die perfekt auf die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden abgestimmt sind.
Mit einem internationalen Netzwerk in über 140 Ländern, insgesamt 10 Niederlassungen in Deutschland und zahlreichen Partnern stehen wir Ihnen jederzeit zur Seite – sei es mit einem umfassenden Serviceangebot oder durch persönliche Beratung vor Ort. Bei STULZ sind wir stolz darauf, nicht nur Produkte zu liefern, sondern komplette Systeme, die für Zuverlässigkeit und Energieeffizienz stehen.
Werden Sie Teil unseres internationalen Netzwerkes und profitieren Sie von den Vorteilen eines global agierenden Unternehmens. Bei STULZ finden Sie spannende Herausforderungen und die Möglichkeit, Ihre Karriere aktiv mitzugestalten.
Entdecken Sie die Möglichkeiten, die Ihnen STULZ bietet und werden Sie Teil unseres internationalen Teams. Wir freuen uns auf Sie.

Name: HRV
Description:
HRV was founded in 2003 by two Kiwi entrepreneurs, who were passionate about improving the state of NZ homes. They saw that ventilation could make a big difference to the damp, dripping homes that many New Zealanders lived in – and it all went from there.

We introduced the great benefits of home ventilation to kiwi homeowners, and our market-leading products quickly became recognised as the go-to for families wanting relief from damp, unhealthy homes, especially when health issues such as asthma and allergies were part of the problem.

Over the years we’ve developed our healthy thinking even further. We believe that with a country as pure as ours there’s no excuse for 1/3 of all kiwi homes to have a serious mould and damp issue. As for our drinking water, it’s far from wholesome either, with many unhealthy “added extras” like chlorine and heavy metals in the mix.

So, we’ve made it our mission to make all Kiwi homes healthier.

We must be doing something right as our HRV Ventilation solutions have been given a Sensitive Choice accreditation, and we work closely with Allergy NZ too, to help raise awareness and reduce the triggers for respiratory illnesses.

That fresh HRV thinking has paid off for many families around New Zealand, and we’re not stopping anytime soon.

Name: DRU Verwarming B.V.
Description:
Founded in 1754 DRU is now the European market leader for gas stoves. The story began in 1754, when a group of Dutch farmers discovered that their soil was rich in iron ore. They began extracting the metal and smelting it down to produce pewter.

This was then cast into pots, pans and other household items, and the company of Diepenbrock & Reigers of Ulft (DRU) was formed. The products rapidly developed to include solid fuel fires and cookers.

The company was one of the first in the world to produce natural gas fires, and has always been at the forefront of gas heating technology. During the 1930s, its engineers developed the balanced flue system, which today is used by gas heating manufacturers throughout the world. 

With this background DRU is now increasing their market share on the area of wooden stoves. By taking over the company Dik Geurts and starting the co-operation with the German European market leader for wooden stoves; Spartherm, the first steps are their.

Among these, the main business of TCL Industry under "smart terminals" is further subdivided into the electronics industry, air conditioning industry (referred to as TCL AC), and white goods industry.

Description:
At GeoComfort, we believe that in the future there will be no more waste of energy. 

With our highly sustainable systems, we can store energy in the ground and use it whenever necessary. We provide these so called ATES-systems (Aquifer Thermal Energy Storage or WKO) as standardized products. With over 500 systems in the Netherlands, we are market leader in the field of monowell systems. The monowell system uses only one borehole in which hot and cold are stored above each other, a great benefit in areas with limited space such as downtown Amsterdam. 
To complete the energy system, we produce heatpump SKID’s in our workshop. We not only provide electrical heatpumps but also manufacture high efficient gas engine heat pumps to produce hot water. The SKID’s are available in four configurations to suit your specific needs.

Name: SuperCool Group
Description:
SuperCool Group of Companies has been in operation since 1981 and today engages in the sourcing, supply and manufacture of products to the mobile, industrial and commercial air-conditioning and refrigeration industries, plus the provision of best-practice consultancy services and solutions to these sectors.

Among SuperCool’s products and services are HVACR testing, NATA-accredited validation and certification through our SuperTest testing laboratory, compressor design and manufacture, temperature monitoring and remote management solutions for the cold chain and cold storage industry. HVACR service consumables, and industrial flexible lines and connections also form part of our product offering. 

The company’s early history goes back to the era when motor vehicles did not have air-conditioning fitted as standard, and all the components had to be made and fabricated independently. Eventually, the Unicla brand of systems and components became synonymous with the SuperCool name, culminating in the eventual purchase of Unicla by SuperCool in partnership with Peter Yee and his Hong Kong based IAEL Engineering Group in 2005.

As a follow-on effect, SuperCool established joint-venture partnerships with the Burgaflex and Euroscan brands in Asia-Pacific and built one of the largest, most advanced HVACR testing centres in the Southern Hemisphere.

Through all of this, SuperCool has maintained long-term exclusive distribution agreements with brands in its portfolio, such as Refrigeration Technologies and others. 

SuperCool Group’s knowledge and experience, built over its long history of expertise in air-conditioning and refrigeration, is used to improve industry standards for the benefit of people and the environment.

Name: Pascal
Description:
We're hiring!

The HVAC sector currently accounts for 40% of global energy usage while also directly emitting 2 Gton CO2 eq. of greenhouse gas refrigerants to the atmosphere. Pascal’s solid refrigerants undergo solid–solid phase transitions in response to pressure, and can operate within the same pressure and temperature ranges as standard gas refrigerants. Pascal’s technology eliminates the direct emission of refrigerants to the atmosphere, and offers a pathway to more efficient, more sustainable, and cheaper heating and cooling systems.

Description:
Energismart ventilation – enkel installation, smart styr, maximal energibesparing! NYHET 2025 - FanPortal 

Vi utvecklar, tillverkar och levererar smarta ventilationslösningar för bostäder och fastigheter där man vill ha ett energieffektivt inomhusklimat med minimalt underhåll.

Våra takfläktar och aggregat är designade för en superenkel installation och maximal energibesparing, med bland annat EC-motorer, behovsstyrning och smart teknik – vilket ger både lägre driftskostnader och ett bättre inomhusklimat. 

Vi lägger mycket fokus på att tillverka produkter med lång livslängd, mycket hög kvalité och som ger besparing i både elenergi och installationstid, samt våra smarta styrsystem där du enkelt justerar ventilationen via t.ex mobiltelefon eller dator. 

För installatörer innebär våra produkter en snabb och smidig installation med färre moment och mindre takarbete, medan fastighetsägare får en pålitlig och hållbar lösning som automatiskt optimerar ventilationen för att spara energi och förbättra luftkvaliteten. 

Vi utvecklar och tillverkar allt på en och samma plats, strax utanför Lidköping.

Kontakta oss om du vill veta hur du kan minska energiförbrukningen och förbättra ventilationen i din fastighet, eller sväng förbi på en kopp kaffe så visar vi dig!

Following a materials science breakthrough, Barocal provides an solid alternative that reduces energy consumption and is designed for modularity and scalability. Our solution can power a wide range applications, addressing 40% of global energy use.

We are supported by Kiko Ventures, Cambridge Enterprise, Breakthrough Energy as well as the European Innovation Council.

Name: MAGNOVENT.EU
Description:
Magnovent is a company specialising in industrial ventilation and bioclimatic solutions, with a focus on energy efficiency. Our large industrial ceiling fans stand out for their ability to generate a high air flow with very low energy consumption, thanks to HVLS technology.

Our solutions contribute to more efficient and sustainable air conditioning in industrial warehouses, shops, sports centres, swimming pools, shopping centres and all types of large buildings. Magnovent HVLS fans not only reduce energy consumption by complementing conventional heating and air conditioning systems, but also optimise the recirculation and mixing of the air mass to improve comfort and reduce environmental impact.

Name: BLUE BOX
Description:
Blue Box Air, LLC is an innovative solution for reducing energy consumption and costs, while reducing CO2.  Our innovation is our patented process for cleaning the coils in HVAC systems, which improves air quality and facility health while reducing the environmental footprint.

There has never been an effective way to clean and sanitize the coils in an HVAC system.  This means nearly all HVAC systems worldwide are running fouled, inefficient and unhealthy. Blue Box solves this with its patented  process for pushing antimicrobial foam through any depth of coil, delivering near perfect surface area coverage.  

By solving how coils can be cleaned, Blue Box addresses some of the biggest problems faced by commercial HVAC systems, such as “Hospital Acquired Infections”, “Dirty Socks Syndrome”, and “Sick Building Syndrome”.  The result is a low-cost model for companies to extend their equipment life, reducing CO2 and energy consumption, all while providing improved air quality.

Estamos presentes en gran parte de Chile, trabajando en las cámaras frigoríficas más importantes en el país y múltiples en Latinoamérica, donde destacan países como Perú, Ecuador, Honduras, República Dominicana, entre otros.

Name: Daikin Manufacturing Poland
Description:
In 1924, Akira Yamada founded Osaka Kinzoku Kogyosho Ltd., a company manufacturing aircraft radiators. In 1963, the organization changed its name to Daikin. During the 1970s, Daikin began its global expansion by establishing a factory in Ostend, Belgium – Daikin Europe N.V. The company’s headquarters is Daikin Industries Ltd., based in Osaka, Japan.

Today, we deliver forward-thinking solutions in heating, cooling, ventilation, air purification, and refrigeration to global markets. We are present in 173 countries, operate 133 factories, and employ 103,500 people.

Daikin Europe began rapid growth in the early 1990s, establishing branches across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. Our success is driven by our popular, energy-efficient commercial systems. In 2011, Daikin Europe N.V. formalized this part of the business by creating the EMEA Development Center, which is now a global leader in R&D for heat pump heating and cooling technologies.

Between 2016 and 2018, Daikin acquired four European refrigeration companies: Zanotti, Tewis, Hubbard, and AHT.

On July 7, 2022, in Brussels, Daikin Europe N.V. (a subsidiary of the Japanese parent company DAIKIN INDUSTRIES Ltd.) announced a €300 million investment to build a new factory in Ksawerów – Daikin Manufacturing Poland Sp. z o.o. (DMPO), which will be Daikin’s first production plant in Poland. The construction of the Daikin factory is the largest foreign investment in Poland in recent years and in the history of the Łódź Special Economic Zone.

The decision to build the factory in Poland brings many benefits: it provides access to one of the largest pools of skilled workers in Central and Eastern Europe, opens access to other markets, and enables the use of stable supply chains.

In December 2024, the factory began production of Daikin Altherma 4 heat pumps.

Name: RBM Benelux
Description:
RBM werd opgericht door de familie Bossini in 1953 in Lumezzane, in de Italiaanse provincie Brescia. Vandaag is het bedrijf een internationale speler en marktleider in de sector van verwarmingsinstallaties en sanitair.

Het bedrijf heeft 4 fabrieken in de provincie Brescia (2 voor de productie van messing componenten en 2 voor de verwerking van kunststoffen), verschillende filialen in Europa en wereldwijd meer dan 200 werknemers. Om de hoogste kwaliteit op de markt te kunnen bieden, ontwikkelt RBM al zijn producten zelf. Van de matrijzen, ontworpen door eigen technici, tot de customer care, met de technische ondersteuning van een deskundig team van professionals. Door onze hoge flexibiliteit en de continue technologische vernieuwing en bijscholing zijn we in staat om de totale controle te behouden over het volledige productieproces. Deze passie voor innovatie blijkt uit de volledige automatisering van onze productie, waardoor we een hoge kwaliteit kunnen leveren en onze productiecapaciteit verhogen. 

In de voorbije jaren heeft RBM zijn aanbod aanzienlijk uitgebreid door de ontwikkeling van 5 productgamma's die perfect op elkaar afgestemd zijn.

Het RBM Brass-productgamma omvat alle verbindings- en sturingscomponenten waaruit een moderne hydrothermische installatie is opgebouwd.

RBM Kilma is het meest complete gamma van stralingsverwarming en koeling, uniek omdat alle hoofdonderdelen ontwikkeld en geproduceerd worden door hetzelfde bedrijf

RBM Metis is een gamma van meetsystemen voor energieverbruik.

RBM Tita-Fix is het gamma van meerlagige leidingsystemen en perskoppelingen.

Het gamma RBM Sferika is ontstaan uit de overname van het merk GS Gnutti Sebastiano. Het omvat verschillende gamma's kogelkranen en terugslagkleppen
