Name: CNT Technology GmbH
Description:
In the course of global warming, refrigeration is becoming increasingly important. In particular, sustainable and efficient use of resources plays a special role. That is why we set out to make a decisive contribution to the further development and improvement of the refrigeration technology currently in use.

After several years of intensive research and development, a vision was transformed into a market-ready and scientifically confirmed concept. Together with the market leaders in the respective sectors, including system restaurants, food retailers and manufacturers of refrigerated cabinets, we were able to demonstrate what our molecular filter technology is capable of.

Based on the previous successes, CNT Technology GmbH was then founded at the beginning of 2020. We wanted to use the opportunity of EUROSHOP2020 to present our highly flexible products and solutions to as many interested trade fair participants as possible and thus facilitate their everyday operations. 

What happened afterwards? Despite inner tension, our first trade show appearance went much better than expected and we experienced a very high level of interest in our discussions. Individual and joint pilot projects were agreed upon, which we were able to carry out despite restrictions due to the COVID pandemic. While special applications or test procedures presented us with great challenges at first glance, we demonstrated extraordinary results in many places. 

As individual as the use of the cold applications is, the results are equally convincing. We are very grateful to JBG2, AHT, Carrier as well as EDEKA, REWE, Kaufland, McDonalds and many other companies for constructive feedback, inspiring discussions, joint projects as well as successes and the openness to go new and innovative ways with us.

You too can walk the path with us!

Name: SINTRA S.r.l. - Società Benefit
Description:
SINTRA (acronimo di Sistemi Innovativi di Trattamento Aria), che oggi è una Società Benefit, è stata costituita nel 1995 con la missione di introdurre e diffondere sul mercato una tecnologia innovativa di pulsione dell’aria ambiente.
Si tratta della tecnologia MIXIND, inventata nel 1981 da Marco Zambolin - ideatore dei canali perforati e attuale presidente dell’azienda - e poi testata e perfezionata per ben 15 anni prima di essere introdotta ufficialmente sul mercato e installata nei primi impianti industriali.
SINTRA nasce dunque da un’innovazione e non ha mai smesso di sperimentare e migliorare le proprie tecnologie, depositando numerosi brevetti.
MIXIND è la tecnologia proprietaria di SINTRA, basata su criteri di ricerca e metodi di calcolo del tutto innovativi, che consente di riscaldare o climatizzare grandi ambienti – civili e industriali - con grande efficienza, senza spreco di energia, grazie alla capacità di omogeneizzare tutte le temperature, evitando la stratificazione e mettendo in movimento controllato tutto il volume dell’aria ambiente.
Ridurre al massimo i consumi energetici e avere un basso impatto ambientale non è per forza un lusso, è un investimento spesso inferiore a quello immaginato, che procura vantaggi già a breve termine.
L'impegno di SINTRA è di accompagnare le aziende clienti nella transizione green, con impianti di riscaldamento e condizionamento di nuova generazione che offrano un comfort ambientale superiore a quello degli impianti tradizionali e che abbattano i costi economici, quindi di spesa e consumo di energia.
La tecnologia MIXIND per la pulsione dell’aria ambiente, esclusiva di SINTRA, si basa su particolari canali perforati progettati da SINTRA utilizzando le tecnologie proprietarie brevettate e sulla base di un complesso sistema di calcolo. MIXIND permette un risparmio in costi energetici fino all’80%, climatizza l’ambiente in tempi brevissimi e riduce il numero di canali perforati di immissione dell’aria.

Name: ASHRAE Cairo University Student Branch
Description:
The ASHRAE (American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers) Cairo University Student Branch is a part of the global ASHRAE organization, which focuses on advancing the arts and sciences of HVAC&R (Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning, and Refrigeration). Here’s an overview of the student branch:

### Objectives
- **Education**: To educate students about HVAC&R principles and practices.
- **Networking**: To connect students with professionals in the industry through events and seminars.
- **Research**: To encourage research in HVAC&R technologies and sustainability.
- **Professional Development**: To provide workshops, training, and resources for career preparation.

### Activities
- **Workshops and Seminars**: Regularly organized events featuring industry experts.
- **Site Visits**: Opportunities for students to visit HVAC&R facilities and learn about real-world applications.
- **Competitions**: Participation in local and international competitions related to HVAC&R.
- **Community Service**: Engaging in initiatives that promote sustainability and energy efficiency.

### Membership
- Open to all students at Cairo University interested in HVAC&R.
- Membership offers access to resources, networking opportunities, and participation in events.

### Achievements
- Active participation in ASHRAE conferences and competitions.
- Collaboration with faculty and industry professionals to enhance learning experiences.

The ASHRAE Cairo University Student Branch plays a crucial role in shaping future professionals in the HVAC&R field, fostering a strong community of learning and innovation.

Name: Ishrae Bahrain
Description:
The Indian Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air Conditioning Engineers (ISHRAE) was founded in 1981 in New Delhi by a group of eminent HVAC&R professionals. ISHRAE today has over 28,780 HVAC&R professionals and Student-members. ISHRAE operates over 47 chapters and sub-chapters spread all over India and overseas, with HQ in Delhi.

It is led by a team of elected officers who are members of the Society, working voluntarily and collectively called the Board of Governors.

ISHRAE Objectives :
1. Advancement of the Arts and Sciences of Heating, Ventilation, Air               
Conditioning and Refrigeration Engineering and Related Services.
2. Continuing education of members and other interested persons in the said sciences through lectures, workshops, product presentations, publications, and Exhibitions.
3. Rendition of career guidance and financial assistance to students of the said sciences.
4. Encouragement of scientific research.

Name: Urban Cooling Solutions
Description:
At Urban Cooling Solutions, we have revolutionized traditional HVAC systems by re-engineering them to meet the unique demands of modern developments. Our high-quality air conditioning and heating solutions are meticulously tailored for a variety of applications, including modern residential buildings, listed properties, retrofits, commercial spaces, and conservation areas.

Our systems don’t just cool—they solve overheating issues, aligning with Part 0 Regulations, while simultaneously addressing Part C Regulations by filtering and cleaning the air. And there’s more: our advanced HVAC technology also provides energy-efficient heating, ensuring comfort throughout every season.

Why Choose Urban Cooling Solutions?
For Property Developers:
We understand the financial and spatial challenges property developers face. That’s why our compact systems are designed to take up minimal sellable space, reducing capital expenditure and ongoing operational costs. This allows developers to maximize ROI without compromising on the quality of the indoor climate for residents.

For Architects:
Preserving the aesthetic integrity of your designs is paramount. Our systems integrate seamlessly with existing architectural elements, blending into the building’s structure while providing powerful, efficient performance. Whether it’s a heritage site or a cutting-edge new build, our solutions enhance your designs rather than disrupt them.

For BIM & Mechanical Consultants:
With the introduction of Part 0 Building Regulations for overheating, our solutions are the perfect fit for residential developments. They simplify cooling capacity calculations and align with the highest sustainability standards, contributing to exceptional ratings under BREEAM, LEED, and WELL Building Standards. This makes your projects not only compliant but truly forward-thinking in design.

We are proud to offer not just systems, but partnerships—working alongside developers, architects, and consultants!

Test certificates

Committed to sustainability and energy efficiency, we exclusively use natural refrigerants, ensuring minimal environmental impact while delivering high-performance cooling systems.

Understanding the significant role that refrigeration systems play in global emissions, we integrate advanced technologies that actively reduce environmental footprints. At Zudek International, sustainability is not just an option—it is a core principle. Our solutions align with the UK’s and Europe’s decarbonisation goals for 2030, supporting businesses in their transition towards greener and more efficient operations.

Our expertise spans industrial, commercial, and HVAC applications, with successful implementations in food and beverage processing, chemical and pharmaceutical industries, logistics, freezing, and more. We take a customer-centric approach, designing and delivering tailor-made solutions that enhance energy efficiency, reduce carbon footprints, and optimise operational costs.

Every unit supplied by Zudek International benefits from Telematik, our 24/7 remote management service, ensuring continuous monitoring and optimisation of performance for maximum energy savings and operational reliability.

All Zudek solutions are available under PED or ASME codes, and we operate under the highest quality standards, holding ISO 9001:2000 certification from SGS Institute.

By choosing Zudek International, businesses in the UK gain access to innovative, eco-friendly refrigeration solutions that are built for the future—efficient, sustainable, and fully aligned with modern environmental regulations.

Name: ASHRAE Region XV

ASHRAE, founded in 1894, is a global society advancing human well-being through sustainable technology for the built environment. The Society and its more than 53,000 members worldwide focus on building systems, energy efficiency, indoor air quality, refrigeration and sustainability. Through research, standards writing, publishing, certification and continuing education, ASHRAE shapes tomorrow’s built environment today. 

 Welcome to ASHRAE Region XV, a distinguished segment of the global ASHRAE community committed to elevating sustainable building practices, environmental control, and energy efficiency in the HVAC&R industry. 

 Comprising a vibrant network of professionals, experts, and enthusiasts, Region XV serves as a beacon of collaboration, innovation, and knowledge-sharing among industry stakeholders. 

 Our mission is to empower professionals across all career stages, providing them with unparalleled opportunities for learning, growth, and leadership development. Through a myriad of initiatives, events, and educational programs, ASHRAE Region XV is dedicated to driving positive change and shaping the future of the HVAC&R industry. 

 We are steadfast in our commitment to promoting sustainability and environmental stewardship in the built environment. By advocating for energy-efficient designs, renewable energy integration, and green building standards, we strive to create a healthier, more comfortable, and sustainable world for all. 

 Join us in our mission to advance the science of HVAC&R and make a meaningful impact on the world around us. 

Connect with ASHRAE Region XV today and become part of a dynamic community driving innovation and excellence in the industry.

Name: WaHa
Description:
WaHa (Arabic for oasis) redefines atmospheric water harvesting, dehumidification, and air conditioning with pure water and dry air at unmatched energy cost.

The WaHa Vaporator is an innovative solid desiccant regeneration engine that will revolutionize atmospheric water generation, dehumidification, and the air conditioning markets. This patented system offers significant improvements in energy efficiency and greenhouse gas emissions.

Key features of the WaHa Vaporator include:

-	A novel (and patented) approach to regenerating solid desiccants using a heat pump
-	Independent control of dew point and dry bulb temperatures
-	Pure water generation, enabling direct evaporative cooling
-	Compatibility with ultra-low global warming potential refrigerants
-	Up to 90% reduction in energy consumption compared to conventional systems
-	Comparable size and weight to existing AC solutions and can be installed by current trades people

The WaHa Vaporator is designed to reliably produce pure water in any climate zone – including arid and cold climates. When compared to alternative technologies, it offers superior reliability and the lowest cost of ownership.

WaHa was founded in 2018 to commercialize novel desiccant materials and technologies developed at UC Berkeley over two decades. The company has received seed funding from several sources, including UC Berkeley, Berkeley Catalyst Fund, Anthropocene Institute, Mitsui-Kinzoku, TAQNIA, and strategic angel investors.

The TEAM offers services across North and South Carolina and emphasizes our unique approach to solving building problems. This approach has helped TEAM become the fastest growing and most trusted mechanical contractor in the area. 

We live in a world where energy efficiency has now become a key component to the success of business. Gone were the days of being content because mechanical systems simply “worked”. Building owners and facility managers were now charged with lowering energy expenses and many did not know where to turn. New technologies promised to reduce energy expenses, but few worked because they ignored the fundamental practices of designing and maintaining mechanical systems. 

TEAM Mechanical listened to the concerns of building owners and facility managers and developed core principles to increase energy efficiencies among all types of mechanical equipment. Helping educate customers to understand how mechanical systems consume energy, eliminated the uncertainties that currently exist in the industry. Description:
CAREL is a world leader in control solutions for air-conditioning, refrigeration and heating, and systems for humidification and evaporative cooling. Our products are designed to bring energy savings and reduce the environmental impact of machinery and systems. Our solutions are used in commercial, industrial and residential applications.

Founded in 1973, CAREL in 2023 has consolidated sales of more than 650.2 million euros (19.3% more than in 2022). Around 80% of sales are from exports, through an extensive sales and customer support network. With operations in North America since the 1990s, we have expanded our presence in the region with strategic sales offices in the US, Mexico, and Canada, and one main manufacturing plant located in Manheim, Pennsylvania.

We serve more than 4,000 customers, with 6,200 active products and annual production of more than 7 million units. Research & Development are the heart of our commitment. A total of 5% of consolidated sales is reinvested in R&D in order to anticipate customer needs and supply advanced solutions. A further 4% of sales is regularly invested in production process technology, so as to ensure ongoing improvement and growth.

CAREL also operates two research laboratories, one focused on thermodynamics and the other on humidification, true points of excellence in their respective fields. Out of the Group’s more than 2,000 staff, 13.5% are employed in Research & Development, a number that reaches almost 25% when considering the designers and technical personnel working at our Italian headquarters.

Training is another area where we devote significant resources, applied to all areas of the company with the aim of developing our personnel, both in terms of soft skills and technical competencies.

Name: HeatLeap
Description:
HeatLeap: De sprong naarKlimaatneutraalverwarmen. 

Klimaatneutraal van het gas af:‘’Hoe dan? 

HeatLeap bewijst dat het klimaat-neutraal verwarmen van bestaande woningen van woningcorporaties mogelijk en betaalbaar is met behulp van slimme technologie en het optimale gebruik van groene stroom. Dit doen we door middel van onze 100% elektrische iCV ketel op basis van infraroodtechniek, HeatBuffers en warmtepomp zonder buitenunit.
De European Union heeft via Stimulus Programmamanagement de OPZuid-subsidie toegekend aan HeatLeap, voor het volgens de commissie strategische en baanbrekende project "sociale energieduurzaamheid: iCV NextGen." Dit project zal worden uitgevoerd over een periode van drie jaar, van mei 2024 tot en met april 2027, en richt zich op de ontwikkeling van een vol-elektrisch warmtesysteem voor de aardgasloze gebouwde omgeving, met name voor sociale huurwoningen van woningcorporaties in Nederland.
Het project "iCV NextGen" beoogt een innovatieve oplossing die specifiek ontworpen is om een betaalbaar en duurzaam alternatief te bieden voor het verwarmen van sociale huurwoningen. Met de iCV NextGen technologie wil HeatLeap bijdragen aan een toekomst zonder aardgas, waarin huiseigenaren en huurders kunnen profiteren van betrouwbare en efficiënte elektrische verwarming, zonder extra belasting voor het milieu. Dit project sluit nauw aan bij de ambities van de Europese Unie en Nederland om de energietransitie te versnellen en sociale duurzaamheid te bevorderen.
De toekenning van de OPZuid-subsidie maakt het voor HeatLeap mogelijk om intensief te investeren in onderzoek, ontwikkeling en het testen van de iCV NextGen technologie. Hiermee zal het bedrijf samenwerken met woningcorporaties Tiwos en Ressort Wonen en haar ontwikkel-partners Dejatech BXS BV InnoTractor Kivits Isolatietechniek B.V en Rabobank MindLabs Enexis om een oplossing te creëren die niet alleen energiezuinig, maar ook kosteneffectief is voor huishoudens.

Name: Nissens Cooling Solutions Czech, s.r.o.
Description:
Nissens Cooling Solutions (NCS) je globálním lídrem v dodávkách zákaznických chladicích řešení pro větrné elektrárny na pevnině a na moři (divize Wind) a vybraných průmyslových aplikací (divize Industry). 

Historicky byla NCS součástí skupiny Nissens, která byla založena v roce 1921. NCS byla samostatnou divizí Nissens a v rámci akvizice A.P. Moller Holding se stala samostatnou společností. 

Portfolium našich pevninských a mořských řešení zahrnuje nejmodernější chladicí systémy především pro měnič, gondolu (převodovka & generátor) a transformátory. Divize Industry vyvíjí zejména zákaznická řešení chlazení pro terénní vozidla se spalovacími motory.

Společnost se zaměřuje na neustálé zlepšování procesu vývoje, řízení dodavatelského řetězce a služeb. NCS využívá své zkušenosti ke snižování nákladů na energii, optimalizaci a zlepšování výkonu větrných elektráren a dbá na to, aby její řešení byla vždy v souladu s požadavky zákazníků.

Nissens Group byla založena v roce 1921 a NCS působí ve větrném průmyslu již více než 30 let. Společnost sídlí v Dánsku a má pobočky v pěti zemích - výrobní závody na Slovensku, v České republice a Číně, vývoj, testování a prototypování v Dánsku a prodejní a inženýrské kanceláře v Dánsku, Číně a USA. Dnes má NCS téměř 1000 zaměstnanců převážně v Dánsku, východní Evropě a Číně. 

V roce 2021 byla společnost koupena společností A.P. Moller Holding, čímž se NCS ještě více globalizuje a získává příležitost pro urychlení dalšího růstu a vývoje v oblasti větrné energie a chladicích řešení.

Name: MARS/Heat Controller
Description:
The Comfort-AireTM  and CenturyTM  brands are steeped in history, and have been woven into the fabric of the American landscape.  Since 1955, our reputation has stood for innovation and quality.  We continue that tradition today as part of the MARS (Motors and Armatures) family of products.
With over 60 years at our current Equipment Division Headquarters in Jackson, Michigan – our legacy comes from a rich tapestry of American dreams and hard work.  From industrial furnaces and agricultural crop dryers, to window air conditioners and residential dehumidifiers – the Comfort-AireTM   brand was a household name by the late 1960’s.  We even manufactured the first ductless mini-split for the American market in 1972 (the Comfort-AireTM  Twin Pak).  We were pioneers then, and we are still innovators today!
Since then, our  portfolio of equipment has grown to incorporate an astonishing range of products:
•	Standard Residential Unitary furnaces, air conditioners, heat pumps and air handlers
•	Room-Air Products - including window air conditioners, portable air conditioners, through-the-wall units, packaged-terminal-air-conditioners, portable dehumidiers, and much more
•	a wide range of Single-Zone and Multi-Done Mini-Splits 
•	Geothermal Systems and Commercial Water-Source-Heat-Pumps.    
This incredibly diverse product line is supported by comprehensive technical professionalism.  From our in-house Warranty Administration and Technical Support, to our efficient Warehouse and Logistics Teams, we are very proud of our what we do – and our enthusiasm shows!

Kaisai, Daikin, Mitsubishi, Fujitsu), dzięki czemu jesteśmy w stanie w pełni sprostać indywidualnym wymaganiom każdego klienta, a nasz profesjonalizm i konkurencyjne ceny zapewniają nam bardzo dobre opinie i wiele zadowolonych klientów

 Proponowane przez nas produkty posiadają stosowne certyfikaty, aprobaty techniczne krajowe i zagraniczne oraz wymagane atesty higieniczne.
 Realizujemy zlecenia w zakresie klimatyzacji pojedynczych pomieszczeń jak i systemy obsługujące duże obiekty (domy mieszkalne, biurowce, budynki usługowe, sklepy itp)
 Naszą najlepszą reklamą jest wielu zadowolonych klientów, którzy polecają nasze usługi.
 Działamy na terenie całego kraju, dzięki szeroko rozwiniętej sieci partnerów.

Dlaczego warto nam zaufać?
 Bezpłatna indywidualna wycena i dobór instalacji.
 W naszej ofercie mamy nowoczesne i sprawdzone urządzenia.
 Do instalacji używamy tylko najwyższej jakości materiałów.
 Nasz zespół ma wszelkie niezbędne certyfikaty i uprawnienia.
 Monterzy posiadają niezbędne doświadczenie oraz są wyposażeni w profesjonalne narzędzia.
 Nasze instalacje cechuje wysoka jakość i estetyka wykonania.

Name: AIRCON Sp. z o.o.
Description:
AIRCON Sp. z o.o. świadczy usługi na rynku HVAC już ponad 20 lat. 
Podstawową działalnością naszej firmy jest import urządzeń klimatyzacyjnych marki MDV, której od 2004 roku jesteśmy Generalnym Przedstawicielem w Polsce.

Od początku istnienia firmy, naszą podstawową gałęzią działalności jest import szerokiej gamy urządzeń klimatyzacyjnych, od popularnych splitów ściennych, poprzez urządzenia kanałowe, kasetonowe i podstropowe, urządzenia typu multisplit w wersji on-off i inwerter skończywszy na rozbudowanych systemach ze zmiennym przepływem czynnika chłodniczego VRF typu MDV-D.


MDV to profesjonalna marka urządzeń klimatyzacyjnych. W swojej ofercie posiada różne typy i klasy systemów klimatyzacyjnych o szerokim spektrum zastosowania. Utworzona została w 2000 roku, wywodzi się z grupy produktów komercyjnych CAC (Commercial Air-Conditioning). Początkowo marka MDV oferowała nowoczesne systemy i komponenty dedykowane dla zastosowań komercyjnych i przemysłu np. systemy VRF, agregaty wody lodowej, klimakonwektory i agregaty skraplające. W 2001 roku firma zdecydowała się również na włączenie do swojej oferty rozwiązań z segmentu klimatyzatorów domowych.

Dziś MDV jest jednym z najbardziej rozwijających się przedsiębiorstw w branży klimatyzacji. Firma bezustannie rozwija nowe technologie i wykorzystuje zaawansowane rozwiązania do tworzenia urządzeń energooszczędnych, bezpiecznych dla środowiska, wygodnych w użyciu i co najważniejsze – niezawodnych w działaniu. Cały proces produkcji jest ściśle monitorowany przez dział kontroli jakości.

MDV z powodzeniem wdraża swoje rozwiązania na całym świecie w tym m.in. w: Rosji, Hiszpanii, Brazylii, Australii, Izraelu, Bułgarii, Polsce, Turcji, Arabii Saudyjskiej, stale powiększając swój globalny zasięg w celu wzmocnienia swojej pozycji jako czołowego dostawcy rozwiązań klimatyzacyjnych.

Relevance:
This course prepares the students for the HVAC industry. Students passing out from Mechanical, electrical and electronics streams can join these courses. We also help final year students doing their internship through this course.
Placement:
On successful completion of the course, students are sent for job interviews. As stated earlier, all our successful students get absorbed in the industry. (This is through combined hard work of our faculties and the hard work put in by the students themselves.)
Our History:
We are presently in our 18th year of existence. 42 batches have passed out and our alumni are now spread in many different countries like India, UAE and other Gulf countries, South Africa and other African countries, Mauritius, Maldives etc..

We have a mix of faculties from industry and from academics. They all are from prestigious institutes in the country. The faculties from industry have also handled large projects in India and abroad.

Name: Frigocare Refrigeration
Description:
Avrupalı gıda perakendecilerinin kalite, hizmet, sürdürülebilirlik ve etik standartlar konusundaki zorlu gereksinimlerini anlayan Frigocare Refrigeration, Avrupa'da geçerli bir tedarikçi olma hedefiyle stratejisini ve operasyonlarını bu doğrultuda düzenledi. Endüstriyel soğutma sistemleri, süpermarketler ve frigofirik araçların soğutma gereksinimlerinin karşılanması konusunda faaliyet göstermekte olup; proje, taahhüt ve anahtar teslim soğutma hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Frigocare, 15 yılı aşkın takım deneyimi ve paydaşları ile birlikte bugüne kadar yurt içinde ve yurt dışında gerçekleştirmiş olduğu soğutma proje ve uygulamalarıyla sektörde güvenilir bir yere sahiptir. Geniş bir proje yelpazesine sahip Frigocare, her türlü endüstriyel soğutma sistemi (merkezi veya split soğutma sistemleri; amonyak ve CO2 gibi doğal soğutucu akışkanlarla soğutma vb.), freon soğutma sistemleri vs. projelendirme ve uygulama ihtiyacınızı karşılayabilecek mühendislik bilgisine sahiptir. 

Frigocare Refrigeration;
Tarım endüstrisi için; taze meyve-sebze soğuk hava depoları, ürün dinlendirme ve ön soğutma odaları, 
Gıda endüstrisi için; kırmızı et, beyaz et, sütlü ve unlu mamüller, her türlü gıda işleme alanları soğutması ve havalandırma sistemleri, donmuş ürün tesisleri, şoklama prosesleri,
Soğuk Zincir Lojistiği endüstrisi için; lojistik depoları, frigofirik araç soğutma montajı,
Perakende endüstrisi için; süpermarket projeleri, soğutmalı ve soğutmasız reyon dolapları; sütlük, kasap reyon sistemleri, 
Horeca endüstrisi için; otel ve restoran zincirleri için soğuk hava depoları, her türlü reyon ihtiyaçları; pastane dolapları, endüstriyel mutfak ekipmanları, monoblock soğuk hava depoları tasarlar ve inşa eder. Frigocare Refrigeration, sunmuş olduğu tüm hizmetlerle, işletmeniz için sürdürülebilir, enerji verimliliğinin ön planda oladuğu bir sistem kurmanıza yardımcı olur.

“25 yıllı aşkın deneyim ve uzmanlığımızla hem yerel hem de globalde projelerinize uygun en doğru çözümleri üretmeye devam ediyoruz”

Türkiye'nin en eski 'Kanal Flanş' üreticisi vasfıyla iklimlendirme sektörünün en köklü ve öncü firmalarından biri olan Makro Teknik, faaliyete geçtiği 1998 yılından bugüne çeyrek asrı aşkın birikimiyle uluslararası standartlarda sürdürülebilir bir üretim kapasitesine ulaşarak bugün 50’ye yakın ülkeye ihracat yapan global bir kuruluş haline gelmiştir. 

Faaliyetlerine yerli imalat kanal flanşı ve aksamlarının üretimiyle başlayan Makro Teknik, bugün sahip olduğu teknolojik altyapı ve geliştirdiği AR&GE uygulamaları ile kendi üretimi olan taşıyıcı profiller, kelepçeler, muhtelif montaj malzemeleri ve kendi markası altında ürettirdiği kauçuk izolasyon ve flexible gibi ürünler ile imalat yelpazesini çeşitlendirmeye devam etmektedir. Kalitesini, Mart 2003’te ISO 9001 ile tescillendiren firmamız yurt içi ve yurt dışında geniş satış organizasyonu ile mükemmel kalite ve uygun fiyat dengesini bir araya getirerek müşteri memnuniyetini sürekli kılmayı hedeflemektedir. 

Makro Teknik ekibimiz kurum misyonu dahilinde tedarikçilerden müşterilere kadar tüm paydaşlarımız için ortak fayda sağlayacak iş birliklerini artırmakta, en son teknolojiyi ve kaynakları verimli ve etkin kullanırken evrensel insan hakları ile doğa ve çevre bilincine önem göstermektedir. 

Ana üretim faaliyetlerini İstanbul’da Dudullu Organize Sanayi Bölgesi başta olmak üzere Sırbistan’ın Belgrad şehrinde yer alan imalat tesislerinde sürdüren Makro Teknik, yurt içi ve dışında da 50’ye yakın “Makro Teknik Express” satış ağı ile ürün ve hizmetlerini geliştirmektedir. Avrupa, Asya ve Afrika ülkelerinden oluşan firmalarla geniş bir müşteri portföyüne sahip firmamız, Madrid protokolü kapsamındaki tüm ülkelerde marka tescilini tamamlamış ve toplam cirosu içerisinde ihracatının payını hedefi olan %75'e yükseltmiştir.

Name: Humboldt Blue
Description:
Revolutionizing Clean Cooling with Active Phase-Change Technology

At Humboldt Blue, we're pioneering a new generation of clean cooling through our patented Active Liquid-Solid Cooling (ALSC) technology. Unlike conventional systems that rely on compressors and harmful refrigerant gases, our solution actively produces cold by harnessing the physics of pressurizing and depressurizing organic phase-change materials (PCMs).

This innovation goes beyond traditional thermal storage. By triggering a liquid-solid transition under controlled pressure conditions, our ALSC system delivers on-demand cooling without emissions—eliminating reliance on vapor compression cycles. The result is a clean, efficient, and scalable alternative that slashes energy consumption while reducing carbon footprints.

Deployed first in data centers and adaptable to commercial buildings and industrial settings, our technology combines high thermal inertia with active cooling capability. It ensures stable temperatures, resilience during peak loads, and a path toward sustainable thermal infrastructure—without sacrificing performance.

At Humboldt Blue, we’re not just storing cold. We’re generating it—cleanly.

Name: Vaillant Group Belgium
Description:
The Vaillant Group is a global market and technology leader in the fields of heating, ventilation and air-conditioning technology. We have been following a strategy designed to achieve sustainable and profitable growth. Today, our family-owned company is present in more than 20 countries, has 10 sites in 6 European countries and China and is working on the future in 6 R&D-centers.

Working at Vaillant Group means "Taking care of a better climate". This vision is a mindset, a mission and a promise to mankind. We work on products and solutions that actually make a difference for the future. Sustainability is not a marketing gimmick for us. It is an attitude that lives on in our employees, offices, factories and cars on the road. Sustainability can be seen, felt, and heard of in every corner of Vaillant Group. And in the same way we take care of the climate, we take care of our employees, their families, their careers and their ambitions. We make it happen!

Vaillant Group has two well-known brands in its portfolio in Belgium, namely Vaillant and Bulex. 

For over 145 years, the German manufacturer Vaillant, European market leader in heating technology, has been developing future-oriented and efficient technologies which meet user expectations in terms of comfort, consumption and efficiency. For this purpose, Vaillant not only uses gas and electricity, but nowadays also increasingly sources of renewable energy such as solar energy, geothermal energy and aerothermal energy. In this way, Vaillant is already providing answers to the questions of the future. 

Bulex has also been a leading player in the field of heating, cooling and plumbing for over 80 years. We use this expertise to provide our customers with the best possible service. Our years of experience translate into a versatile range of user-friendly appliances and tools, which you can have installed in your home effortlessly. Bulex stands for reliability, tailored advice and excellent customer service.

Criocabin was established in 1984 as a manufacturer of cold storage units. The product range was expanded to include refrigerated counters in 2000, with the incorporation of creative companies. Name: Perfil Refrigeração
Description:
A Perfil Refrigeração é uma empresa focada no desenvolvimento de produtos e soluções para refrigeração comercial e industrial.

Com mais de duas décadas de mercado. Nossa missão é oferece tecnologia e soluções personalizadas para atender as necessidades de cada cliente.
TRAGETÓRIA DA PERFIL REFRIGERAÇÃO
A história da Perfil Refrigeração se confunde com a trajetória de seu fundador, José Neto, que iniciou sua carreira aos 15 anos na construção civil, atuando na área de topografia e adquirindo sólida experiência em projetos de engenharia e precisão geométrica.
Aos 18 anos, ingressou no setor de refrigeração comercial, participando da montagem de novas lojas da Rede Sé Supermercados. O desempenho e comprometimento abriram caminho para uma jornada empreendedora, iniciada aos 21 anos, com foco em instalações e manutenções de sistemas de refrigeração comercial e industrial.
Em 2002, nasceu oficialmente a Perfil Refrigeração, com uma equipe de apenas quatro profissionais e o primeiro contrato firmado com o Grupo Pão de Açúcar, atendendo 12 lojas na região sul de São Paulo. O sucesso e a excelência na execução levaram à expansão do contrato para 64 lojas e, posteriormente, à atuação em outros estados, consolidando a presença da marca em todo o país.
Com o crescimento contínuo, a Perfil evoluiu de prestadora de serviços para indústria de engenharia e manufatura, passando a projetar e fabricar seus próprios equipamentos — expositores, câmaras frias, centrais frigoríficas e sistemas plug & play — com foco em eficiência energética, desempenho técnico e sustentabilidade.
Hoje, com mais de duas décadas de história, a Perfil Refrigeração é referência nacional e com exportações para a América do Sul, reconhecida por sua tecnologia, inovação e compromisso com a excelência, atendendo as principais redes varejistas, atacadistas e supermercadistas do continente.
“Oferecer desempenho, eficiência e confiabilidade em cada projeto, com inovação e paixão pelo frio.”

Technik für Menschen. 
Der Mensch ist Maßstab und sein Wohlbefinden das Ziel. Seit Gründung des Unternehmens im Jahre 1951 ist dies die Maxime unternehmerischer Entscheidungen.

Systeme aus einer Hand. 
In der Technischen Gebäudeausrüstung ist das Zusammenspiel der Systemkomponenten das A und O. TROX bietet alles aus einer Hand. Durch optimale Abstimmung von RLT-Gerät, Klima- und Lüftungskomponenten und Systemen wird die Energieeffizienz maximiert, gleichzeitig der Abstimmungsbedarf für die Konzipierung und den Bau einer Anlage minimiert.

Perfekt auf die Gebäude abgestimmte Systeme. 
In enger Zusammenarbeit mit den Kunden entwickelt TROX bedarfsgerechte Lösungen, maßgeschneidert auf die Anforderungen der Bauwerke und ihrer Nutzer. So ergeben sich nachhaltige Konzepte, die helfen, das Wohlbefinden des Menschen zu steigern, Leben zu schützen und darüber hinaus unsere Umwelt zu schonen.

Name: Nissens Cooling Solutions SK
Description:
Nissens Cooling Solutions (NCS) je globálnym lídrom v dodávkach zákazníckych chladiacich riešení pre veterné elektrárne na pevnine a na mori (divízia Wind) a vybraných priemyselných aplikácií (divízia Industry).

Historicky bola NCS súčasťou skupiny Nissens, ktorá bola založená v roku 1921. NCS bola samostatnou divíziou Nissens a v rámci akvizície A.P. Møller Holding sa stala samostatnou spoločnosťou.

Portfólium našich riešení  na mori i na pevnine zahŕňa najmodernejšie chladiace systémy, predovšetkým pre menič, gondolu (prevodovka & generátor) a transformátory. Divízia Industry vyvíja najmä zákaznícke riešenia chladenia pre terénne vozidlá so spaľovacími motormi.

Spoločnosť sa zameriava na neustále zlepšovanie procesu vývoja, riadenia dodávateľského reťazca a služieb. NCS využíva svoje skúsenosti na znižovanie nákladov na energiu, optimalizáciu a zlepšovanie výkonu veterných elektrární a dbá na to, aby jej riešenia boli vždy v súlade s požiadavkami zákazníkov.

Nissens Group bola založená v roku 1921 a NCS pôsobí vo veternom priemysle už viac ako 30 rokov. Spoločnosť sídli v Dánsku a má pobočky v piatich krajinách - výrobné závody na Slovensku, v Českej republike a Číne, vývoj, testovanie a prototypovanie v Dánsku a predajné a inžinierske kancelárie v Dánsku, Číne a USA. Dnes má NCS takmer 1000 zamestnancov prevažne v Dánsku, východnej Európe a Číne.

V roku 2021 bola spoločnosť kúpená spoločnosťou A.P. Møller Holding, čím sa NCS ešte viac globalizuje a získava príležitosť na urýchlenie ďalšieho rastu a vývoja v oblasti veternej energie a chladiacich riešení.

Name: Magneto
Description:
Magneto leverages the Magnetocaloric Effect to develop and produce low-cost, highly energy efficient, climate-friendly heat exchangers - the key component powering a magnetocaloric heat pump system. We collaborate with leading heat pump manufacturers to build magnetocaloric heat pumps, for both heating and cooling applications, and replace today’s inefficient and climate unfriendly vapor compression systems.
 
Patented Material & Heat Exchanger Design

Our material heats-up when exposed to a magnetic field and cools-down when the field is removed: the Magnetocaloric Effect. Magneto’s patented low-cost, rare-earth-free, non-toxic material operates over a wide temperature range (-80°C to 200°C). Combined with advanced 3D-printing technology, we enable mass production of efficient magnetocaloric heat exchangers at competitive prices, unlocking a vast global market.

Key Advantages:

1) Highly Energy Efficient
Magnetocaloric technology is 30% more efficient compared to traditional vapor compression systems, thanks to the optimized 3D-printed design and high energy conversion of our heat exchangers.

2) No Harmful Refrigerants
Magnetocaloric heat pump systems do not use harmful and hazardous refrigerant gases, reducing the environmental impact of heating and cooling while simplifying installation and maintenance.

3) Lower Total Cost of Ownership
Lower Total Cost of Ownership due to high energy-efficiency, lower installation and maintenance costs, and a longer life span, make Magnetocaloric heat pumps the planet-friendly, budget-wise choice!

Name: Zehnder Polska
Description:
Zehnder Polska jest częścią szwajcarskiego koncernu Zehnder Group. Zehnder koncentruje się na podnoszeniu jakości życia przez dostarczanie klientom najlepszych rozwiązań w zakresie komfortowego, zdrowego i energooszczędnego klimatu wnętrz. Dostarcza ciepło w wielu formach, umożliwia również chłodzenie, jak i dystrybucję świeżego powietrza o wstępnie wyregulowanej temperaturze.

Zehnder ma w swoim dorobku wyprodukowanie pierwszego w historii ogrzewnictwa stalowego grzejnika żeberkowego (1930 r.), jak i drabinkowego dedykowanego do łazienek (1980 r.). Główne linie produkcyjne: grzejniki dekoracyjne, komfortowa wentylacja wnętrz, systemy ogrzewania i chłodzenia sufitowego, systemy filtracji powietrza. W 2002 roku powstał oddział Zehnder Polska, który swym dynamicznym rozwojem szybko dołączył do grona liderów Grupy Zehnder.

Jako specjalista w dziedzinie designu Zehnder inspiruje do poszukiwania nowych, niekonwencjonalnych rozwiązań. Proponuje unikatowe formy, dbając przy tym o ciągłe rozwijanie kompetencji w zakresie innowacyjnej technologii oraz komfortowego użytkowania produktów marki Zehnder. Kompleksowe i komfortowe rozwiązania przeznaczone są do budynków mieszkalnych, komercyjnych i przemysłowych, zarówno nowych, jak i wymagających renowacji.

Name: KlimaShop! GmbH
Description:
Erfahrung und Innovation – auf diese Werte setzt das 1969 gegründete Klimatechnikunternehmen KlimaShop! GmbH. Der Betrieb vertreibt Klimaanlagen zum energiesparenden Heizen und Kühlen an private und gewerbliche Kunden im Großraum Augsburg/München bzw. in ganz Süddeutschland. Seit 1995 führen die Brüder Armin und Peter Spengler die Geschäfte und rücken seitdem die Themen Nachhaltigkeit und Klimaverantwortung ins Zentrum der Unternehmensphilosophie.

Als Experte für klimafreundliche Klimatechnik entwirft der KlimaShop! individuelle Klimakonzepte, um verschiedenste Büro-, Verkaufs- und Schulungsräume sowie Hotels und Privaträume mit modernen Klimaanlagen auszustatten. Dabei kompensiert das Projekt KlimaWald! jedes Watt installierter Kälteleistung durch die Pflanzung eines Baumes. Das Aufforstungsprojekt stellt außerdem eine der drei Säulen des komplett klimaneutralen Firmenkomplexes in Friedberg bei Augsburg dar: Der KlimaWald! kompensiert die Emissionen des Fuhrparks, während Photovoltaik zum Betrieb der Wärmepumpe und CO2-neutraler Strom aus heimischer Wasserkraft genutzt werden.

Kundenzufriedenheit steht für die Klimaanlagenbauer im Fokus: Zu den Leistungen gehören die umfassende persönliche Beratung vor Start des Klimatisierungsauftrags, die Beschaffung modernster Klimaanlagen, deren fachgemäße Installation und ihre regelmäßige Wartung. KlimaShop! vertraut dafür auf ausgebildetes Fachpersonal im Verkauf, Montage und Service.

Name: TROX Middle East
Description:
Breathing is life. 
With every breath we take, we inhale oxygen – an invisible rhythm that we all share, that drives us all forward. The cleaner the air, the better we feel. All the more so in the place in which we spend most of our lives: indoors. This has been our main focus since 1951. What began back then as a small start-up with just a single product has since grown into a corporate group that operates around the world. The TROX GROUP: the world’s leading provider of ventilation and air conditioning systems.

Our success is built on a foundation of technological excellence, constant innovation, and a commitment to sustainable, people-first engineering. Inspired by the vision of our founder, Heinz Trox, we continue to uphold the principle that “people are our benchmark and their well-being our mission.” 
This philosophy shapes everything we do — from R&D and manufacturing to how we build long-term partnerships with our clients.

Across the Middle East, TROX solutions power some of the region’s most iconic architectural achievements, reinforcing our reputation for German engineering precision and reliability. 
Our references include:
> New Doha Airport
> Qatar Foundation Headquarters
> Burj Al Arab
> Dubai International Airport
> Dubai Mall
> Burj Khalifa
> The Avenues Mall, Kuwait
> Royal Opera House, Muscat
> King Abdullah University of Science and Technology, KSA

These landmark projects stand as proof of our capability to support ambitious designs with high-performance indoor climate solutions.

From nurseries and hospitals to laboratories, hotels, office towers, industrial facilities, concert halls, and sports arenas — TROX ensures that every space breathes with purpose. Our systems are designed to protect health, enhance comfort, and create environments where people can thrive.

Because when the air is pure, people perform better — and architecture truly comes alive.

Name: Artico Indústria de Refrigeração
Description:
A Ártico Indústria de Refrigeração está no mercado desde 1960 e foi pioneira no ramo de refrigeração comercial em Santa Catarina. O parque industrial está instalado em Blumenau e uma ampla rede de representantes comerciais atende em todas as regiões do País. 

A empresa atua com três linhas de produtos: Câmaras frigoríficas, congeladores e instalações comerciais. Destacam-se as linhas de câmaras desmontáveis e as de congelamento rápido, congeladores comerciais, a linha walk-in, expositores refrigerado, seco e estufa, buffet térmico e refrigerado, geladeiras para estocagem, geladeira vitrine, balcões refrigerados e instalações comerciais completas. 

 Os equipamentos produzidos pela Ártico são ecologicamente corretos, o gás refrigerante utilizado é livre de CFC e inofensivo à camada de ozônio. A eficiência energética também é um diferencial e o consumo energético é baixo, assim como o índice de manutenção gerado. Isso porque como isolante térmico a Ártico utiliza o poliuretano injetável  de alta densidade, que proporciona melhor desempenho ao equipamento. 

O design aplicado nos balcões e instalações comerciais é sofisticado e sempre atual, em projetos desenvolvidos com exclusividade, conforme a necessidade de cada cliente e produzidos em marcenaria industrial de alta qualidade. 

As principais empresas do País utilizam produtos da Ártico Indústria de Refrigeração: Nestlé, Duas Rodas, Volvo, Audi, Kopenhagen, Cacau Show, Habib´s, Spoletto, Sodexo do Brasil, Sesi Serviço de Alimentação entre muitos outros como rede de hotéis, supermercados, padarias, sorveterias e laboratórios espalhados por todo o Brasil.

Name: BITZER Australia
Description:
In Australia and New Zealand, BITZER is a technology leader not just in compressors, but also in engineered refrigeration packages, pressure vessels and air conditioning solutions. In addition, BITZER's dedicated heat exchange business, BUFFALO TRIDENT, has a wealth of experience in designing both off-the-shelf and completely custom made heat exchange solutions.

BITZER’s history in Australia stretches back to the 1960's with a Sydney based BITZER distributor, W H Evans. The company sold its first screw compressor rack in 1987 and soon found a niche in custom designed and engineered compressor systems.

Two years later, the factory was bought by German company BITZER International (now BITZER Kühlmaschinenbau GmbH), and BITZER Australia was born.

The company expanded its manufacturing capabilities to include a range of refrigeration and HVAC&R equipment with BITZER compressors at the heart of each product. The ISO9001 accredited facility based in St Marys NSW now produces a complete range of added value products including condensing units, pressure vessels, natural refrigerant systems and transcritical CO2 systems, with an emphasis on user-friendliness, efficiency and environmentally sound technology.

BITZER also has a dedicated office and warehouse in Auckland to ensure NZ customers are well serviced with timely deliveries and a local sales team.

With the partnership of BITZER and BUFFALO TRIDENT you can rely on the quality of our products and our worldwide spectrum of services as your guarantee.

Name: enVerid Systems, Inc.
Description: enVerid Systems’ award-winning Sorbent Ventilation Technology (SVT) reduces the cost and carbon emissions of heating, ventilating, and air conditioning commercial buildings and increases their resiliency to polluted outside air. SVT delivers these benefits by filtering harmful contaminants from indoor air so that indoor air quality can be maintained with less outside air ventilation, which is energy intensive and expensive to condition and may be polluted. Reducing outside air requirements enables building owners to install smaller, less expensive HVAC systems that use less energy and to operate existing HVAC systems more energy efficiently. SVT is available in systems sold by leading HVAC manufacturers such as Daikin and Oxygen8 and in enVerid’s HVAC Load Reduction (HLR) modules, which can be easily integrated with HVAC systems from any manufacturer. Over 1,000 HVAC systems with SVT have been designed into commercial, academic, and government buildings globally over the past ten years in full compliance with ASHRAE Standard 62.1 and the International Mechanical Code. SVT can also be used to earn LEED and WELL points.

Het alternatief voor gas is het opwekken van elektriciteit door middel van wind, water en zon. Deze gezonde en duurzame energie vervangt in rap tempo het gas.
Het aanbod van het duurzame elektra kunnen wij zeer gemakkelijk afnemen hierdoor is Nederland niet meer afhankelijk van gas.  MasterWatt wil u laten zien dat huizen eb bedrijfsgebouwen voorzien van geheel electrisch verwarmen goedkoper, duurzamer en energie-efficienter is.
Door innovatieve ontwikkelingen in de bouwtechniek als kierdichtheid, HR++ beglazing en hoogwaardige isolatie is de warmtevraag van een gebouw of woning steeds lager geworden. Hierdoor zijn we in staat om met minder warmte een aangenaam klimaat te creëren. Ook de panelen voor zonne-energie maken goede ontwikkelingen door en de opbrengst per m2 wordt alsmaar beter. Hierdoor zijn we vandaag de dag in staat om de energie die nodig is voor verwarming zelf op te wekken en aangekomen op het punt waar met geringe investeringen een woning zelfvoorzienend kan zijn in energieverbruik.
Door meer gebruik te maken van zuivere opwekking en duurzame klimaatsystemen kunnen we goedkoper en schoner energie gebruiken. MasterWatt wil mee helpen in deze transformatie van energie-onbewust naar energie-bewust.
MasterWatt specialiseert zicht in elektrische afgiftesystemen. Elektrische verwarming met een mooi design, hoge kwaliteit en voorzien van een uitgebreide regeling. Deze systemen zijn duurzaam en energie-efficiënt.

KLIMA-THERM has been operating in the HVACR (Heating, Ventilation, Air-Conditioning, Refrigeration) industry since 1996 as the General Representative of the Japanese concern FUJITSU GENERAL in Poland and an international group of capital-related companies, dynamically operating on the Polish market, in Northern Europe and in the United States.

The company provides the most modern air conditioning, ventilation, refrigeration and heating solutions on the market. Its key competitive advantage is a broad portfolio of equipment from several recognized global brands, i.e. the flagship brand FUJITSU, KLIMA-THERM by CLINT, KLIMA-THERM by Sabiana, and its own brand - KAISAI. 

The company's product range includes Split and Multi Split air conditioners, Airstage VRF variable refrigerant flow Comfort Air Conditioning systems, chilled water systems, fan coil units, precision air conditioning cabinets, domestic heat pumps, high-power heat pumps, recuperators and dehumidifiers. The second pillar of the Klima-Therm Group's business, besides distribution, is the production of air conditioning and ventilation units under the KLIMOR brand.

KLIMA-THERM Group has thousands of completed projects to its credit. Hotels, banks, office buildings, apartment buildings, government offices, car dealerships, stores and shopping malls, universities, hospitals, industrial complexes - in practice, standard and highly specialized systems from KLIMA-THERM's offer take care of air comfort in buildings and facilities with a wide range of purposes, all over Poland and many places in the world. Such a large scale of investments is, above all, a testimony to the highest quality of the offered air conditioning and ventilation products, as well as to the great trust that private and public sector investors have in the company.

Name: PJ Mechanical.
Description:
Since its inception in 1971, P.J. Mechanical Corp. has served New York as the clear leader in the construction, installation, service and maintenance of H.V.A.C. systems. 
 
In today's business climate, many companies have specific building and technical requirements. Our executive, project management and technical service staff specializes in office construction, fabrication, installation of new systems, as well as renovations, alterations and upgrades. In addition, we are experienced and knowledgeable about your business' specialty needs such as data center outfitting and communication network system's environmental demands. Our core and shell experienced project management team attends to the implementation of every job from the ground up and works closely with in house contract administrators, estimators, purchasing agents, and an on site construction and installation team to assure every client of the best job possible. 

With our affiliates, Delta Sheet Metal, Expert Insulation Corp., and PJ Mechanical Service & Maintenance Corp., we provide our clients with a one stop, full service source to meet all of their H.V.A.C. contracting needs. 
 
Our service and maintenance organization, PJ Mechanical Service & Maintenance Corp., provides the same level of excellent service to all of our clients. Our staff is knowledgeable and prepared to service your HVAC system. We work with our customers to design a preventive maintenance programs to suit both the technical needs of the equipment and the needs of the end user. We endeavor to provide timely, courteous and professional service, 24 hours a day, 7 days per week.

Name: EffectiV HVAC Inc.
Description:
EffectiV HVAC manufactures and supplies high-performance architectural diffusers to improve energy efficiency, thermal comfort and air quality in commercial and institutional buildings. 

EffectiV’s large selection of specialty diffusers help improve air mixing in a wide variety of applications. Their appealing designs bring a perfect balance between architectural requirements and mechanical engineering objectives. 

Products include UV diffusers, high induction swirl diffusers, linear diffusers, nozzle jet diffusers, adjustable diffusers, thermodynamic diffusers and constant air volume dampers.

EffectiV diffusers are found in thousands of buildings across North America, including office buildings, schools, hospitals, airports, retail stores, hotels, restaurants, factories and more.

We thrive on supplying only the best quality products and offering great support and training to architects and engineers.

Name: SWEGON FRANCE
Description:

Name: Swegon España
Description:
Swegon es un fabricante en el sector del clima interior. Somos un proveedor de sistemas completos. Nuestra oferta incluye sistemas de ventilación, calefacción, refrigeración y optimización del clima, así como servicios conectados y asistencia técnica especializada.

Somos especialistas en soluciones para el clima interior que funcionan exactamente como se espera, añadiendo valor desde el principio hasta el final del proyecto, y también una vez finalizado. Nos tomamos muy en serio la calidad del clima interior, por eso nuestra ambición es ser el proveedor líder en soluciones en este campo.

Nuestro enfoque para conseguirlo es continuar desarrollando productos innovadores con inteligencia incorporada, de manera que su combinación y la intercomunicación entre ellos ofrezcan los sistemas de climatización más eficientes para cada tipo de edificio.

El objetivo de Swegon es velar por la salud y el confort de las personas que ocupan los edificios. Esta es nuestra pasión: "Feel Good Inside".

Swegon tiene filiales y distribuidores en todo el mundo, 24 plantas de producción en Europa, América del Norte y la India y 6 laboratorios de investigación y desarrollo. La compañía emplea a más de 3.800 personas. 

Como parte del Grupo Latour, contamos con el respaldo necesario para seguir desarrollando nuestro modelo de negocio como la compañía de referencia en el clima interior.

ENTREPRISE CERTIFIÉE QUALIBAT Mention RGE
Les qualifications professionnelles QUALIBAT constituent la reconnaissance des compétences de l’entreprise, de sa capacité à réaliser des travaux dans une activité donnée, à un niveau de technicité défini.
Pour la plupart des qualifications, Missenard Climatique  bénéficie du degré d’expertise maximum (technicité supérieure ou exceptionnelle), preuve de son niveau de maîtrise élevé.

Name: ILERFRED
Description:
INDUSTRIAL LERIDANA DEL FRIO, S.L., con nombre comercial ILERFRED con sede central en Lleida, y delegaciones en Barcelona (Mercabarna), y Zaragoza (La almunia) se dedica desde hace más de 25 años a la instalación, diseño, puesta en marcha y mantenimiento de instalaciones frigoríficas (frío industrial y refrigeración), ya sea con gases refrigerantes fluorados o grandes instalaciones con amoniaco o CO2.

En nuestras instalaciones, disponemos de taller propio para la reparación de todo tipo de compresor frigorífico (frío industrial y refrigeración). 
En ILERFRED hemos diseñado, y ejecutado instalaciones de diversa envergadura para todos los sectores (Sector hortofrutícola, el sector cárnico, químico, pescado, túneles de oreo, túneles de congelación, platos preparados, salas de trabajo, cámaras de congelación, mataderos, secaderos de embutidos, cámaras de control de humedad, cámaras de alta humedad, cámaras de fermentación controlada, etc …
En cada instalación nuestro departamento técnico e ingeniería asesora al cliente en función de la mejor solución.

Desde nuestros inicios, en 1986, nuestro principal y único objetivo es su SATISFACCIÓN, en ILERFRED trabajamos para nuestros CLIENTES. 

FRIO INDUSTRIAL. ATMOSFERA CONTROLADA. SECADEROS. REFRIGERACION. FRED INDUSTRAL. REFRIGERACIO. INDUSTRIAL LERIDANA DEL FRIO, S. L.

About ACMA;
Acma Engineers Pte Ltd (AE) was incorporated in Singapore since 1968. It is a subsidiary of Acma Ltd (Formerly know as China Auto Corporation Ltd), a Public Listed Company in Singapore.


Over the years, AE has imported ranges of Hitachi Air-conditioners from various Hitachi factories around the world like Japan, Taiwan, Philippines, Spain, Malaysia and China. These Hitachi Central Air-conditioners are mainly sold to both the contractors and consumers in the domestic market from the 70’s.
In the early 1980’s, AE established itself as the main exporter for Hitachi Central and domestic air-conditioners to countries like Sri Lanka, Maldives, Papua New Guinea, Indonesia, India, Malaysia, Seychelles, Vietnam, and Russia etc. AE also worked with many trusted contractors in these respective countries.
Under its distributorship, Hitachi becomes one of the best selling and preferred brands in the specialized market in Singapore and around its region.
In 1990’s, with the reform and opening up of policies in PRC market, AE has made inroads into the market by selling compressors and SKD air-conditioners to various appliance manufacturers. In order to provide a better service to its customers and increase in the market share, AE has established a representative office in Shanghai and acquired Acma Engineers Ltd in Hong Kong in 1993.
Through AE’s effort and close rapport with the PRC manufacturers, the company has proudly achieved a turnover of S$50 Million in 1994.

Name: Mojave Energy Systems, Inc.
Description:
Mojave produces novel liquid desiccant systems designed to change the nature of air conditioning by dramatically increasing energy efficiency and reducing the climate impact of AC. Mojave’s patented technology cools and dehumidifies the air, enabling the independent control of dew point and dry bulb. By focusing on dehumidification, lowering energy consumption, reducing refrigerant use, and improving indoor air quality for commercial buildings, Mojave’s ArctiDry product is an ideal solution for Dedicated Outdoor Air Systems (DOAS). When compared to other alternatives on the market, ArctiDry offers a highly reliable, lowest cost-of-ownership product that reduces energy use by 40 to 60%.

ArctiDry Systems also provide:
- An unparalleled ISMRE2 efficiency rating of up to 11 lbs/kWh, which dramatically lowers electricity consumption by up to 50 percent while in cooling mode. 
- The ability to operate in heat pump mode as low as 10 degrees Fahrenheit ambient (with supplemental heating options available for colder climates including gas, electric, and hot water).
- Heating efficiency ISCOP greater than 3.0 (Integrated Seasonal Coefficient of Performance, per AHRI 920 test standard).
- Takes advantage of the compressor it uses in summer to also pump heat from the outdoors into the building in winter, making it a more cost-effective heat source than a conventional gas or electric heater.
- Able to efficiently heat, dehumidify, and cool the air as needed, all in a single easy to install and maintain unit.  
 
HVAC is critical to productivity and comfort in our indoor environments. As a result, it accounts for about 10% of total global electricity use and emits one billion tons of carbon dioxide. What if we could maintain the same comfort, reliability and purchase costs while lowering energy consumption and emissions?

Get in touch with Mojave today.

Name: AirGreen Inc
Description:
AirGreen is a Delaware-based CleanTech firm specializing in innovative HVAC (Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning) technology. We have developed a patented system that provides industry-leading cooling and dehumidification for use where humidity control is critical, as well as improving indoor air quality (IAQ) at reducing operating costs.

Conventional HVAC equipment simply cannot keep up with the increased need to manage humidity and IAQ at required levels. Additionally, in attempting to achieve these target conditions, traditional systems contribute significantly to greenhouse gas emissions, cannot use renewable energy, and waste huge amounts of energy (and thus costs). 

AirGreen’s technology meets all these requirements and is priced competitively in terms of capital costs. Our products are sold as individual modules that can be used in conjunction with existing or other HVAC components, or as standalone air conditioning Packaged Units ready for installation.

AirGreen’s technology is ideal for use in manufacturing sites (e.g., food, pharmaceuticals, batteries, technology), healthcare settings, institutions (e.g., schools, universities, senior living), indoor agriculture, cold rooms, and data centers.

Our heat exchanger consists of a single tube that is fully sanitary and, in terms of pressure drop, is similar to a drawn straight tube.

Torus Cooling applies its heat exchangers in various industries and in capacities ranging from 1kW to 1 MW. Tadiran Italia ha sede a Montebelluna, in provincia di Treviso, con un polo logistico a Livorno che, grazie agli strumenti applicativi esclusivi, gestisce tutte le richieste della rete dei centri di assistenza, dalla definizione dei ricambi alla selezione e spedizione. La consegna dei ricambi è assicurata in 24h e l’intervento per riparazioni entro 24/48h. Tutti i prodotti sono testati presso il Centro di Ricerca Tadiran di Afula e personalizzati per rispondere agli standard e alle esigenze del mercato italiano. Tra le competenze distintive di Tadiran c’è la qualità del servizio post-vendita, già riconosciuta a livello globale, grazie alle app gratuite My Tadiran, dedicata all’utente finale, e Tadiran Force pensata per installatori e centri assistenza.

Description:
Pratik Servis, HVAC ekipmanlarına yönelik uzman bakım ve servis hizmetleri sunan bir ekiptir. Müşterilerimizin iş sürekliliğini ön planda tutarak, iklimlendirme sistemlerinin en yüksek verimlilikte çalışmasını sağlamak için buradayız. Yılların deneyimi ve sektör bilgisiyle, alanında yetkin teknisyenlerimizle, hem ticari hem de konut projelerine kapsamlı teknik servis ve bakım hizmetleri sunuyoruz.

 

Vizyonumuz, her bir müşterimizin ihtiyaçlarına özel çözümler üreterek, uzun ömürlü ve güvenilir HVAC sistemlerinin sürekliliğini sağlamak. Müşteri memnuniyetine verdiğimiz önemle, sektördeki yenilikleri takip ederek en son teknikleri ve ürünleri uygulamak için sürekli olarak kendimizi geliştiriyoruz. Eğitimli ve deneyimli ekibimizle, her türlü HVAC sistemine yönelik yenilikçi çözümler sunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Sağladığımız hizmetler arasında;

 

Periyodik bakım,
Temizlik,
Acil onarım,
Sistem kurulumu,
Enerji verimliliği danışmanlığı,
Parça yenileme / değişim yer almaktadır.

 

Amacımız, hem enerji tasarrufu sağlamak hem de ürünlerin sürekliliğini artırmaktır.

 

Vizyonumuz, sadece günümüzün ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak değil, geleceğin HVAC çözümlerini yaratmak ve sektördeki standartları yükseltmektir. Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla, HVAC sistemlerinizin ihtiyaçlarını en iyi şekilde anlayarak, size en uygun çözümleri sunmak için buradayız. Biz, güvenilir bir ortak olarak, her adımda yanınızdayız.

Oggi G.3.A. è partner di ENI e, attraverso gli Eni Plenitude Store di Cuneo, Saluzzo, Mondovì e Savigliano, offre anche a privati e famiglie manutenzione e installazione di impianti di riscaldamento e climatizzazione, soluzioni di risparmio energetico e fotovoltaico, check-up energetico e contratti energia gas e luce.

Description:
Seeley International is a global leader in developing innovative HVAC equipment, ranging from the world-leading, hyper-efficient cooling solution, the Climate Wizard, to a comprehensive suite of other heating and cooling products. Its long-standing track record demonstrates ongoing innovation, expertise, infrastructure, and resources to seamlessly design, manufacture, and distribute HVAC solutions worldwide.

Headquartered in Adelaide, with factories in Adelaide (South Australia) and Albury (New South Wales), the company was founded by Frank Seeley, AM FAICD, who remains Chairman.

Seeley International has been manufacturing air conditioners since 1972 and, unlike many of its competitors, designs and manufactures most of the components for its products within Australia.

Seeley International is the world leader in evaporative cooling, including the most advanced M-Cycle Indirect Evaporative Cooling solutions. With offices in Italy, France, the United Kingdom, the USA, South Africa, and of course Australia, the company ensures a strong commitment to both local and international markets, providing everyday support to dealers and distributors.

Evaporative and Indirect Evaporative cooling products have a plethora of applications and are the perfect solution to cool large commercial or industrial buildings or semi-open areas. These products are:
- COST-EFFECTIVE: Due to low-energy consumption.
- ECO-FRIENDLY: Since they use no harmful refrigerants, only R-718 (water) and fresh outside air.
- AFFORDABLE: Easy to install with very low maintenance requirements.
- SUPERIOR QUALITY: Proudly Australian innovation, designed, manufactured, and assembled under rigorous quality control in Australia.

Description:
Hakkımızda

Desosan olarak, endüstriyel soğutma ve kurutma teknolojilerinde yenilikçi çözümler üretiyoruz. Chiller, soğutma kuleleri, hava kurutucuları ve yağ soğutucuları gibi geniş bir ürün yelpazesiyle, müşterilerimizin operasyonel verimliliğini artıran, enerji tasarrufu sağlayan ve çevre dostu sistemler sunuyoruz.

Sektördeki tecrübemiz ve uzman ekibimizle, farklı endüstrilerin ihtiyaçlarına özel çözümler geliştiriyoruz. Kalite ve güvenilirliği öncelik kabul ederek, üretimden teslimata kadar tüm süreçlerde en yüksek standartları gözetiyoruz.

Desosan, teknolojiyi ve mühendislik bilgisini birleştirerek, sadece bugünün değil, geleceğin ihtiyaçlarını karşılayacak sistemler tasarlıyor. Çevresel sorumluluklarımızın bilincinde olarak, sürdürülebilirlik odaklı ürünlerimizle daha yaşanabilir bir dünya için çalışıyoruz.

Desosan ile güçlenin, soğutma ve kurutma süreçlerinizde fark yaratın!

Name: Aircoil AB
Description:
Vi på Aircoil har Nordens bredaste utbud av batterier, kylmedelkylare, fläktkonvektorer och andra värmeväxlande produkter för att matcha dina behov. Som din egen expert på kyla, värme och ventilation är vi med dig hela vägen, in warm and cool. 

Vi finns här för dig och hjälper gärna till

Hållbarhet genomsyrar mycket av det vi gör
Exempelvis fokuserar vi på hög kvalitet, hållbara kundrelationer och ett stort hållbarhetstänk. 

Vi vägleder dig till rätt lösning
När du som kund kommer till oss på Aircoil med ditt behov ger du oss ett stort förtroende, vilket vi tar på största allvar. Vår långa erfarenhet har gett oss bred kunskap som ger oss möjlighet att lösa det mesta.  Allt för att du ska känna dig trygg och nöjd under hela processen, från behov till färdig leverans.

Flexibilitet
Flera starka partners ger oss fördelar. Vi får en oberoende ställning och kan vid varje tillfälle välja det bästa från varje leverantör. Våra inköpsvolymer är stora vilket innebär bra ekonomi för dig som kund.

Kunskap och service
För oss är helheten viktig. En av våra grundpelare är givetvis våra medarbetares kunskap och erfarenhet, men minst lika viktigt är att vi finns tillgängliga för dig som kund från start till mål.

Europas bästa tillverkare

Name: KE Fibertec Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Sie kennen doch die großen, grauen Blechkanäle, die man manchmal an den Decken von z.B. Supermärkten sieht. Mächtige Luftverteilsysteme aus Blech mit mehr oder weniger sinnvollen Anbauten, um die Luft, die durch eine Klimaanlage gekühlt bzw. erwärmt wird, im Raum zu verteilen. Im Regelfall mit punktuellen Luftauslässen, die sich sehr oft durch einen unangenehmen (kalten) Luftstrom bemerkbar machen. Viel Luft, wenig (Ausblas-)Fläche - das Resultat kennt man leider: Es zieht!
 
Genau hier kommt die textile Luftverteilung von KE Fibertec zum Einsatz, um eine zugfreie Klimatisierung zu erreichen: An ein Klimagerät oder an einer aufwendig installierten Klimaanlage wird die textile Luftverteilung (Textilschläuche oder auch Textilkanäle genannt) angeschlossen und die gesamte Oberfläche der Textilkanäle wird als Luftauslass genutzt. Dadurch verringert sich die Gefahr von Zugerscheinungen im Aufenthaltsbereich. Deshalb sind Textilkanäle in der Lüftungstechnik auch so wichtig.
 
Wirkungsweise: Einströmende Luft bläst den Textilschlauch auf. Durch den entstehenden Druck wird die Luft mit einer sehr geringen Austrittsgeschwindigkeit durch das Gewebe gedrückt und so im Raum verteilt. Textile Luftverteilung bedeutet Lüftungstechnik auf hohem Niveau, wenn man die Parameter umsetzen kann.

Araç buzdolapları ve mutfak üniteleri üretmek amacıyla 1997 senesinde faaliyete geçen Starcool, sektöründe bir marka haline gelmenin haklı gururunu yaşamaktadır. En son teknolojiye sahip makine parkuru ve alanında uzmanlaşmış personel kadrosu ile Kocaeli Gebze'de 12.000 m2'lik üretim alanında hizmet vermektedir.

Tüm faaliyetlerinde uluslararası standartlara uygunluğu ve sürekli gelişmeyi hedefleyip her geçen gün artan talep ve ihtiyaçların tamamını karşılayacak mükemmel kalitedeki ürünlerin rekabetçi fiyatlarla üretilmesini ve kalitesinin devamlılığını sağlamaktadır.

Starcool, gelişen teknoloji ve değişen müşteri beklentilerini yakından takip eden uzman AR-GE kadrosu sayesinde, bünyesine yeni laboratuvarlar ekleyip düzenli makine yatırımları gerçekleştirerek dahil olduğu sektörlerde öncü ve güçlü bir firma olarak Türkiye ekonomisine ve sanayisine verdiği katkıyı her geçen gün arttırmaktadır.

Name: TEC FRED SERVEI SL
Description:
TEC-FRED SERVEI, S.L.U. was founded in 1994. The company is located in Terrassa, the capital of Vallès Occidental, and is situated 30 kilometers from Barcelona.

TEC-FRED combines the design and execution of installations, as well as the marketing and after-sales technical service of equipment for the generation and treatment of compressed air, refrigeration installations, and air conditioning.

The company caters to the entire industrial sector, regardless of activity, and its main clients include manufacturers, engineering firms, installers, and distributors of industrial equipment.

We have an extensive network of technical support covering the major industrial areas of Spain, aiming to ensure the best after-sales service for our products to our customers.

Currently, TECFRED is the official distributor of BOGE, a multinational company with a worldwide presence dedicated exclusively to compressed air, with over 75 years of experience and a leader in production and customer satisfaction in Germany.

Additionally, we are Master Distributors of HANKISON in the Iberian Peninsula. HANKISON, a prominent company specializing in air treatment solutions, has a recognized global presence. The brand is positioned as a leader in innovation and quality in the production of air treatment products. Its commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction has made it a reference in the sector.

Finally, we are official distributors of AYTEK (ITECH), which, with over 30 years of experience, stands out for its specialization in the production of water-cooling systems for industrial and HVAC applications. AYTEK's commitment to quality and innovation has positioned it as a leader in the industry, offering efficient and reliable solutions. This partnership allows us to provide our customers with cutting-edge products backed by AYTEK's solid experience.

Name: Impeccable Air
Description:
Welcome to Impeccable Air, where innovation meets improved indoor air quality. 

Founded on the principles of enhancing health and comfort in every home, we are dedicated to providing air filtration solutions that are both efficient and aesthetically pleasing.

Our Product:
Filtered Return Vents - At the heart of our product line is our revolutionary two-piece filtered return vent. Designed to seamlessly integrate into the home, these vents are made up of a durable plastic material and work to create a whole home filtration system by filtering the recirculating air at each air return vent.

Our Filter Benefits:
MERV 6 Filters - Effectively capture household contaminants including lint, pollen, dust mites, human/pet dander, mold spores, etc.
Activated Carbon Material - Adsorb harmful odors, chemicals, and gases.
Antimicrobial Coating: Provides 24/7 protection against a wide range of viruses and bacteria.
Our filtered vents not only improve indoor air quality but also extend the life and efficiency of HVAC systems by reducing the load on furnace filters.

Ongoing Filter Replacement
To maintain peak air quality, we provide an easy and reliable filter replacement service. Homeowners can reorder filters directly from us on a quarterly basis, ensuring their systems continue to operate efficiently and effectively.

Support and Education
We believe in empowering our customers with knowledge. Our comprehensive support includes detailed installation guides, maintenance tips, and educational resources on the importance of indoor air quality.

Our Commitment
We are committed to making a tangible difference in the lives of our customers. By prioritizing innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction, we strive to create healthier, more comfortable living environments.

Join us on our journey to impeccable air quality. Connect with us to learn more about our products, services, and how we can help you live in an improved environment.

شرکت سدید انرژی ویرا با برند دیناب به عنوان مرکز تخصصی ساپورتهای مدولار سیستمهای نصب تأسیسات مکانیکی و برقی، از پیشگامان این صنعت در ایران محسوب میشود. فعالیتهای ما شامل طراحی و نظارت بر تأسیسات مسکونی، تجاری، صنعتی و درمانی است. با بهرهگیری از تیمی از کارشناسان و متخصصین مجرب و استفاده از دانش روز دنیا، توانستهایم خدمات با کیفیتی را به بیش از چندین پروژه ساختمانی ارائه دهیم.

از سال 1396، با راهاندازی برند دیناب در فضای آنلاین، فروش محصولات خود را آغاز کرده و به طور مستمر در حال گسترش و بهبود خدمات خود هستیم. هدف ما ارائه راهحلهای نوآورانه و کارآمد برای نیازهای تأسیساتی مشتریانمان است.

به سدید انرژی ویرا بپیوندید و از تخصص و تجربه ما در زمینه سیستمهای نصب تأسیسات بهرهمند شوید.

Name: HUMIAMBIENTE
Description:

A lo largo de estos años hemos trabajado en proyectos de todo tipo: desde la climatización de terrazas y espacios de ocio hasta procesos industriales que requieren control de humedad o eliminación de polvo. También diseñamos soluciones especiales para paisajismo y efectos especiales.

Nuestro compromiso se basa en tres pilares: calidad, servicio y sostenibilidad.

Creemos en un futuro donde confort y sostenibilidad vayan de la mano.

Si necesitas una solución de nebulización eficiente, segura y escalable, podemos ayudarte a evaluar la viabilidad y el retorno esperado en tu espacio.

Name: Advanced Technologies & Services W.L.L
Description:
As the exclusive technical partner of Aeroseal (Ohio, USA) in the Kingdom of Bahrain, ADTECH is redefining HVAC performance through advanced duct sealing technology.

Founded in 2022 and based in Bahrain, we specialize in sealing leaky ductwork from the inside—a clean, non-invasive process that delivers long-term energy savings and improved indoor comfort for both residential and commercial buildings.

At ADTECH, we go beyond sealing. Our services include:

 Air balancing

 Resolving negative pressure issues.

 Troubleshooting HVAC design flaws.

 Providing tailored HVAC and ducting solutions for green field projects.

We're committed to improving building performance, optimizing energy efficiency, and creating healthier indoor environments. If you're facing HVAC challenges or looking to improve system performance, let's connect — we’re here to help you seal, balance, and optimize.

Name: Sterile Safe Solutions
Description:
Sterile Safe Solutions has continued to stay forward-looking. Our goal is simple: Provide the healthiest Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) possible.

Our focus was to find and provide holistic full-system integrated designs that organizations and industries can use with existing buildings and/or in new construction.

To fulfill our promise to provide the healthiest Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) possible, we researched and analyzed performance issues in the latest HVAC components, safety protocols, and government regulations. 

On our journey, we discovered that there are integrative technology platform designs that provide better air filtration and ventilation - but also use less energy consumption, less water usage, fewer chemicals, and reduce Green House Gases (GHG) and a host of other benefits while providing the highest Indoor Air Quality.

Some of the other benefits of our packages that have been assembled are:
Reduced Capital expenditures (Cap-Ex) reduced Operational Expenditures (Op-Ex), reduced maintenance costs, and more overall efficiency within any building structure.

Currently, what appears to be two opposing goals - meeting the mandates and demands to develop carbon-neutral efficiency while also trying to prevent the spread of COVID-19 and any new variants that may emerge - can now be achieved without sacrificing energy efficiency for better and safer IAQ. 

Our teams have developed a system that will provide a much more thorough and unprecedented Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) solution for pathogen filtration and greater health and safety for any indoor environment while achieving overall mechanical engineering and HVAC eco-efficiencies and cost reductions for any new or upgraded building. 

We have assembled the top award-winning manufacturers, engineers, and designers in the HVAC and Indoor Air Quality (IAQ) industry in the world.

Let us help you exceed your goals to reduce overhead, meet eco efficiency objectives and create the safest indoor air quality possible.

PACIFIC olarak, iklimlendirme sektöründe üstün hizmet kalitesi ve yenilikçi çözümler sunma amacıyla yola çıkmıştır. Misyonumuz, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutarak, yaşam alanlarınızı konforlu ve verimli bir şekilde iklimlendirmektir.

Sektördeki deneyimimiz ve uzman kadromuz ile, hem ticari hem de bireysel projelerde en yüksek standartlarda hizmet vermekteyiz.
