PACIFIC olarak, teknolojiyi yakından takip ediyor ve en son yenilikleri müşterilerimize sunuyoruz. Kaliteli ürünlerimiz ve profesyonel hizmet anlayışımızla, hem bireysel hem de kurumsal müşterilerimizin beklentilerini karşılıyoruz. Çevreye duyarlı yaklaşımlarımız ve enerji tasarrufu sağlayan sistemlerimiz ile sürdürülebilir bir gelecek için katkıda bulunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Güçlü bir müşteri memnuniyeti anlayışına sahip olan firmamız, her aşamada şeffaflık, güvenilirlik ve profesyonellik ilkesine bağlı kalmaktadır. Sizi de Pacific ailesinin bir parçası olmaya davet ediyor, iklimlendirme ihtiyaçlarınıza yönelik en iyi çözümleri sunmak için buradayız.

Name: EPCM de Colombia
Description:
El rendimiento de una planta no solo depende de la maquinaria del talento humano.
También depende del entorno en el que todo eso opera.

Cuando el ambiente de trabajo es estable, fresco y bien ventilado, los procesos fluyen mejor, el equipo humano rinde más, y los errores se reducen. Pero cuando no lo es, las consecuencias se acumulan en silencio.

Muchas plantas trabajan con temperaturas elevadas que afectan directamente la productividad, la salud del personal y el estado de los equipos… aunque no siempre se vea reflejado en los reportes.

Y es ahí donde está el problema:
No se ve, pero se siente. Y se paga.

 Menor eficiencia operativa por fatiga térmica
 Productos que se deforman o pierden calidad
 Equipos que fallan por sobrecalentamiento
 Aumento silencioso de consumo energético y mantenimiento
 Rotación, pausas, y deterioro del clima laboral

Esto es lo que llamamos el costo oculto del calor industrial. Y si no se gestiona, afecta directamente la rentabilidad.

En EPCM de Colombia , ayudamos a resolver esto desde la raíz.
Diseñamos soluciones industriales de ventilación y enfriamiento evaporativo adaptadas a las necesidades reales de cada planta.
No vendemos equipos genéricos: ofrecemos ingeniería aplicada que mejora el rendimiento térmico de tu operación, reduce costos, y crea condiciones de trabajo sostenibles.

¿Qué logramos?
 Reducción real de temperatura (hasta 10°C menos sin aire acondicionado)
 Ahorro energético comprobado (hasta 80% menos consumo)
 Estabilidad en procesos sensibles al calor
 Menos errores, menos accidentes, menos rotación
 Mejores condiciones laborales y cumplimiento normativo (BPM, SST, INVIMA)

¿Cómo lo hacemos?
• Sistemas de enfriamiento evaporativo de alta eficiencia
• Proyectos de inyección y extracción de aire industrial
• Ventilación con HVLS
• Consultoría en eficiencia térmica y energética
• Ingeniería, instalación y soporte llave en mano

Name: Shinaizel
Description:
We are a team of undergrad engineering students trying to solve some complex problems lingering in the cooling sector in the most elegant ways possible. We are building body cooling jackets, you can say that it has an air conditioner inbuilt in it which keeps the person cool outside in the hot weather. This product will be particularly useful for heat-exposed working professionals who have to deal with high temperatures during their work like the construction industry, plant workers, mining, policemen, soldiers, farmers, etc. It is also eco-friendly as it runs only on water and consumes very little electricity and also does not heat back the surroundings like air conditioners. 

The jacket runs on water and batteries and the jacket can work for about 8-9 hours in a single charge. The water can go for 3 hours before refill and will take 10-15 seconds for an easy refill without taking off the jacket. The jacket will give the best cooling in the period of hot and dry summers (nearly 3 months), it can cool up to 20°C – 25°C.

Name: POWERVENT VENTILÁTORY
Description:
POWERVENT – Efektívna cirkulácia vzduchu pre úsporu energií a maximálny komfort

Spoločnosť POWERVENT sa špecializuje na dodávku a inštaláciu HVLS ventilátorov (High-Volume, Low-Speed) a systémov destratifikácie. Naše riešenia sú určené pre priemyselné, komerčné a skladové priestory, kde je kľúčová optimalizácia energetickej efektívnosti, zlepšenie pracovného prostredia a výrazné zníženie nákladov na vykurovanie či chladenie.

HVLS ventilátory zabezpečujú efektívnu cirkuláciu vzduchu s nízkymi prevádzkovými nákladmi. Pri pomalom otáčaní dokážu premiestniť veľké objemy vzduchu, čím eliminujú teplotné rozdiely a vytvárajú rovnomernú klímu v celom priestore. Sú ideálne pre výrobné haly, logistické centrá, športové areály či komerčné objekty.

Systémy destratifikácie
Proces destratifikácie efektívne mieša teplý vzduch, ktorý sa hromadí pri strope, s chladnejším vzduchom pri podlahe. Výsledkom je rovnomerná teplota, vyššia energetická efektívnosť a až 30 % úspora nákladov na vykurovanie v zimných mesiacoch.

Priemyselné riešenia na mieru
Navrhujeme riešenia, ktoré presne zodpovedajú potrebám vášho priestoru. Naše systémy sú prispôsobené na optimalizáciu výkonu existujúcich HVAC systémov a zabezpečenie najlepšieho pracovného prostredia pre zamestnancov.

Name: Kinetix Air
Description:
Kinetix provides a software as a service platform that revolutionizes the business of air handling units. Within a single website, designers, manufacturers and all other concerned vendors interact to collaborate and drastically speed up the various processes for producing air handling units from design to delivery. Gone are the days of disjointed interactions with extended project delays. How about reducing the time taken to build a complex air handling unit from weeks and months to days and hours?

Kinetix Air is the air handling manufacturing industry's first fully integrated web-based collaborative software solution which covers the entire life cycle of a typical air handling unit, including:

Parametric design, Sales, Submittals, Purchasing, Manufacturing Drawings, Production scheduling, Shipping, Service. It's a single environment with a powerful, yet simple and intuitive web based, cross-platform user interface.

The platform has a powerful Content Management System (CMS) which allows the full customization and maintenance of the software by the manufacturer’s own administrator, based on the standards and requirements of each products.

Kinetix Air allows all stakeholders to manage a project with a customizable Task Management Tool and with user customized permission levels, all set by the Administrator. Typical users include: the representatives, the manufacturer’s sales, engineering, purchasing, production, shipping, accounting and service departments, all collaborating in real time, over the life of the project.

Name: Norhof LN2 Microdosing Systems
Description:
Norhof LN2 microdosing systems / LN2 auto-fill systems

Norhof manufactures LN2 microdosing systems. Liquid Nitrogen (LN2) is used as the cooling medium and is taken from a storage vessel (Dewar) with low pressure (max. 300 mBar) and delivered (pumped) through a fill line to the application in a micro dosing way. Auto-fill based on LN2 level and / or temperature setpoint with RS232 controlling possibilities 

The Norhof LN2 microdosing system is designed to overcome the drawbacks of LN2 under pressure in which a solenoid valve is used to switch the supply ON / OFF. You may compare the Norhof system with a water tap, but instead of giving water, it gently gives liquid nitrogen, with an adjustable flow, possible to regulate from some drops, up to 1 Liter/minute. Our pump can pump LN2 up to 5 meters above the pump itself

Name: HVACiQ
Description:
Chemsonic - Efficiency transformation of HVAC and chillers - The installation of the Chemsonic catalyst into the refrigerant circuit reduces energy consumption in 3 ways:
1) Oil fouling removal with a surfactant preventing the oil to cling to a surface
2) Lubrication of the compressor, test reveal 54% improvement on lubricity.
3) Improved heat transfer with an increase in refrigerant gas molecule size.
A Sonicwave device is installed onto the filter driers to remove sludge and oil fouling. This ensure smooth gas flow taking the strain off the compressor to minimise kW consumption
This is a retro install process by senior HVAC Engineers. Improvements from the now efficient plant will see improved air off temperatures. This brings the room upto its desired temperature quicker. Thereby reducing the plants on time (duty cycle). Resulting in the 40% savings we are seeing from recent projects.
Data loggers will record kW usage before and after the install to prove the savings achieved. The 3 latest projects resulted in 40%+ savings, customers are delighted with cost reductions and the leap towards carbon net zero.
Please contact us for more details richard@hvaciq.co.uk

Name: Aerapy UV Disinfection
Description:
Founded in 2008, Aerapy manufactures patented and award-winning air and surface ultraviolet germicidal irradiation (UVGI or UV) products. 

Aerapy UV systems are installed across the U.S. and internationally in healthcare facilities and clinics, government facilities, fire stations and emergency medical services (EMS) units, as well as in schools, restaurants and bars, dental offices, salons, veterinary clinics, corporate offices, animal care/service facilities, and more. 

Aerapy is dedicated to developing researched, tested, and study-backed UV systems to help ensure clean and healthy indoor environments. From the beginning, Aerapy has taken the lead in air and surface sanitizing, responding to industry-specific needs. We have teamed with leading UV scientists, healthcare professionals, and engineers in ongoing efforts to help eliminate airborne respiratory sickness and surface disease transmission. Our UV systems have been the subject of university research and field studies and have been shown to kill more than 99.9% of tested virus and bacterial pathogens in ONE air pass, including SARS-CoV-2, the pathogen that causes COVID-19. 

Aerapy is passionate about healthy indoor environments and reliable, non-toxic ways to create them.

Name: Daikin Bulgaria
Description:
С вековна традиция в климатичните системи, задаваме все по-висок стандарт в климатизацията - с технологии, които създават по-добър въздух за хората и по-добро бъдеще за планетата. В България нашата марка е разпознаваема, предпочитана и високо оценявана както от частни клиенти, така и от професионалисти в строителството, инженерните науки и архитектурата. Като част от региона Daikin Central Europe и подкрепени от глобалната експертиза на компанията, ние растем устойчиво и отговорно, като разширяваме портфолиото си и повишаваме качеството на услугите с всяка изминала година.

Нашата мисия е проста: да се грижим за въздуха, който дишаме, като го подобряваме по най-добрия възможен начин. Това означава повече от производство на климатична техника. Означава стремеж към съвършенство във всички продукти и решения.

 Системи, които да създават комфорт във всяко пространство;
 Решения, които пестят енергия;
 Технологии, които пазят околната среда.

Ние сме единственият производител в света, който самостоятелно разработва и произвежда оборудване за отопление, вентилация, климатизация, хладилна техника и хладилни агенти. Работим чрез широка мрежа от обучени монтажници, инженери и партньори, които гарантират професионално обслужване – от консултацията до финалния монтаж и поддръжка. Именно този модел на работа ни превръща в доверен избор за хиляди домакинства и водещи компании у нас.

 Гледаме напред с амбициозна визия - до 2050 г. да бъдем напълно въглеродно неутрална компания – както чрез собствените си операции, така и чрез продуктите, които създаваме. Вярваме, че модерните технологии са пътят към по-чист въздух, по-умни решения и по-устойчив начин на живот. Заедно с нашите клиенти и партньори изграждаме бъдеще, в което комфортът, иновациите и отговорността вървят ръка за ръка.

Свържете се с нас, за да изградим заедно по-устойчиви пространства – с по-чист въздух, интелигентни решения и технологии, които служат дългосрочно както на бизнеса, така и на хората.

Name: Yazaki Energy Systems Inc
Description: Yazaki Energy Systems, Inc. (YESI) is a global leader in the manufacture of non-CFC based absorption chillers and chiller-heaters.  Our gas-fired chiller-heaters can provide cooling or heating, while using much less electricity than a typical electric-powered vapor compression chiller.  Our water-fired chillers or chiller-heaters are ideal for waste heat applications, whether driven by a solar, microturbine, cogeneration, fuel cell, or other waste-heat source.  A Yazaki absorption chiller-heater, using water as the refrigerant, is today's best choice in air conditioning for protecting the environment and reducing the cost of energy. Capacities of 5 through 200 RT are available to either cool or heat installations such as schools, offices, hospitals, industrial facilities, and hotels.  Our founding president, Sadami Yazaki, created our distinctive arrowhead trademark back in 1951 to signify development and progress. The color red symbolizes our passion and spirit of unity. These traits are alive today at Yazaki Energy Systems, Inc. as we strive to offer the best in absorption type chiller-heaters.

Name: Eoptimering
Description:
Detta kyl- och värmepumpsföretag har en stark vision om att skapa en hållbar framtid genom att erbjuda energieffektiva lösningar som drivs av 100% ren energi. Vi är dedikerade till att minska vår klimatpåverkan och hjälpa våra kunder att göra samma sak.

Företaget grundades med en djup förståelse för behovet av att minska energianvändandet och främja en hållbar livsstil. Genom att utveckla högpresterande kyl- och värmelösningar, vill vi hjälpa våra kunder att spara pengar samtidigt som de minskar sin klimatpåverkan.

Vi är specialiserade på att erbjuda skräddarsydda lösningar som passar varje kunds unika behov. Vårt team av erfarna tekniker och ingenjörer arbetar nära tillsammans med kunderna för att utveckla och implementera klimatsystem som ger optimal effektivitet och prestanda.

Vi tror på att ha en holistisk inställning till hållbarhet och miljövänlighet. Därför arbetar vi inte bara med att tillhandahålla energieffektiva lösningar, utan även med att minska vårt eget koldioxidavtryck genom att använda förnybara energikällor och minska avfallet i vårt arbete.

Som ett ledande företag inom hållbar teknik strävar vi efter att alltid vara på framkant med de senaste innovationerna inom branschen. Vi arbetar ständigt med att utveckla nya lösningar som hjälper våra kunder att minska sin klimatpåverkan och öka sin lönsamhet.

Vi tror att genom att arbeta tillsammans med våra kunder, partners och samhället i stort kan vi skapa en bättre framtid för alla. Med ren energi som vår vision, är vi fast beslutna att främja en hållbar livsstil och bidra till en renare och mer hållbar planet.

Name: Harvest Systems
Description: Harvest System’s technology harvests and recycles waste heat in order to reduce operating costs and greenhouse gas emissions in a cost-effective and scalable way.  Currently, the company is focused on the $4.6 billion dollar restaurant industry, where the platform acts as a drop-in replacement for traditional water heaters. Using a novel attachable modular heat reclaimer, waste heat is captured directly from commercial cooking appliances (such as ovens and fryers) and stored in a hot water tank without affecting safety and performance and resulting in an average 2-year payback. The technology was born out of a $1.7M research collaboration between McMaster University, Pizza Pizza Limited, and Enbridge Gas.

Name: Българска асоциация Отопление, вентилация и климатизация (БАОВК)
Description:

БАОВК ще се ангажира с внасянето на съгласувани мнения, предложения и становища по действащи нормативни актове, както и проекти на нови в интерес на развитието на бранша.

БАОВК е създадена от професионалисти в ОВК индустрията, за да осигури високо качество на услугите, предоставяни от членовете ѝ при проектиране и изграждане на системи за отопление, вентилация и климатизация на самостоятелни жилища, обществени сгради и индустриални обекти.

Отоплителните, вентилационните и климатичните инсталации са елементи на техническата инфраструктура и като такива са обект на законови регулации както по време на изграждането ѝ, така и при ситуации на промяна по време на експлоатацията им. Това налага необходимостта от професионална намеса на технически правоспособни лица в съответствие със законовите изисквания и нормативни разпоредби.

Българската асоциация „Отопление, вентилация и климатизация“ (БАОВК) цели да утвърди добрите практики в отрасъла, да осигури тяхното прилагане от членовете си и да създаде условия за повишаване качеството на подготовка на кадрите с цел подпомагане и обучение по съответните направления в специализирани обучителни центрове с последващо доказване на придобитите от тях знания.

We offer advanced products for air, water, and energy industries and consumers, based on fundamental breakthrough in understanding and practical applications of thermodynamics: 20X Less Energy (using natural psychrometric energy from air), 10X Less Cost (using circular, non-metallic and nature-friendly inorganic and biodegradable evaporative material), 10X Less Carbon Footprint.
We develop the real innovative and disruptive 100% off-grid, affordable, ecological, resource efficient water evaporation technology, instead of traditional refrigerant compression in air conditioning, and reverse osmosis water technology and Carnot Cycle-based energy.
Our next goal: bring our products to markets.

A global problem: Cooling a warming planet. 
10% World power generation goes toward air conditioning
We need tangible innovations to revolutionize cooling, heating, water supply for a better world

Name: Saturn Kälte + Klima + Wärmepumpen
Description:
Die Firma Saturn Handels GmbH wurde im März 1979 durch Herrn Martin Lang gegründet.

Schon früh spezialisierte sich der Gründer auf Kälte, Klima und Wärme in allen Varianten. Angefangen in einer kleinen Garage mit Büroanbau, entwickelte sich das Unternehmen über die Jahre. Mit zusätzlichen Unternehmensschwerpunkten wie Nachhaltigkeit und Erneuerbare Energien setzte Martin Lang bereits früh den Grundstein für ein nachhaltiges und umweltbewusstes Unternehmer.

Im Jahr 1996 stieg Jürgen Lang, Sohn von Martin Lang in das Familienunternehmen ein und brachte nach erfolgreicher Ausbildung zum Kälteanlagenbauermeister sein Fachwissen in den Betrieb mit ein. Das Unternehmen wuchs und expandierte und schon bald wurden die Räumlichkeiten zu klein und es stand dann der Umzug in die Pforzheimerstraße 298-300 an.

2005 übernahm Jürgen Lang dann das Unternehmen des Vaters und führte seitdem die Geschäfte erfolgreich fort. Ein moderner Unternehmenssitz mit größeren Lagerflächen und besseren Parkmöglichkeiten für Mitarbeiter und Kundendienstfahrzeuge entstand.

Heute hat sich die Firma Saturn Handels GmbH in der Region Stuttgart als zuverlässiges Fachunternehmen für Kälte, Klima und Wärme etabliert.

המוקד של עסקי הליבה שלנו הוא מפעילי מדפים, שסתומי בקרה, חיישנים ומונים. Belimo פיתחה מכשירים חכמים התומכים ב-IoT עבור מערכות HVAC, המספקים נתונים יקרי ערך ללקוחות כדי לשפר את יעילות ההתקנה וההפעלה, הבקרה והשירות, תוך אופטימיזציה של מבנים בצורה יעילה יותר ומרחוק כדי לענות על צרכי בנייני העתיד.

Belimo, שנוסדה בשנת 1975, מעסיקה למעלה מ-2,300 עובדים ביותר מ-80 מדינות והיא רשומה בבורסה השוויצרית (SIX) מאז 1995.

שביעות רצון הלקוחות ונאמנותנו הפכו אותנו למובילים ב-HVAC ברחבי העולם. ב-Belimo:

Name: HVAC Mechanical Maintenance & Installation Consultants
Description:
HMMI Consultants was formed to address the growing need for independent
assessments and verifications of Installations and Maintenance work within the HVAC (Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning) sector, encompassing Residential, Commercial, and Industrial applications.

In recent years, the industry has witnessed a decline in the overall standard of workmanship and professionalism. This trend has been detrimental to all stakeholders, as maintaining high standards and ensuring safety within the HVAC sector is crucial. The increasing client demand for turnkey solutions, integrating design and supply, further underscores the importance of independent and impartial assessments and verifications. Recognising this critical need, official bodies such as SAIRAC (South African Institute of Refrigeration and Air Conditioning) and SARRACA (South African Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Contractors Association) have been actively promoting initiatives like training programs and the mandatory licensing for safe refrigerant handling. However, despite these efforts, the quality of on-site work continues to fall short of acceptable standards.

HMMI Consultants aims to bridge this gap, by providing independent and impartial assessments and verifications. Ensuring that installations and maintenance work adhere to industry best practices, safety regulations, and quality standards.

1977 yılında Ankara’da faaliyetlerine başlayan GÜNTER KLİMA, sektördeki  gelişmeleri sürekli takip ederek bugünlere gelmiştir. Ülkemiz sanayi ve ekonomisi içerisinde üzerine düşen sorumluluğun bilincinde olan GÜNTER KLİMA, sürekli büyümeyi hedeflemiş,  her yıl yeni istihdam olanakları yaratarak , teknolojinin gereklerini yerine getirip, kalitesini ve  ürün yelpazesini de  geliştirerek sorumluluğunun gerektirdiği şekilde davranmıştır. Kaliteden ödün vermeyen deneyimli kadrosu ve satış sonrası desteğiyle Ankara'da faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.
    
GÜNTER KLİMA, bugüne kadar yapmış olduğu çalışmalardan edindiği tecrübenin ışığında günümüz teknolojisinin sunduğu olanakları da kullanarak ve imalat teknolojisini sürekli yenileyerek dünya piyasalarında daha aktif rol almaya hazırlanmaktadır.

GÜNTER KLİMA, düşük maliyet, kısa zaman ve yüksek kalite ile müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak , sektörün önde gelen firmaları arsında yerini almıştır. Tüm yasal şartlara uygun olarak , üretimini yaptığı tüm ürünleri TSE/TSEK standartlarına uygun ve belgelerine sahip, verim raporlarıyla desteklenmiş ISO 9001:2015 belgesini alarak kalitesini belgelemiştir. Ayrıca 2006/42/AT Makine Emniyeti Yönetmeliğine göre teste tabi tutulmuş,  üretimini yaptığı cihazların  güvenli bir ürün olduğunu gösteren  CE işaretini iliştirme hakkına da sahip olmuştur.

GÜNTER KLİMA, sürekli gelişmekte olan ürün yelpazesi ve her ihtiyaca cevap verebilecek tasarımlarıyla sektörün aranan ismi olmayı başarmanın haklı gururunu yaşamaktadır.

Name: MAGBAG Industries Ltd
Description:
MagBag SludgeBuster is a high-performance filtration solution designed to protect heating and cooling systems from sludge, debris, and magnetite build-up.

Engineered and built by heating professionals.

SludgeBuster units are built to meet British and (VDI) German standards, with optional adaptations that futureproof your installation. These include:

* Magnesium anode integration, transforming the unit into a combined bag filter and magnesium reaction tank

* Port provisions for adding a demineralisation unit, supporting long-term system health

* Dosing pot capability for adding system protection inhibitors or cleaning chemicals

The SludgeBuster range combines powerful magnetic capture with fine-particle bag filtration — delivering serious system protection.

 Products

Smiddy — for large domestic, light commercial, and mid-commercial systems

Middy — for light commercial, mid-commercial, and full commercial systems

BigBag — for mid-commercial, full commercial, and industrial applications

DuoCore (coming soon) — dual-chamber magnetic + bag filtration with isolatable chambers

Each model is available with a choice of bag micron ratings: 0.5, 1, 5, 10, 20, 30, or 50 micron — so you can select the level of protection your system needs.

 Features

* Inline or side-stream installation flexibility

* Vertical magnetic rod basket straining + refined bag filtration

* No cartridges — no drama

* Customizable for system flow rates and specific applications

* Optional BMS-compatible pressure sensors or manual differential pressure gauges

 Services

* Bespoke system filtration consultations

* On-site product demonstrations (by request)

* Support with design and specification for commercial projects

* Supply of filter bags, gaskets, and service kits

Sludge doesn’t stand a chance. #sludgebuster

MagBag SludgeBuster — Built for engineers. Not just installers.

Dehumidification – maintaining ideal humidity levels (45–60%) to prevent condensation, mold, and property damage.

Fresh Air Supply – with three-stage filtration (Pre-filter, HEPA, Activated Carbon) to remove dust, VOCs, and odors.

Air Purification – plasma module that neutralizes mold spores, bacteria, and viruses.

Comfort & Efficiency – stable indoor climate without over-cooling, reducing AC load and energy costs.

We serve homeowners, villa developers, interior designers, and facility managers who want to protect interiors, improve health, and enhance comfort.

Our mission is simple:
 “A healthier, drier, and more comfortable living environment for every home in the UAE.”

Name: X vent
Description:
X vent was founded 2014 on the idea, if we can’t find any product that’s adequate, lets invent and make it. 
We specialize in delivering HVAC/ventilation solutions for indoor fish farms, and extreme environments, we deliver solutions in HDPE, PP, PPs and focus on long lasting materials. We do complete installations from unites to ductwork and electrical/fiber connections together with programing, in etc. Siemens/Allen Bradley for any SCADA System and has been doing so since 2014
 
And together with HVAC we do also focus on degassing for fish farms indoor and outdoor, either combined with the HVAC units or as standalone degassing, we have developed our own vertical degassing wheel, the solution only use water as a drive forces, and have a very low head 750 mm, the wheel design is compact and can reduce foot print by op to 70% compared to shallow degassers or conventional trickling towers/filters, and the solution is very easy to clean, the degassing wheel is developed in the years from 2015-18 and has been running on commercial farms since 2018  

And from 2021, the newest branches in X Vent is high air volume heat exchange for hot/cold air more than +250 Celsius and down to -35 degrees Celsius in the same unit, this is by far the most extreme conditions temperature vise, we have yet encountered, and it takes craftsmanship and engineering to the extreme. The unites are made in Stainless steel and special insulation and sealing solutions

so we specialize in extremes and have both standardized products and custom made products

The Green Box is its large refrigeration machines division. At the Green Box, we offer a range of dependable, IoT-Enabled, energy-efficient walk-in cold rooms that helps us supporting and servicing industries such as pharma, ice-creams, dairy, seeds, frozen foods, poultry, confectionery, horticulture, floriculture, drone manufacturers, automotive companies, defense and many more.

Each of our cold rooms is customized to the specific requirements of our clients with respect to temperature (+200 deg C to -86 deg C), relative humidity (from -40 deg dew point to 95%), energy efficiency, corrosion resistance, and size. Our walk-in chambers come with the option of a cloud-based IoT system which enables us to continuously monitor and proactively trigger maintenance alerts. With this, we are able to ensure uninterrupted performance and the long life of the Cold Room.

Our company's tagline is SIMPLY EFFICIENT AND SMART.

SIMPLY EFFICIENT :
Most Green Box products are energy efficient.TGB offers various options to get efficient use of higher PUF insulation thickness panels, EC fans, smart temperature controller, capacity modulation using multiple machines. Certain Combinations result in efficiency-boosting of up to 60%, depending on the selection.

SIMPLY SMART:
Data and its smart uses can make any device smart. The same goes for cold rooms. We offer an IoT-enabled eyebox device along with our products. Our eyebox is connected to the internet permanently.it transmits all important data regarding power, temperature, door openings, etc to the cloud server is not a physical server and hence failsafe.

OUR GOAL: is to  "offer the best in refrigeration technology to our clients"

Name: Aircoil AS
Description:
Aircoil har Nordens største utvalg av batterier, kjølemiddelkjølere og andre varmevekslere for å dekke dine behov. Som din personlige ekspert innen kjøling, oppvarming og ventilasjon er vi med deg hele veien, in warm and cool.

Vi er her for deg og hjelper deg gjerne

Bærekraft gjennomsyrer mye av det vi gjør
Derfor er høy kvalitet, langsiktige kunderelasjoner og sterk fokus på bærekraft viktige aspekter av virksomheten vår.

Vi veileder deg til den riktige løsningen
Når du som kunde kommer til oss på Aircoil med behovet ditt, gir du oss stor tillit, noe vi tar på største alvor. Vår lange erfaring har gitt oss gode kunnskaper som gir oss mulighet til å løse det meste.  Alt for at du skal føle deg trygg og fornøyd i hele prosessen, fra behov til gjennomført levering.

Fleksibilitet
Flere sterke partnere gir oss fordeler. Vi har en uavhengig stilling, og i hvert enkelt tilfelle kan vi velge det beste fra hver leverandør. Innkjøpsvolumene våre er store, noe som innebærer god økonomi for deg som kunde.

Kunnskap og service
For oss er helheten viktig. En av grunnpilarene våre er selvfølgelig kunnskapen og erfaringen til medarbeiderne våre, men det er minst like viktig at vi er tilgjengelige for deg som kunde fra start til mål.

Europas beste produsenter
Vi har med stor nøyaktighet håndplukket det beste av det beste for å kunne tilby varmevekslere som oppfyller nettopp dine behov når det gjelder funksjoner, materiale og leveringstid.

Aircoil AS – En del av Aircoil Group

Aircoil AS og Aircoil AB er en av Nordens ledende leverandører av varmevekslende produkter. Konsernet Aircoil Group, består av svenske Arcoil AB og norske Aircoil AS. Aircoil har vært på det svenske markedet siden 1970.

Name: Groupe Atlantic Polska
Description:
Groupe Atlantic Polska to wiodący dostawca innowacyjnych rozwiązań w dziedzinie HVAC. Do naszego portfolio należą marki Atlantic, ACV oraz Austria Email. Nasza firma jest częścią międzynarodowej grupy Groupe Atlantic, która od ponad 50 lat wprowadza na rynek najwyższej jakości produkty i usługi, zmieniając sposób, w jaki doświadczasz komfortu w swoim domu, miejscu pracy lub przemyśle.

NASZE MARKI:
 Atlantic - Z dumą reprezentujemy markę Atlantic, która oferuje nowoczesne, energooszczędne rozwiązania grzewcze. Nasze produkty, w tym pompy ciepła, grzejniki elektryczne i wiele innych, są projektowane z myślą o ekologii i oszczędnościach energii.

 ACV - Jako część Groupe Atlantic, ACV to światowy lider w dziedzinie systemów grzewczych oraz ciepłej wody użytkowej. Nasze technologie są znane z niezawodności i efektywności energetycznej.

 Austria Email - Nasza grupa jest również dumna ze współpracy z Austria Email, cenionym producentem bojlerów i zbiorników ciepłej wody, których innowacyjność i jakość są uznawane na całym świecie.

NASZA MISJA:
Nasza misja to dostarczanie rozwiązań, które podnoszą jakość życia naszych klientów, redukując jednocześnie wpływ na środowisko. Dążymy do ciągłego doskonalenia naszych produktów i usług, aby sprostać rosnącym oczekiwaniom naszych klientów.

Wartości, które kierują naszą firmą to innowacyjność, zrównoważony rozwój, profesjonalizm oraz dbałość o klienta. Nasza załoga to zespół pasjonatów, którzy pracują nad tworzeniem rozwiązań, które sprawią, że Twój dom lub miejsce pracy będą bardziej komfortowe i efektywne.

Dołącz do naszej społeczności na LinkedIn, aby być na bieżąco z naszymi nowościami, projektami i informacjami branżowymi. 

Dziękujemy za zainteresowanie naszą firmą i mamy nadzieję, że będziemy mieli okazję zaprezentować Ci naszą pasję i zaangażowanie w tworzenie lepszych rozwiązań dla Twojego komfortu i oszczędności energii.

Name: ASHRAE San Jose Chapter
Description: ASHRAE, founded in 1894, is a global society advancing human well-being through sustainable technology for the built environment. The Society and its members focus on building systems, energy efficiency, indoor air quality, refrigeration and sustainability within the industry. Through research, standards writing, publishing and continuing education, ASHRAE shapes tomorrow’s built environment today. ASHRAE was formed as the American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers by the merger in 1959 of American Society of Heating and Air-Conditioning Engineers (ASHAE) founded in 1894 and The American Society of Refrigerating Engineers (ASRE) founded in 1904.

Name: Core Air Conditioning Services Ltd
Description:
As a HVAC service and maintenance team, Core Air Conditioning Services Ltd. offers a range of services to ensure optimal performance and longevity of HVAC systems. Here’s a cover of what you do:

Full Preventive Maintenance HVAC:
This comprehensive service includes regular inspections and preventive maintenance tasks.
It covers pre-scheduled recurring annual tasks, which may involve disassembly for preventive maintenance.
Minor repairs, motor testing, and leak testing are also part of this service1.
HVAC Predictive Maintenance:
Non-destructive testing services that help prevent chiller failure and eliminate equipment downtime.
Includes oil analysis, water system analysis, alignment checks, and calibrations2.
Air Conditioner Repair Service:
Repair or replacement of components.
Equipment overhaul, rebuilding, non-destructive testing, and fluid/tube analysis.
Can be stand-alone or combined with other services.
For more details or to schedule maintenance, you can contact Core Air Conditioning Ireland Ltd. at (01) 409 8912. Keep up the great work!

Name: maxairea
Description:
Enhance indoor air quality & save energy by removing CO2
Indoor air quality is important

Inadequate indoor air quality (IAQ) leads to health issues. Optimal IAQ enhances well-being, prevents Sick Building Syndrome symptoms, and boosts cognitive functions. Investing in quality ventilation not only improves indoor health but also enhances building energy efficiency, offering long-term benefits to the total cost of ownership.

Smart add-on or stand-alone HVAC system
Current Ventilation Systems are often designed for 36 m³/hour of fresh air per person. Maxairea Smart technology reduces ventilation needs by 50%, while still complying with standards. It is adaptable for integration or standalone use in various settings, especially in commercial buildings with varying occupancy.

Name: EcoTherm
Description:
EcoTherm is a completely new hydronic heating concept based on operating principles identical to air-to-water heat pump systems, designed to fundamentally improve system reliability, efficiency, and lifetime.

Unlike conventional systems, EcoTherm operates with approximately 5% controlled air content inside the hydraulic circuit, intentionally using air compressibility to absorb water expansion. This approach results in significantly lower operating pressures, reducing mechanical stress on all system components.

The outcome is a substantially extended service life of circulation pumps, radiators, pipe connections, and valves, while also improving overall system stability and safety.

At the core of EcoTherm lies a highly compact and uniquely designed hydromodule, optimized for efficient heat transfer and minimal hydraulic losses. Its architecture differs fundamentally from traditional hydronic solutions.

EcoTherm supports inverter-based water control, where system operation is governed by actual room temperature demand, rather than fixed or minimum supply water temperatures.

EcoTherm is developed with a clear focus on durability, energy efficiency, and next-generation HVAC system design.

Name: ZeroCool Systems
Description:
Welcome to ZeroCool, a division of RAE Corporation, where innovation meets efficiency in climate control solutions. At ZeroCool, we specialize in designing and manufacturing advanced HVACD (Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning, and Dehumidification) systems that cater to the unique needs of indoor agriculture and other precision-sensitive environments.

Our mission is to provide our customers with completely packaged, energy-efficient, and customizable climate control solutions that ensure optimal plant health and yield. Our equipment features cutting-edge technologies such as variable speed compressors, hot gas reheat, and proprietary Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) technology for unmatched precision in temperature and humidity control.

With ZeroCool's systems, end-users can enjoy the benefits of remote monitoring and control through our ZC Connect software, allowing for seamless management of their HVACD systems from anywhere with an internet connection. We also offer a range of custom options, including CO2 injection and UV lights for bacteria and mold control, to tailor solutions to the specific needs of our clients.

Join us in revolutionizing indoor climate control. Discover how ZeroCool's innovative solutions can enhance your operations and contribute to your sustainability goals. Follow us for updates, insights, and more.

Name: Sam Gas Turkey Endüstri Gazları A.Ş.
Description:
Sam Gas Turkey olarak, endüstriyel soğutma sektöründe güvenilirlik, kalite ve sürdürülebilirliği temel alan bir anlayışla faaliyet göstermekteyiz. Soğutma gazları alanında uzmanlaşmış ekibimizle, farklı sektörlerdeki işletmelerin ihtiyaç duyduğu çevre dostu, yüksek performanslı ve uluslararası standartlara uygun gaz çözümlerini sunuyoruz.

Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana, müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak soğutma sistemlerinin verimli ve güvenli bir şekilde çalışmasını sağlamayı amaçladık. Geniş ürün yelpazemizde R134a, R404a, R410a, R407c gibi yaygın kullanılan HFC grubu gazlardan, alternatif ve yeni nesil düşük GWP değerlerine sahip çevreci gazlara kadar birçok seçenek yer almaktadır. Aynı zamanda özel taleplere yönelik gaz tedarikleri ve teknik danışmanlık hizmetleriyle de çözüm ortağınız olmayı sürdürüyoruz.

Sam Gas Turkey olarak sadece ürün temini değil, aynı zamanda sektörel gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek müşterilerimize yenilikçi çözümler sunmayı görev edindik. Gebze’de bulunan modern dolum tesisimiz ile yerli üretimi destekleyerek hem iç pazara hem de ihracata katkı sağlıyoruz. Depolama, dolum, etiketleme ve sevkiyat süreçlerimizin tamamı uluslararası kalite ve güvenlik standartlarına uygun şekilde yürütülmektedir.

Name: PlasUV
Description:
Die zunehmenden Herausforderungen, die Luftqualität zu verbessern und Ressourcen einzusparen, betreffen jeden von uns und werden in Zukunft eine immer wichtigere Rolle in unserem Leben spielen. Insbesondere in der Abluftreinigung der Industrie (Chemie, Pharma, Beschichtung usw.) sehen wir ein enormes Potenzial, Ressourcen einzusparen.

Im Gegensatz zur herkömmlichen Abluftreinigung mit einer thermischen Nachverbrennungsanlage (TNV) reinigen wir die Abluft mit unserem Konzept mithilfe eines Nicht-Thermischen-Plasmas (NT-Plasma) und/oder einer UV-C-Anlage. Dadurch können wir die gesetzlichen Grenzwerte einhalten oder sogar erheblich unterschreiten.
#Emissionsminderung #nichtThermischesPlasma #Kaltplasmabehandlung #Abgasreinigung

Neben der Produktion in unserem Familienunternehmen am idyllischen Standort Haan in NRW bieten wir deutschlandweit den Service der Installation und kontinuierlichen Wartung unserer Geräte; wir liefern also echtes „Made in Germany“

Wir bei MKT lieben Offenheit und Ehrlichkeit. Deshalb leben wir Authentizität und familiäre Werte und begegnen unseren Kunden stets bodenständig, reaktionsschnell und voller Begeisterung. Für uns gilt seit jeher die MKT-Art Geschäfte zu machen: wir halten unser Wort und machen Abschlüsse am liebsten mit einem persönlichen Handschlag.

Wir wissen genau, was unsere Kunden in ihrer täglichen Arbeit bewegt. Und wir sind erst zufrieden, wenn sich alle unsere Produkte an den hohen Ansprüchen unserer Kunden messen lassen. Dabei wollen wir immer beste Voraussetzungen für ein optimales Wohlbefinden schaffen.

Die Qualität unserer Produkte und die Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden haben bei uns höchste Priorität.

Atlantik İklimlendirme Ltd. Şti., 2009 yılında Adana'nın Seyhan İlçesi'nde Neşat Çayırcı liderliğinde kuruldu. Köklü bir mühendislik firması olarak temellerini atan şirket, kurucusu Neşat Çayırcı'nın 40 yılı aşkın sektör deneyimi ve bilgisiyle büyüyüp gelişmeyi ve ülkeye katkı sağlayacak bir firma haline gelmeyi hedeflemiştir.

Atlantik İklimlendirme, sektörün önde gelen markası  Arçelik ile bayilik ve yetkili servis hizmeti sunmaktadır. 2013 yılında ise bölgenin ve ülkenin güçlü firmalarından biri olarak havalandırma kanalı imalat ve montaj işlerini de bünyesine katmıştır.

Günümüzde 50'den fazla çalışana sahip olan Atlantik İklimlendirme Ltd. Şti., sürekli olarak yeni yatırımlarla büyümeye devam etmektedir. Şirket, insan kaynakları politikasını, çalışan memnuniyetini ve bağlılığını artırmaya odaklayarak, adil bir çalışma ortamı sağlamayı, yetenekleri geliştirmeyi ve iş birliği ruhunu güçlendirmeyi amaçlamaktadır.

Müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutan Atlantik İklimlendirme Ltd. Şti., kaliteli hizmet anlayışıyla sektörde güvenilir bir isim olmayı sürdürmektedir. Her bir proje ve hizmette en yüksek standartları sunarak, müşterilerin beklentilerini aşmayı hedeflemekte ve bu doğrultuda sürekli olarak kendini yenilemekte ve geliştirmektedir.

Atlantik İklimlendirme, teknolojiyi ve yenilikçiliği takip ederek, sektördeki lider konumunu korumak ve gelecekteki başarılarını sürdürmek için kararlı bir şekilde ilerlemektedir.

Name: HYDROCOOL Project
Description:
HYDROCOOL project will develop a novel cooling production concept that will significantly go beyond the state-of-the-art performance.
The solution is based on the hydraulic compression and expansion of CO2 in a reversible cycle capable of delivering cooling for a wide range of application such as food, data centres or air conditioning [-40ºC;+12ºC]. By switching from solid to fluid dynamics, HYDROCOOL will enable both isothermal compressions using liquid piston fluid and energy recovery between expander and compressor.

Funded by the European Union under the grant agreement No.101161062. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the European Innovation Council. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

At PGG we have built up a strong reputation for supplying high-quality products at very competitive prices and unbeatable service.

Manufacturing and supplying high-quality gaskets (best price guarantee)

The compressor packages, heat exchangers, vessels, controls and power panels are fully integrated into the room under one roof in our factory by our experienced electricians, pipefitters, and welders. All FUSION rooms are fully insulated and climate-controlled meeting all ASME, OSHA, and IIAR standards for Ammonia refrigeration.

The FUSION rooms are disassembled, shipped to site (roof or concrete pad), and reassembled in weeks(s) versus months in a traditional “stick built” or modularized compressor skid project, while being significantly more economical as well. 

FUSION is a wholly owned subsidiary of Miller Industries, LLC. Miller Industries, LLC is a family owned and operated company in business since 2014.

Our innovative solutions are designed to improve ventilation, filter out contaminants, and maintain optimal humidity levels, ensuring that indoor spaces promote residents' health and comfort.

Name: AVFlow
Description:
Bluetooth Water Manometer  |  Specifically Designed & Engineered by Chiller Technicians

Effortless Flow Measurement of Differential Water Pressure  |  Chilled  |  Condenser  |  Heating Vessels

AVFlow is an advanced app available on iOS & Android devices that brings cutting-edge, time-efficient pressure monitoring to the world of Central Plant Chillers in Commercial HVAC systems.

With AVFlow, accessing Differential Water Pressure data is effortless, as you can conveniently use your smartphone or tablet anytime, anywhere. This modern solution eliminates the need to use cumbersome physical equipment to perform these checks. AVFlow provides wireless pressure monitoring through Industrial-grade pressure transducers, directly on your mobile device.

Through the AVFlow app, you'll receive real-time feedback on the Differential Water Pressure across your Chilled & Condenser vessels, ensuring you stay informed about their performance. AVFlow utilises Industrial-grade pressure transducers to provide accurate & reliable measurements. Its wireless capabilities enable communication up to 20 meters (line of sight), delivering convenient Differential Water Pressure measurements.

AVFlow is a versatile app suitable for various applications where Differential Water Pressure monitoring is crucial. Whether you're managing HVAC systems in marine vessels, commercial setups, water pressure, hydraulic systems, medical equipment, or any scenario requiring Differential Water Pressure monitoring, AVFlow is your go-to solution.

Experience the convenience, efficiency, & modernisation AVFlow brings to Differential Water Pressure monitoring, simplifying your operations & enhancing productivity.

Dzięki zaawansowanej analityce pogody SCA obniża temperaturę powietrza, które wpada do urządzeń klimatyzacyjnych, zmniejszając ilość zużywanej przez nie energii. W konsekwencji nasza innowacja pozwala na 15-20% redukcję kosztów prądu w skali roku oraz obniżenie emisji dwutlenku węgla do atmosfery. Ponadto wydłuża żywotność i zwiększa efektywność systemów chłodzenia oraz umożliwia w ten sposób pracę ludziom nawet w ekstremalnych warunkach.

Działamy od 2016 roku i w ciągu 2 lat zmieniliśmy ciekawy pomysł w zespół doświadczonych managerów, inżynierów i serwisantów z obszaru HVAC. Dzięki temu potrafimy pomagać Naszym Klientom w optymalizacji działania urządzeń chłodzących oraz wspierać ich w mierzeniu się z bieżącymi wyzwaniami.

Nasze starania zostały docenione przez Ministra Inwestycji i Rozwoju, który nominował Systemy SCA sp. z o.o. do nagrody głównej w konkursie "Polskie Inwestycje Przyszłości" w kategorii "Eko start-up".

Name: Tekso Refrigeration Middle East
Description:
1980-1995

"Tailor-made Displays"

In 1980, Tekso was setup as a refrigeration workshop in the heart of Istanbul's industrial suburb. The founding partners had unique skills of constructing display showcases and tailoring amazing counters for the shop-floor. 

80 s were long before the organized retailer movement in Turkey. The business profile was   around customization and decoration. It was the time of local supermarkets, butchers and pastry shops. 

Tekso managed to create an unchallenged image in the market with its understanding of quality and expertise. This image shaped the company s culture for generations to come.

1996-2008

"Standardization Efforts"

With the sudden appearance of the first generation organized retailers in Turkey Tekso shifted its strategy towards becoming a globally respected refrigerated display case manufacturer who would soon be able to supply complete range of showcases used in hypermarkets.

With intense effort to meet the international standards and production methods, Tekso redesigned it products for the European market. With the beginning of the millennium Tekso set its growth strategy around the export business.

Throughout the following years it managed to be referenced in many international retail groups in Europe, Russia and the Middle East.

2009-Today

"A New Generation"

Past decade Tekso is deeply effected by a change that is driven by the new generation of employees and managers, the true owners of the 38 year old institution. 

The automation on the factory floor, digitalization of internal processes, environmental friendly production techniques, advanced r&d and testing facilities are some of many advancements achieved.

Today Tekso has 2 active foreign branches in France and UAE, has sales activities in 22 countries and is referenced by many international retailes.

Tekso is now developing many innovative technologies in refrigeration industry and getting ready for a new phase towards its future.

Name: ISHRAE Deccan Chapter
Description:
BACKGROUND

The Indian Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air Conditioning Engineers (ISHRAE), was founded in 1981 at New Delhi by a group of eminent HVAC&R professionals. ISHRAE today has more than 12,000 HVAC&R professionals as members and additionally there are 7,500 Student-members. ISHRAE operates from 41 Chapters and sub Chapters spread all over India, with HQ in Delhi. It is led by a team of elected officers, who are members of the Society, working on a voluntary basis, and collectively called the Board of Governors.

MISSION

To promote the goals of the Society for the benefit of the general public. Towards this objective, the Chapters of the Society participate in, and organize, activities to protect the Environment, improve Indoor Air Quality, help Energy Conservation, provide continuing education to the Members and others in the HVAC & related user Industries and offer certification programs, career guidance to students at the local colleges and tertiary institutions.

AIMS & OBJECTIVES

Advancement of the Arts and Sciences of Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning and Refrigeration Engineering and Related Services.
Continuing education of Members and other interested persons in the said sciences through Lectures, Workshops, Product Presentations, Publications and Expositions.
Rendition of career guidance and financial assistance to students of the said sciences.
Encouragement of scientific research.

Name: E3 Green Technology Co., Ltd
Description:
Established in 2016,E3 Green Technology co,Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise that aids users in saving energy, boosting efficiency, and offers scientists an environmentally friendly and healthy working environment. We are dedicated to providing safe and energy-saving comprehensive solutions for HVAC systems in laboratories and clean factories.

Having been engaged in pharmaceutical R&D for many years, members of the founding team understand the harm brought by unsafe laboratory environment to researchers, so they determined to solve the two major problems of safety and energy issues for laboratories. The project was initiated and put into R&D in 2014. After three years of study on the four core demands of "safety, energy saving, intelligence, and modularization", the team yielded fruitful outcome in developing the Bernoulli Laminar Air-Curtain Fume Hood and E·FLOW Damper with independent IP rights, overcoming the problem of air stability of the air compensation fume hood, which has bothered the industry for decades, and solved the technical problem of control valves of the ventilation system requiring accuracy, speed, and stability. It creates a safer, healthier and more comfortable laboratory environment for scientific researchers, and brings energy-saving and emission reduction technology solutions for enterprises.

Name: BM Services USA
Description:
BM Services USA LLC is a specialized provider of advanced Refrigeration, HVAC, HVAC-R, and IAQ solutions serving commercial, hospitality, and residential clients across Central Florida and beyond. Headquartered in Orlando, we deliver high-precision services designed to keep mission-critical systems reliable, efficient, and compliant with industry standards.

Our expertise spans food cold refrigeration, air conditioning, electrical diagnostics, and indoor air quality monitoring. With a commitment to technical excellence, we combine field service experience with cutting-edge remote monitoring technologies that track voltage stability, phase balance, harmonic distortion, refrigerant performance, and energy consumption in real time. This proactive approach allows us to identify and prevent failures before they disrupt operations.

BM Services USA is backed by multiple international certifications and credentials including EPA, FDA Compliance, CofQ, HRAI, Red Seal Canada, NATE Certification, and F-Gas Certification, ensuring every service meets the highest standards of quality and safety. Our team has extensive experience working in high-demand environments such as resorts, steakhouses, and large commercial kitchens, where downtime is not an option.

We are also innovators in preventive maintenance and energy optimization, offering solutions that extend equipment life, reduce operational costs, and improve system sustainability. From advanced electrical quality analysis to IAQ assessments and custom system upgrades, BM Services USA provides turnkey technical solutions tailored to each client’s needs.

We don’t work for everyone—just the best. Our focus is on long-term partnerships with clients who value professionalism, reliability, and innovation.

Name: Hydrolevel
Description:
Hydrolevel Company was founded in 1965 by Michael DeLeonardis, an engineer specializing in steam pressure vessels. Through his vast experience with steam boilers, Michael became well aware of the shortcomings of float-type level controls. The moving mechanical linkage was often no match for the harsh boiler environment and Michael witnessed the costly and sometimes dangerous results of dry-firing a boiler. He began experimenting with improved concepts for monitoring boiler water levels.


By utilizing water’s ability to conduct electricity, he designed a non-moving electrode that accurately detected water within a boiler. The Safgard trademark was launched and production of the first probe-type low water cut-off was underway.

Since that time, Hydrolevel’s probe has continued to demonstrate its superior performance meeting the changing demands of boiler manufacturers and heating contractors. Hydrolevel incorporates its proven technology into a line of temperature limit/low water cut-off combinations, low water cut-offs for steam and hot water boilers, multi-purpose tank level controls, and condensate pump controllers. Hydrolevel produces a variety of controls for residential and commercial hot water boilers. Today, Hydrolevel’s product line includes state-of-the-art steam controls, including the programmable VXT Water Feeder, the revolutionary CycleGard foam-compensating cut-off, 1100 Series Mini controls and 500 Series cut-offs for commercial boilers. The new Fuel Smart HydroStat control performs as a low water cut-off, as well as a temperature limit control and boiler temperature reset.

Name: inVENTer Romania
Description:
Aerul proaspăt ne menține sănătoși și vigilenți, ne crește concentrarea și ne face să ne simțim bine. Dacă nu este îndeplinită nevoia umană de bază pentru oxigen, acest lucru ne poate afecta performanța în activitate. Sistemele de ventilație de la inVENTer vă oferă o serie de avantaje. 
O instalare simplă și fără complicații a sistemelor noastre de ventilație descentralizate – atât în clădiri noi și renovări – nu doar creează o atmosferă plăcută, dar în același timp, reduc consumul de energie. Acest lucru se face reducând sau eliminând ventilația necesară prin ferestre. Inima sistemelor noastre de ventilație – recuperatorul ceramic de căldură – stochează căldura aerului evacuat și o transfera aerului proaspăt de alimentare. Acest lucru păstrează căldura in casa și puteți economisi la costurile de încălzire.

În funcție de nevoile dvs., puteți controla dispozitivele și beneficiați de un sistem de ventilație controlat. Prin schimbul constant de aer, mucegaiul este prevenit și poluanții sunt îndepărtați automat. Praful și polenul pot fi oprite de filtrul nostru special. Astfel, vă puteți bucura de aer curat, oxigenat în casa dvs. zi și noapte economisind energie valoroasă.

Name: Thai Ausnor
Description:
Thai Ausnor Company Limited was established in 1977 as a manufacturer of all types of quality coils. 

As an affiliated company of Angthong Universal Group, one of the experts in refrigeration products in Thailand, we realized the need for high quality coils to support the growing air-conditioning market. Thai Ausnor became one of the first manufacturers of coils and refrigeration parts in Thailand.  

Under the logo name THAN, we manufactured high quality products that were widely recognized. We began exporting our products globally soon afterwards. Due to the growing demands from customers, our factory was relocated to Minburi in 1988. The new facility allowed us to improve our quality control process, achieve higher production capacity and sustain better working environment. With the added machines, we increased our production capability and improved our quality control process. The product range grew from only coils to finished products such as condensing units, air-cooled condensers, unit coolers, and chiller units.

In 1999, our quality management system was ISO 9001 certified.

In 2007, we introduced COOLSCAPE as a brand of finished products manufactured under ISO 9001, a quality management system that covers both the design phase and production phase.

At present, our experienced Product Design department can design coils and related products with raw materials, suitable parts, dimensions, and protective coating to meet customers' demands.

Name: Flexware Control Technology, LLC
Description:
Flexware has developed the FlexCube Modular Supermarket Refrigeration System, a revolutionary reengineering of the storewide multi-temp rack system. Using far less refrigerant, piping, and electricity, a FlexCube System dramatically reduces the use of hydrofluorocarbon gases while offering unsurpassed reliability. 

At just 2ft X 2ft, FlexCubes use 75% less refrigerant than typical systems, with no rooftop AHUs or separate mechanical room required. FlexCubes are precision-manufactured with custom-molded parts. They are certified to be 100% leak-free when they leave the factory and tested again at installation.

 The FlexCube systems provide unique benefits to supermarkets throughout the U.S. 

1. Lower acquisition and installation costs
2. Greatly improved electrical operating efficiencies
3. No need for rooftop condensing units or interior mechanical rooms
4. 75% less use of refrigerant gases with minimal to no leaking
5. Cloud-based software control with predictive monitoring
6. Major additional energy-saving benefits to store operators

Developed by inventor and energy engineering expert Jim LaBrecque, FlexCube systems have been keeping food cold and energy costs low in regional supermarkets since 2008.

Цел
„Атанасов Клима” ЕООД има за цел непрекъснатото подобряване на предлаганите услуги и задоволяване на нуждите на нашите клиенти. Нашата задача е създаване и контролиране на микроклимата във всяка сграда, задоволявайки и най-взискателните клиенти.
Ние даваме решения на нашите настоящи и бъдещи клиенти, като правим техния дом или офис едно по-добро място за живеене, работа и забавление. Приемайки това предизвикателство се ангажираме да бъдем винаги в течение на най-новите тенденции в системите за поддържане на микроклимата в сгради.
„Вашият комфорт е нашата мисия” Това не е само едно мото, с което да привлечем клиенти. Привличането на клиенти е много по-лесно, отколкото тяхното запазване. Именно затова ние заставаме зад всяка една дума и техническо решение и се стремим да бъдем максимално коректни с всички наши клиенти. Всеки, който се е възползвал от нашите услуги, вече се е убедил в това.
С нетърпение очакваме да работим с вас!

Name: Arctic Industrikøl
Description:

Vores virksomhed er bygget på et stærkt fundament af kerneværdier som kvalitet, pålidelighed og kundetilfredshed. Vi forpligter os til at tilbyde skræddersyede løsninger, der nøje afstemmes efter jeres specifikke behov og forventninger. Vores mål er at sikre, at alle projekter afsluttes til tiden, inden for budgettet, og til den højeste standard.

Vores ekspertise strækker sig til alle aspekter af industrikøleanlæg, og vi er dedikerede til at skabe stærke samarbejdsrelationer med vores kunder. Ved at tilpasse vores serviceaftaler til jeres specifikke behov, garanterer vi ikke kun anlæggenes driftsstabilitet, men også deres energieffektivitet. Vores serviceprogrammer er omfattende og inkluderer muligheder for vedligeholdelsesaftaler fra 1 til 10 år, alt sammen designet for at give jer ro i sindet og sikkerhed for, at jeres anlæg er i de bedste hænder.

Arctic Industrikøl ApS er mere end bare en leverandør af industrikøleanlæg; vi er jeres partnere i at sikre, at jeres virksomhed fortsætter med at køre problemfrit og effektivt. Lad os hjælpe jer med at opnå jeres kølingsbehov. Kontakt os i dag på (+45) 73 70 83 43 eller skriv til ao@arcticcooling.dk for at finde ud af, hvordan vi kan understøtte jeres virksomhed.

Bu kapsamda Sencrone, ulusal ve uluslararası mühendislik standartlarını takip etmek, bu standartları üstlenmiş olduğu her projeye etkin ve verimli şekilde uygulamak amacı ile hareket etmektedir.
     Sencrone, endüstriyel tesislere, ticari yapılara ve bireysel konutlara ürün tedariği ve proje yönetimi hizmeti vermek amacı ile 2019 yılında faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Sencrone, çalışanlarının aldıkları köklü eğitim ve sektörel tecrübe sayesinde içinde bulundukları her projeye, mühendislik bakış açısı ile değer katmaktadır.
     Sencrone, teknolojik her türlü gelişimi ilgiyle ve yakın takip ederek faaliyet göstermiş olduğu iş alanında güncelliğini korumayı ve iş ortaklarına en üst düzeyde mühendislik, proje yönetimi ve ürün tedariğini; iş etiğine, ulusal ve uluslararası standartlara bağlı kalarak projelerine değer katmayı kendine ilke edinir. Bu amaç doğrultusunda, ulusal ve uluslararası şirketlerle iş birliktelikleri yapmaktadır.
Sencrone, faaliyet gösterdiği iş alanında benimsemiş olduğunu kalite ve değer politikasıyla birlikte sektöründeki saygın ve güvenilir firmalar arasında yer almayı amaç edinir.

Name: Pavani Engineers
Description:
We are primarily into HVAC solutions, offering clients complete end-to-end solutions on turnkey basis. We offer complete MEP services to provide seamless integration into the infrastructure. We have been executing projects in PAN India. At Pavani Engineers, we are capable of scaling up to any challenges or handling specialized projects.

Pavani Engineers started in the year 1998 with two founders —
Mr. V Subramanian and Mr. B.V.N. Satyanarayana Kumar who were colleagues at Voltas, where they garnered extensive experience in handling HVAC products and solutions. Both being mechanical engineers, they understood the products and solutions thoroughly and wanted to take their services to the next level by providing solutions to clients. Taking the exclusive dealership of Voltas mid-range products, Pavani Engineers started off by providing ductable project execution.



In 2004, driven by a vision of expansion, Pavani Engineers secured the continuity dealership of Bluestar, extending their portfolio reach across entire Andhra Pradesh. Capitalizing on the infrastructure boom between 2008-10, Pavani Engineers evolved from offering brand-based solutions to addressing diverse client needs. Since 2012, Pavani Engineers has distanced itself from brand affiliations, adopting a client-centric approach that prioritizes delivering tailor-made solutions irrespective of brand allegiance. They align their offerings with client needs, compliance requirements, and budget considerations.

With an impressive track record, Pavani Engineers has successfully delivered customized solutions for a range of sectors, including Pharmaceuticals, Research Labs, Hospitals, Hotels/Restaurants, Showrooms/Retail Outlets, Industrial Applications, IT/ITES Offices, PSU/Government, Telecom, Large Auditoriums, Malls, Builders, Multiplexes, and more.

Name: Witte Koeltechniek B.V.
Description:
Organisatie en activiteiten
Witte Koeltechniek is gespecialiseerd in het ontwerp en de installatie van professionele systemen voor het koelen en vriezen van levensmiddelen. Door het conditioneren in koel- of vriescellen blijft de kwaliteit van de opgeslagen goederen langere tijd behouden. Ook leggen we complete elektrotechnische installaties aan, als onderdeel van onze koeltechnische activiteiten of als zelfstandige opdracht. Daarnaast plaatsen en onderhouden we airconditioningsystemen in kantoor- en bedrijfspanden en bij particulieren. Bij al onze werkzaamheden volgen we nauwgezet de ontwikkelingen op technologisch gebied en houden we ons strikt aan de voorschriften op het gebied van veiligheid en milieu. Uitgangspunt van onze werkzaamheden is de wens van de klant! Nationaal en internationaal actief We zijn actief in heel Nederland en via ons zusterbedrijf ook werkzaam in diverse landen in Afrika en West- en Oost-Europa. Onze opdrachtgevers zijn zowel grote, internationale opererende bedrijven als de plaatselijke winkelier. Elke klant, groot of klein, bieden we een op zijn situatie gebaseerde maatwerkoplossing.

Waarom werken bij ons?
Witte Koeltechniek is ruim 75 jaarspecialist in koudetechniek. Wij ontwerpen, bouwen en onderhouden installaties die producten, of een werkomgeving op de juiste temperatuur houden. Dit doen we voor een gevarieerde, steeds groter wordende groep klanten. Vanuit Noord-Holland zijn we actief in de rest van Nederland, en internationaal. Volgens de laatste ontwikkelingen op het gebied van bewaren, technologie, veiligheid en regelgeving en met hart voor het milieu. • de mogelijkheid om je verder te ontwikkelen en ervaring op te doen met de nieuwste technieken, inzichten en koudemiddelen; • de ruimte om mee te denken over oplossingen en innovatie; • goede primaire en secundaire arbeidsvoorwaarden.

Name: ProjeClima Engenharia
Description:
A ProjeClima Engenharia nasceu da vontade de levarmos o máximo conforto aos nossos clientes através de soluções que melhorem a Qualidade do Ar e Eficiência Energética.

Através de nossos projetos para sistemas de climatização, ventilação e exaustão garantimos um ambiente mais agradável e saudável, promovendo não só o controle da temperatura ambiente, mas realizando a renovação do ar interno através da troca do ar poluído por um ar externo livre de impurezas, fungos e bactérias.

Um sistema de climatização ou ventilação, quando executado dentro das normas técnicas, é capaz de garantir uma melhor eficiência energética dos equipamentos, consumindo menos energia.

Nossos sistemas de exaustão para extração de fumaça e escadas pressurizadas contribuem para uma maior segurança em caso de incêndios.   

Além da operação mais eficiente dos equipamentos, para proporcionar a maior economia possível para um ambiente residencial, comercial ou industrial, a ProjeClima Engenharia oferece uma dezena de soluções para redução de sua conta de energia.

Para se alcançar a melhor eficiência energética e melhorar a Qualidade do Ar, além do fazer um projeto adequado, é importante também considerar o planejamento dos controles de operação que serão executados. A ProjeClima oferece sua experiência para implementar um PMOC (Plano de Manutenção, Operação e Controle) para minimizar os custos com manutenções desnecessárias nos equipamentos de ar-condicionado. 

Para garantir a qualidade dos serviços da ProjeClima,  contamos com a expertise de um Engenheiro Mecânico com mais de 20 anos de experiência, desenvolvendo seus projetos de forma personalizada para alcançar os melhores resultados.

Quer saber mais? Agende uma visita com o departamento técnico da ProjeClima Engenharia, teremos imensa satisfação em atendê-lo para mostrar os benefícios que um Sistema de Climatização bem projetado pode proporcionar ao seu empreendimento.

Description:

Creemos en la digitalización del sector a través de herramientas que hagan la vida más fácil. Apostamos por la profesionalización, siempre tratando de alcanzar la excelencia. Queremos ser rápidos y confiables.

Asesoramos a nuestros clientes ofreciendo resultados respetuosos con el medio ambiente a la par que innovadores.

Nuestros servicios son:

Universo bombas de agua
Tenemos taller de reparación para bombas de agua con banco de pruebas. También las vendemos y realizamos su instalación. Además, poseemos el servicio técnico de diversas marcas como Bloch o Hidrobex.

Instalaciones y mantenimientos 
Realizamos todo tipo de instalaciones: sustitución de acometidas de agua, riego, grupos de presión, tratamientos de agua, piscinas, gas, calderas industriales, etc.
También creemos en las relaciones a largo plazo y por eso tratamos de realizar excelentes mantenimientos.

Grupos contra incendios
Aprovechando nuestro expertise en bombas, somos asesores, instaladores y mantenedores. Tenemos la capacitación para hacer puestas en marcha. La seguridad es lo primero y tener el know-how importa.

¿Quiénes son nuestros clientes?
Suelen ser de naturaleza variada, aunque destacaríamos los clientes industriales, agrícolas y comunidades de propietarios (tanto de viviendas como de regantes). Somos una empresa principalmente B2B.

Wszystkie montaże wyceniamy indywidualnie u klienta.
Zadzwoń, lub napisz. Zadamy kilka pytań, jeżeli uznamy to za konieczne poprosimy o zdjęcie orientacyjne i w klika minut otrzymasz wstępną wycenę.
Zarówno wycena na miejscu u klienta jak i zdalna jest darmowa i niezobowiązująca. 
Oferujemy między innymi:
- montaż klimatyzacji (split i multisplit) w domach, mieszkaniach, biurach itp. 
- przeglądy gwarancyjne oraz pogwarancyjne - czyszczenie i odkażanie jednostek 
- serwis i naprawę - przeniesienie jednostek oraz ich całkowity demontaż 
- sprzedaż jednostek. 

Posiadamy wszystkie uprawnienia i certyfikaty wymagana prawnie, a także autoryzacje wiodących producentów klimatyzacji. Współpracując z nami nie ryzykujesz utraty gwarancji. 
Oferujemy produkty marek Daikin, Gree, Cooper&Hunter, Mitsubishi Heavy, Haier, LG, Airwell i inne. 
Posiadamy wieloletnie doświadczenie i komplet uprawnień do wykonywania wszelkich prac związanych z montażem, serwisem oraz likwidacją klimatyzacji.


Jesteś architektem, projektantem, wykonawcą? Zajmujesz się robotami wykończeniowymi w budynkach i mieszkaniach? A może jesteś właścicielem firmy budowlanej? Pracujesz jako inżynier w firmie instalacyjnej? Albo też prowadzisz firmę w branży HVAC? Chętnie podejmiemy współpracę. 

Wiele wiemy, jeszcze więcej potrafimy. Współpraca z nami zawsze jest korzystna i wygodna. Indywidualne podejście do każdego Klienta i zlecenia – warte znacznie więcej. 
Gotowi jesteśmy podjąć się najtrudniejszych zadań. 
Nasza filozofia – nie tylko wykonywanie zleceń, a raczej całkowite wsparcie w zakresie HVAC.

Name: Air Solution Company
Description:
Air Solution Company with over 20 years of experience, Is the industry leader in Manufacturing externally mounted Cottonwood Filter Screens (commonly called Air Inlet Filters,Intake Filters, Equipment Protection Screens and Bug Screens). They are specifically engineered for use on cooling towers, air cooled chillers and condensers, rooftop units, dry-coolers, wall louvers, back-up generator intakes and  other HVAC air movement and cooling systems.

Airborne debris is the leading cause of fouling and clogging of all HVAC systems. In fact, billions of dollars are lost each cooling season to downtime, lost productivity, repairs, maintenance and excessive energy consumption. That is why in the early 1990’s Air Solution Company developed and patented the first compatible Air Intake Filter specifically engineered to mount to the outside of cooling towers and other HVAC equipment for purposes of stopping the debris at its point of entry – So it doesn’t cause operational or efficiency problems.

Wierzymy, że przyszłość należy do inteligentnych, niskoemisyjnych systemów grzewczych – a naszą misją jest, by ta przyszłość zaczynała się właśnie dziś.

Our comprehensive product range includes chillers, air handling units (AHU), package units, fan coil units, evaporators, ice banks, air-cooled condensers, rack systems, ice cream and gelato machines — all engineered for high efficiency, reliability, and long-term performance.

For over six decades, NIK’s commitment to engineering excellence, quality, and customer satisfaction has made it a trusted partner in the refrigeration and HVAC industry.

Há mais de 30 anos no mercado, nossa jornada começou com o sonho visionário do Engenheiro Marcelo Rene de transformar a forma como frutas, legumes e verduras são tratados desde a colheita até o consumidor final.

 Nossa missão é proporcionar soluções tecnológicas avançadas que prolongam a vida útil dos alimentos, reduzem o desperdício e promovem a saúde e o bem-estar de nossos clientes.  A sustentabilidade está no cerne de tudo o que fazemos. Estamos comprometidos em minimizar nosso impacto ambiental e contribuir para um futuro mais verde. Ao reduzir o desperdício de alimentos, estamos também protegendo os recursos naturais e ajudando a construir um mundo mais sustentável para as gerações futuras.

 Aqui na Cooltec, valorizamos a inovação, a excelência e o compromisso com nossos clientes e parceiros. Nossa equipe é formada por profissionais apaixonados e dedicados, prontos para enfrentar os desafios mais complexos e encontrar soluções criativas que impulsionem o crescimento e o sucesso de nossos clientes.

 Junte-se a nós nesta jornada rumo à transformação da indústria alimentícia. Conecte-se conosco para saber mais sobre como nossas soluções podem beneficiar o seu negócio e ajudar a construir um futuro mais sustentável para todos. #Cooltec #Inovação #Sustentabilidade #Alimentos #Tecnologia #Transformação

Description:
Air Climate Evolution is dedicated to delivering scientific evidence-based solutions to the ever-increasing problems associated with delivering high Indoor Air Quality (IAQ)

Since the onset of COVID, UVC has become one of the most in-demand technologies around the world. The threat posed by airborne transmission through ventilations systems in buildings and enclosed spaces has been recognized as a major concern. 

Almost overnight UVC systems have transformed from a HVAC efficiency option to a health and safety necessity. In fact, the WHO, EPA, CDC and ASHRAE have identified UVC as a key recommended layer of protection. We are leaders in the field of Ultraviolet Germicidal Irradiation (UVGI) emitters for HVAC Systems. We provide a simple, cost effective, all-in-one retrofittable solution for HVAC
Our scientifically proven UVC Emitters (specifically designed for AC and HVAC) generate High Intensity Ultraviolet Light (UVC) at 253.7 nanometers.

The UVC destroys the DNA and RNA of micro-organisms and inactivates viral, bacterial, and mould/fungi species and is therefore effective against ALL types of viruses include all variants of C19, SARS, Influenza, Colds, Measles & German Measles and RSV. Kill Ratio of 99+%

NOT ALL UVC IS THE SAME. 6 X MORE POWERFUL THAN OUR COMPETITORS. S
Don’t let your HVAC system be a breeding ground for mould & bacteria that can cause sickness, increased labor costs & energy inefficiency. GET IN TOUCH NOW!

Name: Varme- og Kjølesystemer AS
Description:
Varme- og Kjølesystemer AS: Nytt kapittel med fokus på kvalitet og service

Vi har gleden av å informere om at Re Varmeteknikk AS har fusjonert med Varme- og Kjølesystemer AS. Sammen fortsetter vi vår virksomhet under det solide navnet Varme- og Kjølesystemer AS. I januar 2025 flytter vi inn i våre nye, moderne lokaler i Borgeskogen 31, 3160 Stokke. Vi ønsker å rette en stor takk til alle som har bidratt til denne spennende prosessen – deres innsats har vært avgjørende for vår suksess.

Vår visjon: Kvalitet og pålitelighet i alle leveranser
Varme- og Kjølesystemer AS har som mål å levere markedets beste løsninger innen varmepumper og kjøletekniske anlegg til private boliger, offentlige bygg, næringsbygg og landbruksbygg. Vi er stolte av å betjene kunder over hele Østlandsområdet, og vi legger vekt på høy kvalitet og solid fagkompetanse i alle oppdrag.

Med flere tusen installasjoner bak oss har vi opparbeidet oss bred erfaring med de fleste fabrikater på markedet. Denne erfaringen og vår tekniske kompetanse gjør oss i stand til å tilby skreddersydde løsninger som dekker våre kunders unike behov.

Våre tjenester
I tillegg til installasjon av varmepumper og kjøleanlegg tilbyr vi konsulentbistand for utforming og prosjektering av varmetekniske løsninger. Gjennom våre samarbeidspartnere kan vi gi ekspertråd og sørge for at du får den beste løsningen for ditt prosjekt.

Velkommen til våre nye lokaler
Fra januar 2025 vil vi ønske både nye og eksisterende kunder velkommen til vårt nye kontor i Borgeskogen 31. Som vanlig kan vi nås på telefon 33395013 eller 97180900. Ta kontakt med oss for en uforpliktende samtale – sammen finner vi en løsning som møter dine behov.

Velg trygt – velg kvalitet med Varme- og Kjølesystemer AS.

Naší cílovou skupinou jsou všichni ti, kteří chtějí kvalitní a nadčasové produkty, které šetří nejen vaši kapsu, ale i životní prostředí. Name: WHRL Solutions LLC
Description:
Most food processors pay a substantial and volatile cost for heating water to clean and sanitise their manufacturing process and at the same time they dump a substantial portion of the heat from their refrigeration systems into the atmosphere.

WHRL Solutions have developed a patented, innovative technology in the WHRLflocycle, that recovers the heat energy being shipped by refrigeration systems and returns it back as hot water for cleaning and sanitising, with a level of efficiency unseen in the market today.  The hot water requires no gas, electricity or oil and removes the need for a boiler or water heater. This is truly ZERO carbon energy that delivers FREE hot water.

We have two fully developed and complementary products featuring high quality components, innovative technology and clear USP’s aimed at industrial scale refrigeration and hot water systems. We have a range of systems to fit any size of operation.
 
Firstly, our WHRLflo heat recovery and hot water system, which can be added to an existing cooling system.  The system delivers significant quantities of food safe hot water for free. 

Secondly, our WHRLcoolchiller with integrated heat recovery system.  This cooling system provides all of the facilities cooling and hot water from one central control unit.  The cooling is performed extremely efficiently through intelligent technology and again the hot water is generated for free.

We already have many installations operating in large food processors and dairy farms in the US & UK, delivering aggressive ROI's.

Our business model offers a focus and expertise on cooling and hot water, two of the most essential inputs in safe food production and at the same time we deliver significant savings.

As we continue to develop a strong foothold in our markets we intend to provide regular updates on key developments in our business, product range and target markets. 

WHRL Solutions... ' Raising the Bar in Energy Efficiency' !
