Name: NovaCool Solutions Ltd
Description:
Founded on 1 January 2026, NovaCool Solutions Ltd delivers industrial cooling as critical infrastructure — engineered properly, supported intelligently, and relied upon with confidence.

Industrial cooling is often invisible when it works and immediately disruptive when it doesn’t. Production stops, costs escalate, and pressure builds fast. NovaCool exists because cooling systems perform best when they are treated as integral to the process they support, not as commodities or afterthoughts.

We are an engineer-led business providing engineered chiller solutions, emergency breakdown support, planned maintenance, system optimisation, and chiller hire. Every system we supply or support is designed around real operating conditions.

Our maintenance plans, NovaCare and NovaCare Elite, go beyond basic servicing. As standard, they include engineered system checks, condition reporting, digital compliance oversight, customer portal access, and practical optimisation advice based on how systems actually operate. Issues are identified early, inefficiencies corrected at source, and uptime protected without hidden extras.

Our team brings decades of hands-on experience across food and beverage, plastics, pharmaceuticals, life sciences, and general manufacturing. We’ve seen what works, what fails, and how small, overlooked issues quietly erode reliability over time.

From emergency response to long-term optimisation, our focus is always the same: uptime, stability, and control. We remove unnecessary hand-offs, keep engineer involvement front and centre, and manage systems to behave predictably — even under pressure.

Name: Advanced Climate Technical Services Ltd.
Description:
The core business of Advanced Climate Technical Services Limited is within the mechanical building services sector, covering all aspects of HVAC Plant, including air conditioning, heating, ventilation, pumps and associated equipment. 

It is centered on the belief that the client is looking for a service that combines quality, efficiency and reliability with a professional, enthusiastic, personal approach and a track record which proves the company can actually deliver. 

Our specialist activities revolve around the Installation, Service and Maintenance of all types of water chillers. Our engineers have experience with most manufacturers’ Water Chillers, excelling in the main six; Climaveneta, Carrier, McQuay, Trane, Daikin and York. Be it Centrifugal, Screw, Scroll or reciprocating you can rely on our expertise.

Our experience is not restricted to conventional Chiller plant: we offer a rigorous service and maintenance regime on all types of ABSORPTION and CHP Plant as well.

Planned preventative maintenance programs can greatly reduce the risk of premature failure of your heating, ventilation and air conditioning equipment. In some instances failure to carry out routine maintenance, in accordance with manufacturers specifications, could even lead to the invalidation of equipment warranty and result in subsequent premature replacement costs. 

Inadequate maintenance of your equipment will result in the HVAC plant using a higher energy consumption and decreased efficiency.  We are able to offer you a bespoke maintenance package tailored to your needs.  Maintenance contracts are simple and annually renewable.  All servicing is carried out by our fully qualified engineers.

Advanced Climate Technical Services Limited is able to offer a free, no obligation site survey and quotation for all new or replacement HVAC plant.  Our knowledge and experience allows us the flexibility to design an efficient application tailored to the customers requirements.

Name: MASA. FRIGO S.R.L.
Description:
Masa Frigo è una realtà di riferimento nel settore della refrigerazione industriale e commerciale, con una consolidata esperienza nella vendita, installazione e assistenza tecnica di impianti frigoriferi. L’azienda si distingue per la sua capacità di offrire soluzioni personalizzate e altamente performanti, rispondendo alle esigenze di una clientela diversificata e in continua evoluzione.

Tra i prodotti offerti da Masa Frigo spiccano vetrine e banchi frigoriferi tradizionali, ideali per esposizioni di alimenti e bevande in ambito commerciale. Inoltre, l'azienda propone una vasta gamma di banchi frigoriferi, tra cui quelli verticali e semi-verticali positivi, adatti per la conservazione di prodotti freschi, e quelli negativi, per la conservazione di prodotti congelati. I banchi frigoriferi plug-in, facili da installare e ad alta efficienza energetica, completano l’offerta, affiancati dalle celle frigorifere sia commerciali che industriali, utilizzabili in diversi contesti operativi.

Masa Frigo si distingue per il suo approccio integrato al cliente, accompagnandolo in ogni fase del progetto, dalla progettazione all’installazione. Grazie a un team altamente qualificato e all’utilizzo di tecnologie all’avanguardia, l’azienda è in grado di realizzare impianti frigoriferi su misura, ottimizzando l’efficienza e rispondendo alle specifiche necessità del cliente.

Un altro punto di forza è il servizio di assistenza tecnica, che garantisce interventi tempestivi entro 24-48 ore, assicurando la continuità e l’efficienza del funzionamento degli impianti. Questo livello di supporto, unito alla qualità dei prodotti e alla personalizzazione delle soluzioni offerte, fa di Masa Frigo un partner ideale per tutte le aziende che necessitano di impianti frigoriferi affidabili e performanti.

Name: All City Heat and Air
Description:
Homeowners and custom remodelers call on All City when they have comfort issues they need solved.:

1. It may be simply that their unit quit working and they need one of our Nate Certified Technicians to come out and restore the equipment to the original equipment manufacturers specifications.

2. Maybe they need help maintaining their HVAC system to keep it running to peak performance. Homeowners take comfort in the fact that All City will do everything we can to keep the power bills low and the family safe. Our factory skilled and trained technicians will never try to sell clients something they don't need or want.

3. Some homeowners have more complex issues, such as areas/rooms in their home that just won't heat or cool properly. They have an airflow issue from a bad installation. Most of the time this can be solved by checking the static pressure and adjusting the blower speed

4. Noise can be a real issue that keeps homeowners awake at night or they have to turn up the tv when the air cuts on. Outdoor units are often so loud that clients have to talk over the noise when entertaining friends and family on their patio. Heating Cooling should be felt, not heard.

5. Some homeowners have more serious comfort issues such as poor indoor air quality and are looking for a quality filtration system with humidity control. They are tired of allergies from mold and dust mites that are making their family sick.

6. Many families have decided that they want the peace of mind that comes with replacing their current unit with a high-performance HVAC system that has a warranty. A system that is built for longevity and reduced operating costs. A unit that has a low environmental impact that increases the value of their home.

Además, somos pioneros en la instalación de sistemas Thermo King y en la conversión a refrigerantes ecoamigables, contribuyendo a la reducción del impacto ambiental del sector.

Nuestro modelo de trabajo se apoya en una red de talleres aliados a nivel nacional, permitiendo ofrecer servicios especializados a empresas de transporte, talleres automotrices, y particulares. También desarrollamos programas de formación técnica gratuita en climatización automotriz para jóvenes en situación de vulnerabilidad, promoviendo inclusión laboral y crecimiento sostenible.

En Frío Motriz creemos en la innovación con propósito, por eso buscamos consolidarnos como referentes nacionales en climatización automotriz eficiente y sustentable, fortaleciendo cada día la confianza de nuestros clientes mediante calidad, transparencia y compromiso.

Name: HVAC Direct Australia
Description:
Who Is HVAC Direct?
We are an easy-to-navigate Online-Only Store set up by HVAC professionals to provide you, the HVAC engineer, with quality and competitive prices for tools, accessories and a wide variety of refrigeration products. 

Because we're Online-Only, HVAC Direct saves you money by expressly bypassing the storefronts and middle men, thus providing a seamless connection between the end user and the principle manufacturer or agent.

How Do We Do This?
We have contracts in place with big brands such as JAVAC, Fieldpiece and Imperial just to name a few. We spend a set amount monthly to get bulk discount prices on all products. These great prices are then forwarded on to you, giving you the customer competitive prices on great products.

The One-Stop-Shop For All HVAC Engineers
HVAC Direct aims to be the future of online wholesale business, daily developing and growing our vast range of service tools and accessories, making available the premium brands that you as professionals come to expect. We do not supply poor copies from Asia which tend to fail, but rather offer you quality brands, backed by us and the manufacturers and their representatives in Australia. In this way, your warranty is secured and fully supported throughout the country.

Thank you for considering HVAC Direct. If you're happy with what we offer, we'd love to hear your feedback. A referral to your colleagues and friends would be great too.

Name: VEOtec e.K. – Klimazonentrennung für Logistik, Großhandel, Lebensmittel-Einzelhandel und Produktion
Description:
DIE VEOTEC-KLIMAZONENTRENNUNG
Warme und kalte Betriebsbereiche voneinander zu trennen ist nicht nur sinnvoll, sondern wirtschaftlich notwendig. Zwischen Produktion und Lager, zwischen drinnen und draußen, zwischen Fertigung und Tiefkühlzone gilt es, verlässliche Lösungen zu schaffen.

SENKEN SIE IHRE ENERGIEKOSTEN DAUERHAFT
Alle haben dieselben Erwartungen: Kosten sparen, Workflow optimieren, Sicherheit erhöhen. Aber jede Branche, jedes Unternehmen hat ganz individuelle Anforderungen. Wir bieten Ihnen eine sehr präzise und individuelle Planung Ihrer Klimazonentrennung, die sich perfekt in Ihre Arbeitsprozesse einfügt. Und dabei maximale Energieeinsparung bringt.
Das Gute daran: Wir errechnen bereits in der Planungsphase, wie hoch die Ersparnis sein kann. Dann wissen Sie genau, ab wann sich Ihre Investition in Gewinn verwandelt. Die richtige Klimazonentrennung rechnet sich für Sie – GARANTIERT!

WANN IST EINE KLIMAZONENTRENNUNG SINNVOLL?
Die Gründe für eine effektive Klimazonentrennung sind vielfältig. Ein wesentlicher ist die Preisentwicklung am Energiemarkt, die seit langem nur eine Richtung kennt: nach oben. Im Bereich der technischen Gebäudeausstattung sind allerdings noch viele Potenziale zur Energieeinsparung ungenutzt. Dazu gehört auch die Klimazonentrennung. Je effektiver diese arbeitet, desto höher die Einsparung. Hier sind 60 % und mehr möglich!

VERTRAUEN SIE AUF UNSER PRAXIS-KNOW-HOW
Als Ingenieur- und Planungsbüro sind wir seit vielen Jahre auf Klimazonentrennung spezialisiert, was uns eine umfassende Expertise verschafft hat. Diese setzen wir gern zum Vorteil unserer Kunden ein.
Das Fundament unserer Lösungen ist eine umfassende Beratung, die neben der baulichen und prozessorientierten Analyse auch die angestrebten Ziele unserer Kunden umfasst. Nach der Planung stehen wir Ihnen mit engmaschiger Projektbegleitung zur Seite und sind auch nach Abschluss des Projektes in technischen Fragen Ihr Ansprechpartner.

Name: Gado Cool
Description:
وصف شامل لخدمات "جادو كول للتكييف"
شعارنا: جادو كول: شريكك الهندسي الموثوق. تكييف مركزي بأعلى معايير الجودة والالتزام.

في "جادو كول للتكييف"، نقدم منظومة متكاملة من حلول التكييف والتبريد، تبدأ بالدراسة والتصميم ولا تنتهي بالصيانة الدورية. هدفنا هو توفير راحة مناخية مثالية وكفاءة تشغيل مستدامة لجميع عملائنا، سواء كانوا شركات مقاولات كبرى أو عملاء فرديين.

1.  قسم المشاريع الهندسية والتكييف المركزي (المقاولات)
نحن الشريك الأمثل لشركات المقاولات والمهندسين الاستشاريين، لضمان أعلى جودة في تنفيذ أنظمة التكييف للمشاريع الجديدة.

التصميم والاستشارات الهندسية: دراسة دقيقة للأحمال الحرارية للمباني التجارية، الإدارية، والفيلات، وتقديم تصاميم متكاملة (VRF، Chilled Water، Package Units، وحدات كونسيلد).

التوريد والتأسيس الاحترافي: تأسيس شبكات المواسير النحاسية المعزولة (بأعلى خامات معتمدة مثل النحاس الجنوب أفريقي)، وتأسيس مسارات الصرف والكابلات وفقاً للمخططات، لضمان الاندماج الكامل مع أعمال التشطيب.

تصنيع وتركيب الدكتات (Ducting): تصنيع وتركيب مجاري الهواء (الصاج المجلفن) شامل العزل الصوتي والحراري، وتركيب مخارج الهواء (الجريلات) وفقاً للمعايير الهندسية لضمان التوزيع المتساوي للهواء.

التنفيذ والتركيب النهائي: تركيب وتشغيل الوحدات الداخلية والخارجية باحترافية، وإجراء اختبارات الضغط والتشغيل للتأكد من كفاءة النظام قبل التسليم.

2.  قسم التكييف المنزلي والوحدات المنفصلة 
للمنازل والشقق، نقدم خدمة شاملة تضمن أعلى مستويات الراحة والجودة التي يبحث عنها العميل.

تأسيس تكييف الوحدات المنفصلة: تأسيس شبكة التكييف (المخفي أو الظاهر) خلال مراحل التشطيب، باستخدام خامات عالية الجودة لتقليل استهلاك الكهرباء وإطالة عمر الأجهزة.

توريد وتركيب الأجهزة: توريد جميع أنواع التكييفات (سبليت، فري ستاند، كونسيلد) من الماركات العالمية المعتمدة.

خدمة المغتربين (التنفيذ عن بعد): تصميم وتنفيذ مشروع تكييف فيلتك أو شقتك في مصر بالكامل وأنت في مكانك، مع توفير تقارير مصورة وفيديوهات متابعة دورية وضمان تسليم "جاهز للتشغيل".

3.  قسم الصيانة والدعم الفني
لضمان عمل أجهزتك بكامل طاقتها على مدار العام، نقدم خدمات الصيانة بجميع أنواعها:

الصيانة الوقائية والدورية: عقود صيانة سنوية

Name: Fest CoolTech
Description:
CoolTech is a health-technology startup focused on solving last-mile vaccine cold-chain failures in low-resource and high-temperature settings.

Born from real field immunization experience, CoolTech develops smart, self-powered, and IoT-enabled cooling carriers designed to preserve vaccine potency where conventional cold boxes fail.

The solution integrates active cooling, real-time temperature monitoring, and data-driven decision support to reduce vaccine wastage and improve immunization outcomes.

CoolTech has been supported through national and international innovation programmes including TETFAIR, ASIP, SWIT Accelerator, and TECA THAW Nigeria Heatwave, and is actively progressing toward WHO PQS prequalification.

Mission: To ensure no child misses life-saving vaccines due to cold-chain failure. 
Focus areas: Vaccine cold chain, medical devices, digital health, climate-resilient healthcare.

Våra medlemmar har precis som många andra små och medelstora bolag utmaningar inom exempelvis administration eller inköpsavtal.
 
Vi är inte en kedja. Vi är en grupp. En grupp som byggts utifrån insikten att vi blir bättre när vi hjälps åt.

Name: toGo Filter GmbH
Description:
Das Team der 2020 gegründeten toGo Filter GmbH aus München und Berlin, stellt seine innovative Antwort für die persönliche Luftqualität vor. 

Der toGo Filter ist das neue Hilfsmittel für weniger Sorgen, höheren Schutz und mehr Normalität im Miteinander. Anders als die industriellen Großgeräte ist der Luftreiniger to-go die notwendige Tischlösung und setzt dort an, wo die Atemluft ein- und ausgeatmet wird. Mit dem Smart Air Gerät kann man sich zurücklehnen und durchatmen. 

Der Luftreiniger to-go kann überall mitgenommen werden, ist ca. 300 g leicht, ca. 21 cm hoch und passt in jede Tasche, etwas größer als ein Coffee-to-go Becher. Eine integrierte 2600mAh Lithium Batterie ermöglicht bis zu 8 Std. Laufzeit ohne Stromanschluss. Mit USB-Ladekabel lässt sich der Filter bequem in ca. 1,5 Std. voll aufladen. 

Mit dem 3-in-1 HEPA 13 Filtersystem werden 99,97% der feinsten Schadstoffe, inklusive Aerosole, Staub, Pollen, Allergene, Chemikalien, Gerüche u.v.m. aus der Luft gefiltert und für eine saubere und sichere Atemluft gesorgt. Ein integrierter Sensor misst die Luftqualität und regelt die Filterstärke je nach Bedarf automatisch. 

Mit dem toGo Filter ist es unauffällig auffällig möglich, mit erhöhtem Schutz sorglos zusammen im Innenraum zu verweilen, sich und Andere zu schützen und Verantwortung zu übernehmen!  

Das langfristige Ziel der toGo Filter GmbH ist es, die Qualität der Luft die wir in Gebäuden einatmen nicht anderen Menschen oder Gebäudetechniken zu überlassen, sondern selber dafür zu sorgen, dass jeder Einzelne einen Beitrag zu einer schadstoffärmeren Welt leistet. #wiratmensicher #wiratmengesund #togofilter dein Luft.

گروه تولیدی باردصنعت در سال 1383 با هدف تولید سیستمهای سرمایشی و تهویه مطبوع در استان اصفهان راهاندازی شد.
مهندسین و متخصصین این مجموعه بر پایه تجربه و تخصص 20 ساله خود، با تکیه بر دانش و تکنولوژی روز توانستند در تولیدات، به سطحی از کیفیت دست یابند که به خوبی جای خالی مجصولات خارجی را در ایران پر کند.
محصولاتی که مجموعه بارد صنعت تولید میکند عبارتند از:
•	انواع چیلر تراکمی
•	چیلر تراکمی هوا خنک 
•	چیلر تراکمی آب خنک 
•	مینی چیلر
•	اواپراتور
•	کندانسور آبی
•	برج خنک کننده
•	روفتاپ پکیج
•	آیس بانک
•	سردخانه
یکی از اصلیترین محصولات بارد صنعت چیلرهای تراکمی است. چیلر یکی از انواع تجهیزات تهویه مطبوع است که برای سرمایش و تولید برودت در ساختمانها و صنایع بهکار میرود. چیلر براساس نوع مکانیزم خنککاری به دو دسته چیلر تراکمی و چیلر جذبی تقسیم میشود. روش کار چیلر تراکمی به این صورت است که در یک سیکل تبرید تراکمی-تبخیری ، مبرد درون سیکل حرارت را آب گرفته شده و آب خنک میشود. در مصارف ساختمانی آب خنک تولید شده در چیلر به داخل ساختمان رفته و از طریق فنکویلها یا هواساز با هوای داخل ساختمان تبادل حرارت کرده و دمای هوا کاهش مییابد. در مصارف صنعتی نیز به منظور خنک کاری سیالات و یا جذب حرارت دستگاهها و ابزارآلات صنعتی، از چیلر استفاده میشود. 
شایان ذکر است بیان کنیم که مجموعه بارد صنعت، اولین تولید کننده چیلرهای اسکرو با کنترل ظرفیت پیوسته در ایران است.

Spezialisiert auf maßgeschneiderte Systemlösungen deckt FRIO ein breites Spektrum ab: von pharmazeutischen Anwendungen über IT- und Schaltraumklimatisierung bis hin zu individuellen Lösungen für Wohn-, Verkaufs- und Büroräume. Das Leistungsportfolio umfasst vier Kernbereiche:

Kältetechnik: 
Modernste Standards für hohe Ausfallsicherheit und Verlässlichkeit.

Klimatechnik: 
Lösungen für Privathaushalte, Bürogebäude und gewerbliche Flächen jeder Größe.

Wärmepumpen: 
Umweltfreundliche und kostensparende Alternativen für Neu- und Bestandsbauten.

Luftreinigung: 
Optimale Raumluftqualität durch effektive Filterung von Partikeln und Bakterien.

FRIO zeichnet sich durch einen ganzheitlichen Ansatz aus – von der Beratung über Konzeption und Installation bis hin zu Service und Wartung. Dabei setzt das Unternehmen auf drei Kernprinzipien:

Hochwertige Qualität: 
Regelmäßige Mitarbeiterschulungen und ausgewählte Produkte mit bis zu fünf Jahren Garantie.

Individuelle Lösungen: 
Gründliche Bedarfsanalyse für optimale Systeme und Produkte.

Professionelle Planung und Umsetzung: 
Technische Expertise gepaart mit exzellenter Kundenkommunikation.

Als zertifizierter Fachbetrieb steht FRIO für Professionalität, Zuverlässigkeit und persönlichen Service. Mit seinem Engagement für Qualität und Kundenzufriedenheit hat sich FRIO als vertrauenswürdiger Partner in der Branche etabliert und wird auch künftig innovative und nachhaltige Lösungen für alle Bereiche der Klima- und Kältetechnik anbieten.

Name: Coastal Airconditioning Services (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Coastal Airconditioning Services (Pty) Ltd. is a company that was constituted as a result of a management buyout of the service and manufacturing divisions of the Western Cape branch of Improvair Environmental Solutions (Pty) Ltd in 2002. 
The Company is now owned and managed by three directors, all of whom were previous employees of Improvair in the Western Cape and all of the existing staff of the two divisions purchased were transferred to Coastal Airconditioning Services. 
The Company operates from offices and workshops in Wetton, Cape Town where our 102 employees are based. Our modern workshop facility is 2150 square meters in extent, and contains state of the art CAM machinery for the production of quality sheet metal products focussed on the air-conditioning industry. Our spiral duct facility is the only producer of spirally wound round ducting and gore locked fittings in the Western Cape. We have further the capacity and expertise to provide a range of manufactured sheet metal products to other industries. 
Our Service and Contracting Divisions focus on HVAC maintenance, repair and installation work, ranging from single user unitary installations to large central plant. Our installation capabilities extend to retrofit and new installations incorporating, design, project management and installation of plant, electrical and control systems. Our service technical employees are all qualified air-conditioning technicians, and we offer a 24-hour, seven-day week call out facility, via a vehicle fleet of 20 equipped service vehicles which ensure the mobility required to efficiently serve our customers.

Description:
We are primarily into HVAC solutions, offering clients complete end-to-end solutions on turnkey basis. We offer complete MEP services to provide seamless integration into the infrastructure. We have been executing projects in PAN India. At Pavani Engineers, we are capable of scaling up to any challenges or handling specialized projects.

Pavani Engineers started in the year 1998 with two founders —
Mr. V Subramanian and Mr. B.V.N. Satyanarayana Kumar who were colleagues at Voltas, where they garnered extensive experience in handling HVAC products and solutions. Both being mechanical engineers, they understood the products and solutions thoroughly and wanted to take their services to the next level by providing solutions to clients. Taking the exclusive dealership of Voltas mid-range products, Pavani Engineers started off by providing ductable project execution.



In 2004, driven by a vision of expansion, Pavani Engineers secured the continuity dealership of Bluestar, extending their portfolio reach across entire Andhra Pradesh. Capitalizing on the infrastructure boom between 2008-10, Pavani Engineers evolved from offering brand-based solutions to addressing diverse client needs. Since 2012, Pavani Engineers has distanced itself from brand affiliations, adopting a client-centric approach that prioritizes delivering tailor-made solutions irrespective of brand allegiance. They align their offerings with client needs, compliance requirements, and budget considerations.

With an impressive track record, Pavani Engineers has successfully delivered customized solutions for a range of sectors, including Pharmaceuticals, Research Labs, Hospitals, Hotels/Restaurants, Showrooms/Retail Outlets, Industrial Applications, IT/ITES Offices, PSU/Government, Telecom, Large Auditoriums, Malls, Builders, Multiplexes, and more.

Name: Americare Appliance Repair
Description:
Americare Appliance Repair started on April 28th, 2010 in Manhattan, New York, and eventually expanded to South Florida. The company focuses on  HVAC/R (heating, ventilation, air conditioning and refrigeration), and Appliance Repair, Preventative Maintenance, and Installations.  We are a certified minority business with the State of Florida, Palm Beach County School District, Broward Schools, and Miami-Dade Public Schools. We are fully licensed and insured with a bonding capacity of $10m in aggregate. We are an authorized dealer for Friedrich AC Units, and do warranty repairs for a number of brands. We also have appliance repair, refrigeration and HVAC contracts with residential, commercial, and government entities, among others. 

We have worked on various VRV/VRF, Ducted and Ductless systems, Multi and Single Zone Mini-split systems, package RTU units (Heating and Cooling), water-cooled systems, cooling towers, chillers, and exhaust systems. Some of these systems we install, service and maintain are in excess of 500,000 BTU cooling and 150,000 BTU Heating. We also install VRF and package systems in excess of 50-ton capacity. In addition, we do all types of refrigeration including ice machines, walk-ins and reach-ins.

The vision for Americare Appliance Repair is to become a world-class multi-state Appliance Repair, Refrigeration and HVAC company known for treating our workers the best, and providing the best service to our customers and community. We believe in doing good even as we do well.

الآن وفي عام 2023، أصبحت كول ماستر واحدة من الشركات المصنعة الرائدة لثلاجات العرض و غرف التبريد في المملكة العربية السعودية، و ضمت الشركة منتج جديد مع تحدي جديد لتلبية مطالب العملاء في كل مجالات التبريد والتكييف وهو المكيف المركزي.

Name: Copper Joints

About Us

Welcome to Copper Joints Insights – a knowledge hub dedicated to copper pipe joints, copper fittings, and piping solutions used in VRF (Variable Refrigerant Flow) systems and HVAC applications. Our content is designed to provide practical guidance, technical knowledge, and industry updates for professionals, consultants, and learners who want to understand the importance of strong, leak-proof copper joints in achieving reliable and energy-efficient cooling systems.

 What We Share

Educational blogs, guides, and resources on copper joints and HVAC piping systems

Best practices for copper jointing methods, brazing, and installation techniques

Insights on VRF system piping design, energy efficiency, and copper standards

Technical know-how for engineers, HVAC contractors, and students

 Our Purpose

We aim to make copper joint knowledge accessible and practical. Whether it’s about choosing the right fittings, ensuring leak-proof connections, or optimizing VRF piping systems, our content is built to educate, inform, and empower HVAC professionals and learners worldwide.

 Who Can Benefit

 HVAC Professionals looking for reliable copper piping practices
 Engineers & Consultants needing technical insights on VRF systems
 Students & Learners exploring copper fittings and HVAC basics
 Industry Enthusiasts following the latest piping and HVAC innovations

Termékeink már 26 országban sikeresek és évről évre újabbak jönnek. Sikereket értünk el Nyugat-Európa olyan piacain, mint Németország, Egyesült Királyság, Svájc vagy Dánia; valamint a termékeink világszerte elérhetőek, többek között Ausztráliában és Kínában is, emellett amerikai piaci stratégiát is készítünk.

Az ATREA termékportfóliója:

Name: Induclima
Description:
Induclima es una empresa especializada en servicios y productos de climatización en Ciudad Real, España. En su catálogo ofrecen aparatos de aire acondicionado, sistemas de calefacción, aerotermia y termos eléctricos. 
Reputación y opiniones de clientes: Lo ideal es buscar comentarios y reseñas de clientes anteriores. Esto te dará una idea de la calidad del servicio, la instalación y el trato al cliente. Aunque la búsqueda de opiniones en línea no arrojó resultados, podrías buscar en foros locales, redes sociales o preguntar a conocidos en Ciudad Real.
Precios: Aunque la empresa ofrece descuentos ocasionales, el costo final dependerá del equipo que elijas y de la complejidad de la instalación. Es recomendable solicitar un presupuesto detallado para comparar con otras empresas.
Calidad de los productos: Induclima trabaja con marcas reconocidas como Samsung, Panasonic y Yuoki. La fiabilidad de estas marcas es un buen indicio, pero la calidad del servicio técnico y la instalación son igualmente importantes.
Contacta a la empresa: Llama al número de teléfono o visita su sitio web para solicitar un presupuesto detallado. Haz preguntas específicas sobre la garantía, el proceso de instalación y el servicio postventa.
Pide referencias: Pregunta si te pueden proporcionar referencias de clientes recientes. Aunque es poco común, algunas empresas pueden ofrecer esta opción.
Investiga localmente: Busca reseñas en Google Maps, perfiles en redes sociales o pregunta en grupos de la zona de Ciudad Real para obtener referencias de primera mano.
